authors_text: Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Alexander Liniger,Ugo Rosolia,Phillip Karle,Madhur Behl,Venkat Krovi,Rahul Mangharam
title: Autonomous Vehicles on the Edge: A Survey on Autonomous Vehicle Racing
title_zh: 边缘自动驾驶汽车：自动驾驶汽车赛车调查
abstract: The rising popularity of self-driving cars has led to the emergence of a new research field in the recent years: Autonomous racing. Researchers are developing software and hardware for high performance race vehicles which aim to operate autonomously on the edge of the vehicles limits: High speeds, high accelerations, low reaction times, highly uncertain, dynamic and adversarial environments. This paper represents the first holistic survey that covers the research in the field of autonomous racing. We focus on the field of autonomous racecars only and display the algorithms, methods and approaches that are used in the fields of perception, planning and control as well as end-to-end learning. Further, with an increasing number of autonomous racing competitions, researchers now have access to a range of high performance platforms to test and evaluate their autonomy algorithms. This survey presents a comprehensive overview of the current autonomous racing platforms emphasizing both the software-hardware co-evolution to the current stage. Finally, based on additional discussion with leading researchers in the field we conclude with a summary of open research challenges that will guide future researchers in this field.
summary: The rising popularity of self-driving cars has led to the emergence of a new research field in the recent years: Autonomous racing. Researchers are developing software and hardware for high performance race vehicles which aim to operate autonomously on the edge of the vehicles limits: High speeds, high accelerations, low reaction times, highly uncertain, dynamic and adversarial environments. This paper represents the first holistic survey that covers the research in the field of autonomous racing. We focus on the field of autonomous racecars only and display the algorithms, methods and approaches that are used in the fields of perception, planning and control as well as end-to-end learning. Further, with an increasing number of autonomous racing competitions, researchers now have access to a range of high performance platforms to test and evaluate their autonomy algorithms. This survey presents a comprehensive overview of the current autonomous racing platforms emphasizing both the software-hardware co-evolution to the current stage. Finally, based on additional discussion with leading researchers in the field we conclude with a summary of open research challenges that will guide future researchers in this field.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的日益普及导致近年来出现了一个新的研究领域：自动驾驶赛车。研究人员正在开发高性能赛车的软件和硬件，旨在在车辆极限的边缘自动运行：高速度、高加速度、低反应时间、高度不确定、动态和对抗性环境。本文代表了第一个涵盖自动驾驶赛车领域研究的整体调查。我们只关注自动驾驶赛车领域，展示感知、规划和控制以及端到端学习领域使用的算法、方法和途径。此外，随着自动驾驶赛车比赛的数量不断增加，研究人员现在可以使用一系列高性能平台来测试和评估其自动算法。本次调查全面概述了当前自动驾驶赛车平台，强调了现阶段的软硬件共同进化。最后，根据与该领域领先研究人员的进一步讨论，我们总结了开放研究挑战，这将指导该领域的未来研究人员。

AI.tldr: 本文是对自动驾驶赛车领域的全面综述，涵盖感知、规划、控制及端到端学习的算法与方法，并分析当前高性能平台及研究挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术的发展，自动驾驶赛车作为高动态、高不确定性的极端场景，成为验证算法性能的新研究方向。
AI.method: 通过梳理自动驾驶赛车领域的算法方法、硬件平台及软件协同演进，结合对领域专家的讨论总结研究现状与挑战。
AI.result: 系统总结了自动驾驶赛车的算法框架、主流硬件平台及其软硬件协同设计，并梳理了当前研究的技术瓶颈与未解决问题。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需聚焦于极端环境下的感知鲁棒性、实时决策优化及跨平台算法泛化能力等关键挑战。

Finally, based on additional discussion with leading researchers in the field we conclude with a summary of open research challenges that will guide future researchers in this field. 自动驾驶汽车的日益普及导致近年来出现了一个新的研究领域：自动驾驶赛车。研究人员正在开发高性能赛车的软件和硬件，旨在在车辆极限的边缘自动运行：高速度、高加速度、低反应时间、高度不确定、动态和对抗性环境。本文代表了第一个涵盖自动驾驶赛车领域研究的整体调查。我们只关注自动驾驶赛车领域，展示感知、规划和控制以及端到端学习领域使用的算法、方法和途径。此外，随着自动驾驶赛车比赛的数量不断增加，研究人员现在可以使用一系列高性能平台来测试和评估其自动算法。本次调查全面概述了当前自动驾驶赛车平台，强调了现阶段的软硬件共同进化。最后，根据与该领域领先研究人员的进一步讨论，我们总结了开放研究挑战，这将指导该领域的未来研究人员。 本文是对自动驾驶赛车领域的全面综述，涵盖感知、规划、控制及端到端学习的算法与方法，并分析当前高性能平台及研究挑战。 Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Alexander Liniger,Ugo Rosolia,Phillip Karle,Madhur Behl,Venkat Krovi,Rahul Mangharam cs.RO,cs.SE

authors_text: Xi Jiang,Guoyang Xie,Jinbao Wang,Yong Liu,Chengjie Wang,Feng Zheng,Yaochu Jin
title: A Survey of Visual Sensory Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 视觉感觉异常检测的调查
abstract: Visual sensory anomaly detection (AD) is an essential problem in computer vision, which is gaining momentum recently thanks to the development of AI for good. Compared with semantic anomaly detection which detects anomaly at the label level (semantic shift), visual sensory AD detects the abnormal part of the sample (covariate shift). However, no thorough review has been provided to summarize this area for the computer vision community. In this survey, we are the first one to provide a comprehensive review of visual sensory AD and category into three levels according to the form of anomalies. Furthermore, we classify each kind of anomaly according to the level of supervision. Finally, we summarize the challenges and provide open directions for this community. All resources are available at https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-visual-sensory-anomaly-detection.
summary: Visual sensory anomaly detection (AD) is an essential problem in computer vision, which is gaining momentum recently thanks to the development of AI for good. Compared with semantic anomaly detection which detects anomaly at the label level (semantic shift), visual sensory AD detects the abnormal part of the sample (covariate shift). However, no thorough review has been provided to summarize this area for the computer vision community. In this survey, we are the first one to provide a comprehensive review of visual sensory AD and category into three levels according to the form of anomalies. Furthermore, we classify each kind of anomaly according to the level of supervision. Finally, we summarize the challenges and provide open directions for this community. All resources are available at https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-visual-sensory-anomaly-detection.
abstract_zh: 视觉感官异常检测（AD）是计算机视觉中的一个重要问题，由于人工智能的发展，它最近正在获得发展势头。与语义异常检测在标签级别检测异常（语义偏移）相比，视觉感觉AD检测样本的异常部分（协变量偏移）。然而，尚未提供全面的综述来总结计算机视觉社区的这一领域。在本次调查中，我们首次对视觉感觉AD进行了全面的回顾，并根据异常的形式分为三个层次。此外，我们根据监管级别对每种异常进行分类。最后，我们总结了挑战并为这个社区提供了开放的方向。所有资源均可在 https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-visual-sensory-anomaly-detection 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文对视觉感官异常检测领域进行系统性综述，按异常形式分类并总结挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注语义级异常检测，而视觉感官异常检测缺乏系统性总结，需填补该领域研究空白。
AI.method: 首次按异常形式划分三个层级，结合监督级别对异常类型进行分类，并总结技术挑战与研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了首个视觉感官异常检测分类体系，梳理了现有方法与数据集，提出开放性研究问题。
AI.conclusion: 视觉感官异常检测需进一步突破数据多样性、模型泛化性及跨模态融合等关键技术难题。

authors_text: Quoc Dang Vu,Kashif Rajpoot,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Nasir Rajpoot
title: Handcrafted Histological Transformer (H2T): Unsupervised Representation of Whole Slide Images
title_zh: 手工制作的组织学变压器（H2T）：整个幻灯片图像的无监督表示
abstract: Diagnostic, prognostic and therapeutic decision-making of cancer in pathology clinics can now be carried out based on analysis of multi-gigapixel tissue images, also known as whole-slide images (WSIs). Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been proposed to derive unsupervised WSI representations; these are attractive as they rely less on expert annotation which is cumbersome. However, a major trade-off is that higher predictive power generally comes at the cost of interpretability, posing a challenge to their clinical use where transparency in decision-making is generally expected. To address this challenge, we present a handcrafted framework based on deep CNN for constructing holistic WSI-level representations. Building on recent findings about the internal working of the Transformer in the domain of natural language processing, we break down its processes and handcraft them into a more transparent framework that we term as the Handcrafted Histological Transformer or H2T. Based on our experiments involving various datasets consisting of a total of 5,306 WSIs, the results demonstrate that H2T based holistic WSI-level representations offer competitive performance compared to recent state-of-the-art methods and can be readily utilized for various downstream analysis tasks. Finally, our results demonstrate that the H2T framework can be up to 14 times faster than the Transformer models.
summary: Diagnostic, prognostic and therapeutic decision-making of cancer in pathology clinics can now be carried out based on analysis of multi-gigapixel tissue images, also known as whole-slide images (WSIs). Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been proposed to derive unsupervised WSI representations; these are attractive as they rely less on expert annotation which is cumbersome. However, a major trade-off is that higher predictive power generally comes at the cost of interpretability, posing a challenge to their clinical use where transparency in decision-making is generally expected. To address this challenge, we present a handcrafted framework based on deep CNN for constructing holistic WSI-level representations. Building on recent findings about the internal working of the Transformer in the domain of natural language processing, we break down its processes and handcraft them into a more transparent framework that we term as the Handcrafted Histological Transformer or H2T. Based on our experiments involving various datasets consisting of a total of 5,306 WSIs, the results demonstrate that H2T based holistic WSI-level representations offer competitive performance compared to recent state-of-the-art methods and can be readily utilized for various downstream analysis tasks. Finally, our results demonstrate that the H2T framework can be up to 14 times faster than the Transformer models.
abstract_zh: 现在，病理诊所中的癌症诊断、预后和治疗决策可以基于对数十亿像素组织图像（也称为全幻灯片图像 (WSI)）的分析来进行。最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）被提出来导出无监督的 WSI 表示；这些之所以有吸引力，是因为它们较少依赖于繁琐的专家注释。然而，一个主要的权衡是，更高的预测能力通常是以可解释性为代价的，这对通常期望决策透明的临床应用构成了挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个基于深度 CNN 的手工框架，用于构建整体 WSI 级表示。基于 Transformer 在自然语言处理领域的内部工作的最新发现，我们分解了其流程并将其手工制作成一个更透明的框架，我们称之为手工组织学 Transformer 或 H2T。基于我们涉及总共 5,306 个 WSI 的各种数据集的实验，结果表明，与最近最先进的方法相比，基于 H2T 的整体 WSI 级表示提供了具有竞争力的性能，并且可以轻松用于各种下游分析任务。最后，我们的结果表明，H2T 框架的速度比 Transformer 模型快 14 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为H2T的手工设计组织学Transformer框架，用于在无需专家标注的情况下生成全切片图像（WSI）的无监督表示。
AI.motivation: 现有深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在WSI分析中虽具有高预测能力，但可解释性差，难以满足临床决策对透明性的需求。而Transformer模型虽强大但缺乏可解释性，需寻求平衡。
AI.method: 基于自然语言处理领域Transformer的内部机制，手工设计出更透明的H2T框架，通过分解Transformer流程构建WSI级表示，并在5,306张WSI数据集上验证。
AI.result: H2T在多个数据集上表现与最先进方法相当，且计算速度比Transformer模型快14倍，适用于多种下游分析任务。
AI.conclusion: H2T框架在保持高性能的同时提升了可解释性，为临床病理分析提供了兼顾效率与透明度的解决方案。

authors_text: Guoyang Xie,Yawen Huang,Jinbao Wang,Jiayi Lyu,Feng Zheng,Yefeng Zheng,Yaochu Jin
title: Cross-Modality Neuroimage Synthesis: A Survey
title_zh: 跨模态神经图像合成：一项调查
abstract: Multi-modality imaging improves disease diagnosis and reveals distinct deviations in tissues with anatomical properties. The existence of completely aligned and paired multi-modality neuroimaging data has proved its effectiveness in brain research. However, collecting fully aligned and paired data is expensive or even impractical, since it faces many difficulties, including high cost, long acquisition time, image corruption, and privacy issues. An alternative solution is to explore unsupervised or weakly supervised learning methods to synthesize the absent neuroimaging data. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review of cross-modality synthesis for neuroimages, from the perspectives of weakly supervised and unsupervised settings, loss functions, evaluation metrics, imaging modalities, datasets, and downstream applications based on synthesis. We begin by highlighting several opening challenges for cross-modality neuroimage synthesis. Then, we discuss representative architectures of cross-modality synthesis methods under different supervisions. This is followed by a stepwise in-depth analysis to evaluate how cross-modality neuroimage synthesis improves the performance of its downstream tasks. Finally, we summarize the existing research findings and point out future research directions. All resources are available at https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-multimodal-brain-image-systhesis
summary: Multi-modality imaging improves disease diagnosis and reveals distinct deviations in tissues with anatomical properties. We begin by highlighting several opening challenges for cross-modality neuroimage synthesis. Then, we discuss representative architectures of cross-modality synthesis methods under different supervisions. This is followed by a stepwise in-depth analysis to evaluate how cross-modality neuroimage synthesis improves the performance of its downstream tasks. Finally, we summarize the existing research findings and point out future research directions. All resources are available at https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-multimodal-brain-image-systhesis
abstract_zh: 多模态成像改善了疾病诊断并揭示了具有解剖学特性的组织的明显偏差。完全对齐和配对的多模态神经影像数据的存在已经证明了其在大脑研究中的有效性。然而，收集完全对齐和配对的数据是昂贵的，甚至是不切实际的，因为它面临着许多困难，包括成本高、采集时间长、图像损坏和隐私问题。另一种解决方案是探索无监督或弱监督学习方法来合成缺失的神经影像数据。在本文中，我们从弱监督和无监督设置、损失函数、评估指标、成像模态、数据集和基于合成的下游应用的角度，对神经图像的跨模态合成进行了全面的回顾。我们首先强调跨模态神经图像合成的几个开放挑战。然后，我们讨论不同监督下跨模态合成方法的代表性架构。接下来是逐步深入分析，以评估跨模态神经图像合成如何提高其下游任务的性能。最后，我们总结了现有的研究成果并指出了未来的研究方向。所有资源均可在 https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-multimodal-brain-image-systhesis 获取

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了弱监督和无监督设置下的跨模态神经影像合成方法，分析其损失函数、评估指标、影像模态、数据集及下游应用。
AI.motivation: 多模态神经影像数据获取成本高且困难，需通过合成方法弥补缺失数据，以提升疾病诊断和脑科学研究效率。
AI.method: 从监督方式、损失函数设计、评估指标、影像模态、数据集及下游任务应用等角度，对现有跨模态合成方法进行分类与深入分析。
AI.result: 总结了当前研究进展，指出合成方法在下游任务中的性能提升，并提出未来研究方向如模型泛化性与可解释性优化。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态神经影像合成需解决数据对齐、模态差异等挑战，未来应关注更高效的学习框架与临床应用验证。

search_text: Cross-Modality Neuroimage Synthesis: A Survey 跨模态神经图像合成：一项调查 Multi-modality imaging improves disease diagnosis and reveals distinct deviations in tissues with anatomical properties. The existence of completely aligned and paired multi-modality neuroimaging data has proved its effectiveness in brain research. However, collecting fully aligned and paired data is expensive or even impractical, since it faces many difficulties, including high cost, long acquisition time, image corruption, and privacy issues. An alternative solution is to explore unsupervised or weakly supervised learning methods to synthesize the absent neuroimaging data. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review of cross-modality synthesis for neuroimages, from the perspectives of weakly supervised and unsupervised settings, loss functions, evaluation metrics, imaging modalities, datasets, and downstream applications based on synthesis. We begin by highlighting several opening challenges for cross-modality neuroimage synthesis. Then, we discuss representative architectures of cross-modality synthesis methods under different supervisions. This is followed by a stepwise in-depth analysis to evaluate how cross-modality neuroimage synthesis improves the performance of its downstream tasks. Finally, we summarize the existing research findings and point out future research directions. All resources are available at https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-multimodal-brain-image-systhesis 多模态成像改善了疾病诊断并揭示了具有解剖学特性的组织的明显偏差。完全对齐和配对的多模态神经影像数据的存在已经证明了其在大脑研究中的有效性。然而，收集完全对齐和配对的数据是昂贵的，甚至是不切实际的，因为它面临着许多困难，包括成本高、采集时间长、图像损坏和隐私问题。另一种解决方案是探索无监督或弱监督学习方法来合成缺失的神经影像数据。在本文中，我们从弱监督和无监督设置、损失函数、评估指标、成像模态、数据集和基于合成的下游应用的角度，对神经图像的跨模态合成进行了全面的回顾。我们首先强调跨模态神经图像合成的几个开放挑战。然后，我们讨论不同监督下跨模态合成方法的代表性架构。接下来是逐步深入分析，以评估跨模态神经图像合成如何提高其下游任务的性能。最后，我们总结了现有的研究成果并指出了未来的研究方向。所有资源均可在 https://github.com/M-3LAB/awesome-multimodal-brain-image-systhesis 获取 本文系统综述了弱监督和无监督设置下的跨模态神经影像合成方法，分析其损失函数、评估指标、影像模态、数据集及下游应用。 Guoyang Xie,Yawen Huang,Jinbao Wang,Jiayi Lyu,Feng Zheng,Yefeng Zheng,Yaochu Jin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Md Rashedur Rahman,Elizabeth Miller,Moinul Hossain,Aisha Ali-Gombe
title: Intent-Aware Permission Architecture: A Model for Rethinking Informed Consent for Android Apps
title_zh: 意图感知权限架构：重新思考 Android 应用知情同意的模型
comment: 11 pages, 5 Figures,The International Conference on Information Systems Security and Privacy-ICISSP 2022
comments: 11 pages, 5 Figures,The International Conference on Information Systems Security and Privacy-ICISSP 2022
abstract: As data privacy continues to be a crucial human-right concern as recognized by the UN, regulatory agencies have demanded developers obtain user permission before accessing user-sensitive data. Mainly through the use of privacy policies statements, developers fulfill their legal requirements to keep users abreast of the requests for their data. In addition, platforms such as Android enforces explicit permission request using the permission model. Nonetheless, recent research has shown that service providers hardly make full disclosure when requesting data in these statements. Neither is the current permission model designed to provide adequate informed consent. Often users have no clear understanding of the reason and scope of usage of the data request. This paper proposes an unambiguous, informed consent process that provides developers with a standardized method for declaring Intent. Our proposed Intent-aware permission architecture extends the current Android permission model with a precise mechanism for full disclosure of purpose and scope limitation. The design of which is based on an ontology study of data requests purposes. The overarching objective of this model is to ensure end-users are adequately informed before making decisions on their data. Additionally, this model has the potential to improve trust between end-users and developers.
summary: As data privacy continues to be a crucial human-right concern as recognized by the UN, regulatory agencies have demanded developers obtain user permission before accessing user-sensitive data. Mainly through the use of privacy policies statements, developers fulfill their legal requirements to keep users abreast of the requests for their data. In addition, platforms such as Android enforces explicit permission request using the permission model. Nonetheless, recent research has shown that service providers hardly make full disclosure when requesting data in these statements. Neither is the current permission model designed to provide adequate informed consent. Often users have no clear understanding of the reason and scope of usage of the data request. This paper proposes an unambiguous, informed consent process that provides developers with a standardized method for declaring Intent. Our proposed Intent-aware permission architecture extends the current Android permission model with a precise mechanism for full disclosure of purpose and scope limitation. The design of which is based on an ontology study of data requests purposes. The overarching objective of this model is to ensure end-users are adequately informed before making decisions on their data. Additionally, this model has the potential to improve trust between end-users and developers.
abstract_zh: 由于数据隐私仍然是联合国认识到的一个重要的人权问题，监管机构要求开发者在访问用户敏感数据之前获得用户许可。开发人员主要通过使用隐私政策声明来满足其法律要求，以使用户及时了解对其数据的请求。此外，Android 等平台使用权限模型强制执行显式权限请求。尽管如此，最近的研究表明，服务提供商在请求这些声明中的数据时很难完全披露。当前的许可模式也不是旨在提供充分的知情同意。用户常常不清楚数据请求的原因和使用范围。本文提出了一个明确的知情同意流程，为开发人员提供了声明意图的标准化方法。我们提出的意图感知权限架构通过精确的机制扩展了当前的 Android 权限模型，以充分公开目的和范围限制。其设计基于数据请求目的的本体研究。该模型的总体目标是确保最终用户在对其数据做出决策之前充分了解情况。此外，该模型还有可能提高最终用户和开发人员之间的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种意图感知的权限架构，旨在通过明确数据使用目的和范围来改进Android应用的知情同意流程。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私政策和Android权限模型无法充分披露数据请求的目的和范围，导致用户难以理解数据使用意图，影响隐私保护效果。
AI.method: 基于数据请求目的的本体研究，设计扩展Android权限模型的机制，通过标准化意图声明实现精确的用途和范围披露。
AI.result: 该模型使用户在授权前能清晰了解数据使用目的，提升用户对数据使用的知情权，并增强用户与开发者之间的信任。
AI.conclusion: 意图感知权限架构为开发者提供了标准化的意图声明方法，有效改善了用户知情同意的透明度和隐私保护水平。

authors_text: Yi Tay,Vinh Q. Tran,Mostafa Dehghani,Jianmo Ni,Dara Bahri,Harsh Mehta,Zhen Qin,Kai Hui,Zhe Zhao,Jai Gupta,Tal Schuster,William W. Cohen,Donald Metzler
title: Transformer Memory as a Differentiable Search Index
title_zh: Transformer 内存作为可微分搜索索引
abstract: In this paper, we demonstrate that information retrieval can be accomplished with a single Transformer, in which all information about the corpus is encoded in the parameters of the model. To this end, we introduce the Differentiable Search Index (DSI), a new paradigm that learns a text-to-text model that maps string queries directly to relevant docids; in other words, a DSI model answers queries directly using only its parameters, dramatically simplifying the whole retrieval process. We study variations in how documents and their identifiers are represented, variations in training procedures, and the interplay between models and corpus sizes. Experiments demonstrate that given appropriate design choices, DSI significantly outperforms strong baselines such as dual encoder models. Moreover, DSI demonstrates strong generalization capabilities, outperforming a BM25 baseline in a zero-shot setup.
summary: In this paper, we demonstrate that information retrieval can be accomplished with a single Transformer, in which all information about the corpus is encoded in the parameters of the model. To this end, we introduce the Differentiable Search Index (DSI), a new paradigm that learns a text-to-text model that maps string queries directly to relevant docids; in other words, a DSI model answers queries directly using only its parameters, dramatically simplifying the whole retrieval process. We study variations in how documents and their identifiers are represented, variations in training procedures, and the interplay between models and corpus sizes. Experiments demonstrate that given appropriate design choices, DSI significantly outperforms strong baselines such as dual encoder models. Moreover, DSI demonstrates strong generalization capabilities, outperforming a BM25 baseline in a zero-shot setup.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们证明可以使用单个 Transformer 来完成信息检索，其中有关语料库的所有信息都编码在模型的参数中。为此，我们引入了可区分搜索索引（DSI），这是一种新的范例，它学习文本到文本的模型，将字符串查询直接映射到相关的文档；换句话说，DSI 模型仅使用其参数直接回答查询，从而极大地简化了整个检索过程。我们研究文档及其标识符的表示方式的变化、训练程序的变化以及模型和语料库大小之间的相互作用。实验表明，如果选择适当的设计，DSI 的性能显着优于双编码器模型等强基线。此外，DSI 展示了强大的泛化能力，在零样本设置中优于 BM25 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Differentiable Search Index (DSI)的新范式，通过单个Transformer模型直接将查询映射到文档ID，实现信息检索。
AI.motivation: 传统检索系统依赖复杂索引结构，而DSI旨在将所有语料信息编码在模型参数中，简化检索流程并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计DSI模型，学习文本到文本的映射关系，直接输出相关文档ID；研究文档表示方式、训练策略及模型与语料规模的交互。
AI.result: DSI在合理设计下显著优于双编码器模型，在零样本场景下超越BM25基线，展现强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DSI通过参数化存储语料信息，有效简化检索流程，验证了其作为传统检索方法替代方案的可行性与优势。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Differentiable Search Index (DSI)的新范式，通过单个Transformer模型直接将查询映射到文档ID，实现信息检索。
motivation: 传统检索系统依赖复杂索引结构，而DSI旨在将所有语料信息编码在模型参数中，简化检索流程并提升效率。
method: 设计DSI模型，学习文本到文本的映射关系，直接输出相关文档ID；研究文档表示方式、训练策略及模型与语料规模的交互。
result: DSI在合理设计下显著优于双编码器模型，在零样本场景下超越BM25基线，展现强泛化能力。
conclusion: DSI通过参数化存储语料信息，有效简化检索流程，验证了其作为传统检索方法替代方案的可行性与优势。
search_text: Transformer Memory as a Differentiable Search Index Transformer 内存作为可微分搜索索引 In this paper, we demonstrate that information retrieval can be accomplished with a single Transformer, in which all information about the corpus is encoded in the parameters of the model. To this end, we introduce the Differentiable Search Index (DSI), a new paradigm that learns a text-to-text model that maps string queries directly to relevant docids; in other words, a DSI model answers queries directly using only its parameters, dramatically simplifying the whole retrieval process. We study variations in how documents and their identifiers are represented, variations in training procedures, and the interplay between models and corpus sizes. Experiments demonstrate that given appropriate design choices, DSI significantly outperforms strong baselines such as dual encoder models. Moreover, DSI demonstrates strong generalization capabilities, outperforming a BM25 baseline in a zero-shot setup. 在本文中，我们证明可以使用单个 Transformer 来完成信息检索，其中有关语料库的所有信息都编码在模型的参数中。为此，我们引入了可区分搜索索引（DSI），这是一种新的范例，它学习文本到文本的模型，将字符串查询直接映射到相关的文档；换句话说，DSI 模型仅使用其参数直接回答查询，从而极大地简化了整个检索过程。我们研究文档及其标识符的表示方式的变化、训练程序的变化以及模型和语料库大小之间的相互作用。实验表明，如果选择适当的设计，DSI 的性能显着优于双编码器模型等强基线。此外，DSI 展示了强大的泛化能力，在零样本设置中优于 BM25 基线。 本文提出了一种名为Differentiable Search Index (DSI)的新范式，通过单个Transformer模型直接将查询映射到文档ID，实现信息检索。 Yi Tay,Vinh Q. Tran,Mostafa Dehghani,Jianmo Ni,Dara Bahri,Harsh Mehta,Zhen Qin,Kai Hui,Zhe Zhao,Jai Gupta,Tal Schuster,William W. Cohen,Donald Metzler cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiasen Lu,Jordi Salvador,Roozbeh Mottaghi,Aniruddha Kembhavi
title: ASC me to Do Anything: Multi-task Training for Embodied AI
title_zh: ASC me to Do Anything：嵌入式人工智能的多任务训练
abstract: Embodied AI has seen steady progress across a diverse set of independent tasks. While these varied tasks have different end goals, the basic skills required to complete them successfully overlap significantly. In this paper, our goal is to leverage these shared skills to learn to perform multiple tasks jointly. We propose Atomic Skill Completion (ASC), an approach for multi-task training for Embodied AI, where a set of atomic skills shared across multiple tasks are composed together to perform the tasks. The key to the success of this approach is a pre-training scheme that decouples learning of the skills from the high-level tasks making joint training effective. We use ASC to train agents within the AI2-THOR environment to perform four interactive tasks jointly and find it to be remarkably effective. In a multi-task setting, ASC improves success rates by a factor of 2x on Seen scenes and 4x on Unseen scenes compared to no pre-training. Importantly, ASC enables us to train a multi-task agent that has a 52% higher Success Rate than training 4 independent single task agents. Finally, our hierarchical agents are more interpretable than traditional black-box architectures.
summary: Embodied AI has seen steady progress across a diverse set of independent tasks. While these varied tasks have different end goals, the basic skills required to complete them successfully overlap significantly. In this paper, our goal is to leverage these shared skills to learn to perform multiple tasks jointly. We propose Atomic Skill Completion (ASC), an approach for multi-task training for Embodied AI, where a set of atomic skills shared across multiple tasks are composed together to perform the tasks. The key to the success of this approach is a pre-training scheme that decouples learning of the skills from the high-level tasks making joint training effective. We use ASC to train agents within the AI2-THOR environment to perform four interactive tasks jointly and find it to be remarkably effective. In a multi-task setting, ASC improves success rates by a factor of 2x on Seen scenes and 4x on Unseen scenes compared to no pre-training. Importantly, ASC enables us to train a multi-task agent that has a 52% higher Success Rate than training 4 independent single task agents. Finally, our hierarchical agents are more interpretable than traditional black-box architectures.
abstract_zh: 嵌入式人工智能在一系列不同的独立任务中取得了稳步进展。虽然这些不同的任务有不同的最终目标，但成功完成这些任务所需的基本技能有很大重叠。在本文中，我们的目标是利用这些共享技能来学习联合执行多项任务。我们提出了原子技能完成（ASC），这是一种针对嵌入式人工智能的多任务训练方法，其中将多个任务共享的一组原子技能组合在一起来执行任务。这种方法成功的关键是预训练计划，该计划将技能学习与高级任务脱钩，从而使联合训练有效。我们使用 ASC 来训练 AI2-THOR 环境中的智能体联合执行四项交互任务，并发现其非常有效。在多任务设置中，与无预训练相比，ASC 在“Seen”场景中将成功率提高了 2 倍，在“Unseen”场景中将成功率提高了 4 倍。重要的是，ASC 使我们能够训练一个多任务智能体，其成功率比训练 4 个独立的单任务智能体高出 52%。最后，我们的分层代理比传统的黑盒架构更具可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Atomic Skill Completion (ASC)的多任务训练方法，用于具身AI，通过共享原子技能来联合完成多个任务。
AI.motivation: 具身AI中的不同任务虽目标各异，但所需基础技能高度重叠。传统方法未能有效利用这些共享技能，导致训练效率低下。
AI.method: 通过预训练方案分离原子技能与高层任务的学习，将共享技能组合以完成多任务，并在AI2-THOR环境中进行联合训练。
AI.result: ASC在已见场景中提升成功率2倍，在未知场景中提升4倍，且多任务代理的成功率比四个独立单任务代理高52%。
AI.conclusion: ASC通过利用共享原子技能显著提升了具身AI的多任务学习效果，并增强了模型的可解释性。

authors_text: Dazhuang Liu,Marco Virgolin,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman
title: Evolvability Degeneration in Multi-Objective Genetic Programming for Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 符号回归多目标遗传规划中的进化性退化
abstract: Genetic programming (GP) is one of the best approaches today to discover symbolic regression models. To find models that trade off accuracy and complexity, the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) is widely used. Unfortunately, it has been shown that NSGA-II can be inefficient: in early generations, low-complexity models over-replicate and take over most of the population. Consequently, studies have proposed different approaches to promote diversity. Here, we study the root of this problem, in order to design a superior approach. We find that the over-replication of low complexity-models is due to a lack of evolvability, i.e., the inability to produce offspring with improved accuracy. We therefore extend NSGA-II to track, over time, the evolvability of models of different levels of complexity. With this information, we limit how many models of each complexity level are allowed to survive the generation. We compare this new version of NSGA-II, evoNSGA-II, with the use of seven existing multi-objective GP approaches on ten widely-used data sets, and find that evoNSGA-II is equal or superior to using these approaches in almost all comparisons. Furthermore, our results confirm that evoNSGA-II behaves as intended: models that are more evolvable form the majority of the population.
summary: Genetic programming (GP) is one of the best approaches today to discover symbolic regression models. To find models that trade off accuracy and complexity, the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) is widely used. Unfortunately, it has been shown that NSGA-II can be inefficient: in early generations, low-complexity models over-replicate and take over most of the population. Consequently, studies have proposed different approaches to promote diversity. Here, we study the root of this problem, in order to design a superior approach. We find that the over-replication of low complexity-models is due to a lack of evolvability, i.e., the inability to produce offspring with improved accuracy. We therefore extend NSGA-II to track, over time, the evolvability of models of different levels of complexity. With this information, we limit how many models of each complexity level are allowed to survive the generation. We compare this new version of NSGA-II, evoNSGA-II, with the use of seven existing multi-objective GP approaches on ten widely-used data sets, and find that evoNSGA-II is equal or superior to using these approaches in almost all comparisons. Furthermore, our results confirm that evoNSGA-II behaves as intended: models that are more evolvable form the majority of the population.
abstract_zh: 遗传编程（GP）是当今发现符号回归模型的最佳方法之一。为了找到兼顾准确性和复杂性的模型，非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 被广泛使用。不幸的是，事实证明 NSGA-II 可能效率低下：在早期几代中，低复杂度模型过度复制并接管了大多数群体。因此，研究提出了促进多样性的不同方法。在这里，我们研究这个问题的根源，以便设计一种更好的方法。我们发现低复杂度模型的过度复制是由于缺乏进化性，即无法产生精度更高的后代。因此，我们扩展了 NSGA-II，以随着时间的推移跟踪不同复杂程度模型的演化性。有了这些信息，我们就可以限制每个复杂级别的模型数量可以在一代中存活下来。我们将 NSGA-II 的新版本 evoNSGA-II 与在十个广泛使用的数据集上使用七种现有的多目标 GP 方法进行比较，发现 evoNSGA-II 在几乎所有比较中都等于或优于使用这些方法。此外，我们的结果证实了 evoNSGA-II 的行为符合预期：模型在大多数人群中更具进化性。

AI.tldr: 研究多目标遗传规划中符号回归的可进化性退化问题，并提出改进算法以提升模型多样性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有NSGA-II在符号回归中因低复杂度模型过度复制导致多样性不足，影响算法效率与模型质量。
AI.method: 扩展NSGA-II以跟踪不同复杂度模型的可进化性，并根据其演化能力动态调整种群中各复杂度模型的存活数量。
AI.result: evoNSGA-II在十个数据集上的表现优于或等于现有七种多目标GP方法，且验证了其维持高可进化性模型主导种群的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态调控模型复杂度与可进化性，evoNSGA-II有效缓解了多目标符号回归中的可进化性退化问题，提升了算法性能。

authors_text: Raluca Jalaboi,Frederik Faye,Mauricio Orbes-Arteaga,Dan Jørgensen,Ole Winther,Alfiia Galimzianova
title: DermX: an end-to-end framework for explainable automated dermatological diagnosis
title_zh: DermX：可解释的自动化皮肤病诊断的端到端框架
abstract: Dermatological diagnosis automation is essential in addressing the high prevalence of skin diseases and critical shortage of dermatologists. Despite approaching expert-level diagnosis performance, convolutional neural network (ConvNet) adoption in clinical practice is impeded by their limited explainability, and by subjective, expensive explainability validations. We introduce DermX and DermX+, an end-to-end framework for explainable automated dermatological diagnosis. DermX is a clinically-inspired explainable dermatological diagnosis ConvNet, trained using DermXDB, a 554 image dataset annotated by eight dermatologists with diagnoses, supporting explanations, and explanation attention maps. DermX+ extends DermX with guided attention training for explanation attention maps. Both methods achieve near-expert diagnosis performance, with DermX, DermX+, and dermatologist F1 scores of 0.79, 0.79, and 0.87, respectively. We assess the explanation performance in terms of identification and localization by comparing model-selected with dermatologist-selected explanations, and gradient-weighted class-activation maps with dermatologist explanation maps, respectively. DermX obtained an identification F1 score of 0.77, while DermX+ obtained 0.79. The localization F1 score is 0.39 for DermX and 0.35 for DermX+. These results show that explainability does not necessarily come at the expense of predictive power, as our high-performance models provide expert-inspired explanations for their diagnoses without lowering their diagnosis performance.

We introduce DermX and DermX+, an end-to-end framework for explainable automated dermatological diagnosis. DermX+ extends DermX with guided attention training for explanation attention maps. Both methods achieve near-expert diagnosis performance, with DermX, DermX+, and dermatologist F1 scores of 0.79, 0.79, and 0.87, respectively. We assess the explanation performance in terms of identification and localization by comparing model-selected with dermatologist-selected explanations, and gradient-weighted class-activation maps with dermatologist explanation maps, respectively. DermX obtained an identification F1 score of 0.77, while DermX+ obtained 0.79. The localization F1 score is 0.39 for DermX and 0.35 for DermX+. These results show that explainability does not necessarily come at the expense of predictive power, as our high-performance models provide expert-inspired explanations for their diagnoses without lowering their diagnosis performance.
abstract_zh: 皮肤病诊断自动化对于解决皮肤病的高发病率和皮肤科医生的严重短缺问题至关重要。尽管接近专家级的诊断性能，但卷积神经网络 (ConvNet) 在临床实践中的采用因其有限的可解释性以及主观且昂贵的可解释性验证而受到阻碍。我们推出 DermX 和 DermX+，这是一种用于可解释的自动化皮肤病诊断的端到端框架。 DermX 是一种受临床启发的可解释皮肤病诊断 ConvNet，使用 DermXDB 进行训练，DermXDB 是一个由 8 名皮肤科医生注释的 554 个图像数据集，包含诊断、支持解释和解释注意图。 DermX+ 通过引导注意力训练来扩展 DermX，以解释注意力图。两种方法都实现了接近专家的诊断性能，DermX、DermX+ 和皮肤科医生 F1 分数分别为 0.79、0.79 和 0.87。我们通过分别比较模型选择与皮肤科医生选择的解释，以及梯度加权类激活图与皮肤科医生解释图来评估识别和定位方面的解释性能。 DermX 获得的识别 F1 分数为 0.77，而 DermX+ 获得了 0.79。 DermX 的本地化 F1 分数为 0.39，DermX+ 的本地化 F1 分数为 0.35。这些结果表明，可解释性并不一定以牺牲预测能力为代价，因为我们的高性能模型为他们的诊断提供了专家启发的解释，而不会降低他们的诊断性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DermX和DermX+框架，实现皮肤病自动诊断的可解释性与诊断性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络在皮肤病诊断中面临可解释性不足及验证成本高的问题，阻碍其临床应用。
AI.method: 构建DermXDB数据集（含554张皮肤镜图像及专家标注），开发DermX（基于临床启发的可解释卷积网络）和DermX+（增加引导注意力训练机制）双框架。
AI.result: 诊断F1分数达0.79（DermX/DermX+） vs 0.87（专家）；解释识别F1分数0.77/0.79，定位F1分数0.39/0.35。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性与诊断性能可兼得，模型生成的专家启发式解释未降低诊断准确率。

authors_text: Jian Cui,Liqiang Yuan,Zhaoxiang Wang,Ruilin Li,Tianzi Jiang
title: Towards Best Practice of Interpreting Deep Learning Models for EEG-based Brain Computer Interfaces
title_zh: 走向解释基于脑电图的脑机接口的深度学习模型的最佳实践
abstract: As deep learning has achieved state-of-the-art performance for many tasks of EEG-based BCI, many efforts have been made in recent years trying to understand what have been learned by the models. This is commonly done by generating a heatmap indicating to which extent each pixel of the input contributes to the final classification for a trained model. Despite the wide use, it is not yet understood to which extent the obtained interpretation results can be trusted and how accurate they can reflect the model decisions. In order to fill this research gap, we conduct a study to evaluate different deep interpretation techniques quantitatively on EEG datasets. The results reveal the importance of selecting a proper interpretation technique as the initial step. In addition, we also find that the quality of the interpretation results is inconsistent for individual samples despite when a method with an overall good performance is used. Many factors, including model structure and dataset types, could potentially affect the quality of the interpretation results. Based on the observations, we propose a set of procedures that allow the interpretation results to be presented in an understandable and trusted way. We illustrate the usefulness of our method for EEG-based BCI with instances selected from different scenarios.
summary: As deep learning has achieved state-of-the-art performance for many tasks of EEG-based BCI, many efforts have been made in recent years trying to understand what have been learned by the models. This is commonly done by generating a heatmap indicating to which extent each pixel of the input contributes to the final classification for a trained model. Despite the wide use, it is not yet understood to which extent the obtained interpretation results can be trusted and how accurate they can reflect the model decisions. In order to fill this research gap, we conduct a study to evaluate different deep interpretation techniques quantitatively on EEG datasets. The results reveal the importance of selecting a proper interpretation technique as the initial step. In addition, we also find that the quality of the interpretation results is inconsistent for individual samples despite when a method with an overall good performance is used. Many factors, including model structure and dataset types, could potentially affect the quality of the interpretation results. Based on the observations, we propose a set of procedures that allow the interpretation results to be presented in an understandable and trusted way. We illustrate the usefulness of our method for EEG-based BCI with instances selected from different scenarios.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习已经在基于脑电图的脑机接口的许多任务中取得了最先进的性能，因此近年来人们做出了许多努力来试图理解模型学到了什么。这通常是通过生成热图来完成的，该热图指示输入的每个像素对训练模型的最终分类的贡献程度。尽管使用广泛，但尚不清楚所获得的解释结果在多大程度上可以被信任以及它们能够反映模型决策的准确性。为了填补这一研究空白，我们进行了一项研究，在脑电图数据集上定量评估不同的深度解释技术。结果揭示了选择正确的解释技术作为第一步的重要性。此外，我们还发现，尽管使用总体性能良好的方法，但各个样本的解释结果质量不一致。许多因素，包括模型结构和数据集类型，可能会影响解释结果的质量。根据观察结果，我们提出了一套程序，允许以可理解和可信的方式呈现解释结果。我们通过从不同场景中选择的实例来说明我们的方法对于基于脑电图的 BCI 的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估不同深度解释技术在EEG-based BCI中的有效性，并提出提高解释结果可信度和可理解性的最佳实践方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在EEG-based BCI中表现优异，但现有解释方法的可信度和准确性尚未明确，需通过定量研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对多种深度解释技术进行定量评估，分析模型结构和数据集类型等因素对解释结果的影响，并提出一套标准化的解释流程。
AI.result: 发现解释结果质量因样本和方法而异，模型结构和数据集类型显著影响解释效果，提出的方法能有效提升解释的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 通过选择合适解释方法和标准化流程，可增强EEG-based BCI模型决策的透明性与可信度，为后续研究提供实践指导。

authors_text: Eduardo Benitez Sandoval,Diego Vazquez Rojas,Clarissa A. Parada Cereceres,Alvaro Anzueto Rios,Amit Barde,Mark Billinghurst
title: Prototyping a Virtual Agent for Pre-school English Teaching
title_zh: 学前英语教学虚拟代理原型设计
comment: Accepted in the IEEE Virtual Reality Conference 2022, Christchurch, New Zealand
comments: Accepted in the IEEE Virtual Reality Conference 2022, Christchurch, New Zealand
abstract: This paper describes a case study and the insights gained from prototyping an Intelligent Virtual Agent (IVA) for English vocabulary building for Spanish-speaking preschool children. After an initial exploration to evaluate the feasibility of developing an IVA, we followed a Human-Centered Design (HCD) approach to create a prototype. We report on the multidisciplinary process used that incorporated two well-known educative concepts: gamification and story-telling as the main components for engagement. Our results suggest that a multidisciplinary approach to developing an educational IVA is effective. We report on the relevant aspects of the ideation and design processes that informed the vision and mission of the project.
summary: This paper describes a case study and the insights gained from prototyping an Intelligent Virtual Agent (IVA) for English vocabulary building for Spanish-speaking preschool children. After an initial exploration to evaluate the feasibility of developing an IVA, we followed a Human-Centered Design (HCD) approach to create a prototype. We report on the multidisciplinary process used that incorporated two well-known educative concepts: gamification and story-telling as the main components for engagement. Our results suggest that a multidisciplinary approach to developing an educational IVA is effective. We report on the relevant aspects of the ideation and design processes that informed the vision and mission of the project.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个案例研究以及通过为西班牙语学龄前儿童建立英语词汇量构建智能虚拟代理 (IVA) 原型而获得的见解。经过初步探索评估开发 IVA 的可行性后，我们遵循以人为本的设计 (HCD) 方法来创建原型。我们报告了所使用的多学科过程，该过程结合了两个众所周知的教育概念：游戏化和讲故事作为参与的主要组成部分。我们的结果表明，采用多学科方法来开发教育型 IVA 是有效的。我们报告构思和设计过程的相关方面，这些方面体现了项目的愿景和使命。

AI.tldr: 设计并开发一个用于西班牙语学龄前儿童英语词汇教学的智能虚拟代理（IVA）原型。
AI.motivation: 探索通过智能虚拟代理提升西班牙语学龄前儿童英语词汇学习效果的可行性，并开发有效教学工具。
AI.method: 采用以用户为中心的设计方法，结合游戏化和故事讲述作为核心互动元素，进行多学科协作开发。
AI.result: 验证了多学科方法在教育IVA开发中的有效性，并明确了设计过程中关键环节对项目愿景与使命的影响。

search_text: Prototyping a Virtual Agent for Pre-school English Teaching 学前英语教学虚拟代理原型设计 This paper describes a case study and the insights gained from prototyping an Intelligent Virtual Agent (IVA) for English vocabulary building for Spanish-speaking preschool children. After an initial exploration to evaluate the feasibility of developing an IVA, we followed a Human-Centered Design (HCD) approach to create a prototype. We report on the multidisciplinary process used that incorporated two well-known educative concepts: gamification and story-telling as the main components for engagement. Our results suggest that a multidisciplinary approach to developing an educational IVA is effective. We report on the relevant aspects of the ideation and design processes that informed the vision and mission of the project. 本文介绍了一个案例研究以及通过为西班牙语学龄前儿童建立英语词汇量构建智能虚拟代理 (IVA) 原型而获得的见解。经过初步探索评估开发 IVA 的可行性后，我们遵循以人为本的设计 (HCD) 方法来创建原型。我们报告了所使用的多学科过程，该过程结合了两个众所周知的教育概念：游戏化和讲故事作为参与的主要组成部分。我们的结果表明，采用多学科方法来开发教育型 IVA 是有效的。我们报告构思和设计过程的相关方面，这些方面体现了项目的愿景和使命。 设计并开发一个用于西班牙语学龄前儿童英语词汇教学的智能虚拟代理（IVA）原型。 Eduardo Benitez Sandoval,Diego Vazquez Rojas,Clarissa A. Parada Cereceres,Alvaro Anzueto Rios,Amit Barde,Mark Billinghurst cs.HC

authors_text: Uday K. Chakraborty
title: Stochastic models of Jaya and semi-steady-state Jaya algorithms
title_zh: Jaya 的随机模型和半稳态 Jaya 算法
abstract: We build stochastic models for analyzing Jaya and semi-steady-state Jaya algorithms. The analysis shows that for semi-steady-state Jaya (a) the maximum expected value of the number of worst-index updates per generation is a paltry 1.7 regardless of the population size; (b) regardless of the population size, the expectation of the number of best-index updates per generation decreases monotonically with generations; (c) exact upper bounds as well as asymptotics of the expected best-update counts can be obtained for specific distributions; the upper bound is 0.5 for normal and logistic distributions, $\ln 2$ for the uniform distribution, and $e^{-γ} \ln 2$ for the exponential distribution, where $γ$ is the Euler-Mascheroni constant; the asymptotic is $e^{-γ} \ln 2$ for logistic and exponential distributions and $\ln 2$ for the uniform distribution (the asymptotic cannot be obtained analytically for the normal distribution). The models lead to the derivation of computational complexities of Jaya and semi-steady-state Jaya. The theoretical analysis is supported with empirical results on a benchmark suite. The insights provided by our stochastic models should help design new, improved population-based search/optimization heuristics.
summary: We build stochastic models for analyzing Jaya and semi-steady-state Jaya algorithms. The analysis shows that for semi-steady-state Jaya (a) the maximum expected value of the number of worst-index updates per generation is a paltry 1.7 regardless of the population size; (b) regardless of the population size, the expectation of the number of best-index updates per generation decreases monotonically with generations; (c) exact upper bounds as well as asymptotics of the expected best-update counts can be obtained for specific distributions; the upper bound is 0.5 for normal and logistic distributions, $\ln 2$ for the uniform distribution, and $e^{-γ} \ln 2$ for the exponential distribution, where $γ$ is the Euler-Mascheroni constant; the asymptotic is $e^{-γ} \ln 2$ for logistic and exponential distributions and $\ln 2$ for the uniform distribution (the asymptotic cannot be obtained analytically for the normal distribution). The models lead to the derivation of computational complexities of Jaya and semi-steady-state Jaya. The theoretical analysis is supported with empirical results on a benchmark suite. The insights provided by our stochastic models should help design new, improved population-based search/optimization heuristics.
abstract_zh: 我们构建随机模型来分析 Jaya 和半稳态 Jaya 算法。分析表明，对于半稳态 Jaya (a)，无论人口规模如何，每代最差索引更新次数的最大期望值都是微不足道的 1.7； (b) 无论人口规模如何，每代最佳指数更新数量的预期随着代数的增加而单调减少； (c) 可以获得特定分布的精确上限以及预期最佳更新计数的渐近；对于正态分布和 Logistic 分布，上限为 0.5；对于均匀分布，上限为 $\ln 2$；对于指数分布，上限为 $e^{-γ} \ln 2$，其中 $γ$ 是 Euler-Mascheroni 常数；对于逻辑分布和指数分布，渐近线为 $e^{-γ} \ln 2$；对于均匀分布，渐近线为 $\ln 2$（对于正态分布，渐近线无法通过分析获得）。该模型推导了 Jaya 和半稳态 Jaya 的计算复杂性。理论分析得到了基准套件的实证结果的支持。我们的随机模型提供的见解应该有助于设计新的、改进的基于人群的搜索/优化启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了Jaya算法及其半稳态版本的随机模型，以分析其更新机制和计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 通过理论分析揭示Jaya算法的内在行为规律，为改进群体搜索/优化启发式方法提供依据。
AI.method: 建立随机模型并进行理论分析，结合基准测试套件的实证结果，研究不同分布下的最佳更新次数上界和渐进行为。
AI.result: 发现半稳态Jaya算法每代最差索引更新期望值上限为1.7，最佳索引更新期望值随代数单调递减；针对不同分布（正态、均匀、指数等）推导出精确上界和渐近值，如均匀分布上界为ln2，指数分布为e^{-γ}ln2。
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机模型为理解Jaya算法的收敛特性提供了理论支撑，并为设计更高效的优化算法提供了指导。

authors_text: Raphaël Aymeric,Yves Jaouën,Cédric Ware,Romain Alléaume
title: Symbiotic joint operation of quantum and classical coherent communications
title_zh: 量子与经典相干通信的共生联合运行
abstract: We report successful joint operation of quantum and classical communications with shared hardware. Leveraging information learned from the classical DSP, low-noise quantum communications (0.009 SNU at 15 km) compatible with 15 Mbit/s QKD is demonstrated.
summary: We report successful joint operation of quantum and classical communications with shared hardware. Leveraging information learned from the classical DSP, low-noise quantum communications (0.009 SNU at 15 km) compatible with 15 Mbit/s QKD is demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了量子通信和经典通信与共享硬件的成功联合运行。利用从经典 DSP 学到的信息，演示了与 15 Mbit/s QKD 兼容的低噪声量子通信（15 公里时为 0.009 SNU）。

AI.tldr: 本文展示了量子与经典通信系统的协同操作，通过共享硬件实现低噪声量子通信并兼容高速量子密钥分发（QKD）。
AI.motivation: 解决量子通信与经典通信系统间的兼容性问题，提升硬件资源利用率与通信效率。
AI.method: 利用经典数字信号处理（DSP）技术优化量子通信参数，通过共享硬件平台实现量子与经典信号的联合操作。
AI.result: 在15公里距离下实现0.009 SNU的低噪声量子通信，同时支持15 Mbit/s的QKD速率。
AI.conclusion: 协同操作架构验证了量子与经典通信系统的兼容性，为未来集成化量子通信网络提供了技术基础。

authors_text: Sebastian Gehrmann,Elizabeth Clark,Thibault Sellam
title: Repairing the Cracked Foundation: A Survey of Obstacles in Evaluation Practices for Generated Text
title_zh: 修复破裂的基础：生成文本评估实践中的障碍调查
abstract: Evaluation practices in natural language generation (NLG) have many known flaws, but improved evaluation approaches are rarely widely adopted. This issue has become more urgent, since neural NLG models have improved to the point where they can often no longer be distinguished based on the surface-level features that older metrics rely on. This paper surveys the issues with human and automatic model evaluations and with commonly used datasets in NLG that have been pointed out over the past 20 years. We summarize, categorize, and discuss how researchers have been addressing these issues and what their findings mean for the current state of model evaluations. Building on those insights, we lay out a long-term vision for NLG evaluation and propose concrete steps for researchers to improve their evaluation processes. Finally, we analyze 66 NLG papers from recent NLP conferences in how well they already follow these suggestions and identify which areas require more drastic changes to the status quo.
summary: Evaluation practices in natural language generation (NLG) have many known flaws, but improved evaluation approaches are rarely widely adopted. This issue has become more urgent, since neural NLG models have improved to the point where they can often no longer be distinguished based on the surface-level features that older metrics rely on. This paper surveys the issues with human and automatic model evaluations and with commonly used datasets in NLG that have been pointed out over the past 20 years. We summarize, categorize, and discuss how researchers have been addressing these issues and what their findings mean for the current state of model evaluations. Building on those insights, we lay out a long-term vision for NLG evaluation and propose concrete steps for researchers to improve their evaluation processes. Finally, we analyze 66 NLG papers from recent NLP conferences in how well they already follow these suggestions and identify which areas require more drastic changes to the status quo.
abstract_zh: 自然语言生成（NLG）中的评估实践有许多已知的缺陷，但改进的评估方法很少被广泛采用。这个问题变得更加紧迫，因为神经 NLG 模型已经改进到通常无法再根据旧指标所依赖的表面特征进行区分的程度。本文调查了过去 20 年来指出的人工和自动模型评估以及 NLG 中常用数据集的问题。我们总结、分类并讨论研究人员如何解决这些问题以及他们的发现对模型评估的当前状态意味着什么。基于这些见解，我们为 NLG 评估制定了长期愿景，并为研究人员提出了改进评估流程的具体步骤。最后，我们分析了最近 NLP 会议上的 66 篇 NLG 论文，了解它们对这些建议的遵循情况，并确定哪些领域需要对现状进行更彻底的改变。

AI.tldr: 调查生成文本评估中的主要障碍，并提出改进评估方法的建议。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法存在缺陷，无法有效评估现代神经NLG模型，亟需改进评估实践。
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结评估问题与解决方案，并分析近期NLP会议论文的评估实践。
AI.result: 识别出评估中的关键问题，提出改进框架，并发现当前研究在评估方法上仍有较大改进空间。

search_text: Repairing the Cracked Foundation: A Survey of Obstacles in Evaluation Practices for Generated Text 修复破裂的基础：生成文本评估实践中的障碍调查 Evaluation practices in natural language generation (NLG) have many known flaws, but improved evaluation approaches are rarely widely adopted. This issue has become more urgent, since neural NLG models have improved to the point where they can often no longer be distinguished based on the surface-level features that older metrics rely on. This paper surveys the issues with human and automatic model evaluations and with commonly used datasets in NLG that have been pointed out over the past 20 years. We summarize, categorize, and discuss how researchers have been addressing these issues and what their findings mean for the current state of model evaluations. Building on those insights, we lay out a long-term vision for NLG evaluation and propose concrete steps for researchers to improve their evaluation processes. Finally, we analyze 66 NLG papers from recent NLP conferences in how well they already follow these suggestions and identify which areas require more drastic changes to the status quo. 自然语言生成（NLG）中的评估实践有许多已知的缺陷，但改进的评估方法很少被广泛采用。这个问题变得更加紧迫，因为神经 NLG 模型已经改进到通常无法再根据旧指标所依赖的表面特征进行区分的程度。本文调查了过去 20 年来指出的人工和自动模型评估以及 NLG 中常用数据集的问题。我们总结、分类并讨论研究人员如何解决这些问题以及他们的发现对模型评估的当前状态意味着什么。基于这些见解，我们为 NLG 评估制定了长期愿景，并为研究人员提出了改进评估流程的具体步骤。最后，我们分析了最近 NLP 会议上的 66 篇 NLG 论文，了解它们对这些建议的遵循情况，并确定哪些领域需要对现状进行更彻底的改变。 调查生成文本评估中的主要障碍，并提出改进评估方法的建议。 Sebastian Gehrmann,Elizabeth Clark,Thibault Sellam cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Fatih Cagatay Akyon,Sinan Onur Altinuc,Alptekin Temizel
title: Slicing Aided Hyper Inference and Fine-tuning for Small Object Detection
title_zh: 用于小物体检测的切片辅助超推理和微调
comment: Presented at ICIP 2022, 5 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
comments: Presented at ICIP 2022, 5 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Detection of small objects and objects far away in the scene is a major challenge in surveillance applications. Such objects are represented by small number of pixels in the image and lack sufficient details, making them difficult to detect using conventional detectors. In this work, an open-source framework called Slicing Aided Hyper Inference (SAHI) is proposed that provides a generic slicing aided inference and fine-tuning pipeline for small object detection. The proposed technique is generic in the sense that it can be applied on top of any available object detector without any fine-tuning. Experimental evaluations, using object detection baselines on the Visdrone and xView aerial object detection datasets show that the proposed inference method can increase object detection AP by 6.8%, 5.1% and 5.3% for FCOS, VFNet and TOOD detectors, respectively. Moreover, the detection accuracy can be further increased with a slicing aided fine-tuning, resulting in a cumulative increase of 12.7%, 13.4% and 14.5% AP in the same order. Proposed technique has been integrated with Detectron2, MMDetection and YOLOv5 models and it is publicly available at https://github.com/obss/sahi.git .
summary: Detection of small objects and objects far away in the scene is a major challenge in surveillance applications. Such objects are represented by small number of pixels in the image and lack sufficient details, making them difficult to detect using conventional detectors. In this work, an open-source framework called Slicing Aided Hyper Inference (SAHI) is proposed that provides a generic slicing aided inference and fine-tuning pipeline for small object detection. The proposed technique is generic in the sense that it can be applied on top of any available object detector without any fine-tuning. Experimental evaluations, using object detection baselines on the Visdrone and xView aerial object detection datasets show that the proposed inference method can increase object detection AP by 6.8%, 5.1% and 5.3% for FCOS, VFNet and TOOD detectors, respectively. Moreover, the detection accuracy can be further increased with a slicing aided fine-tuning, resulting in a cumulative increase of 12.7%, 13.4% and 14.5% AP in the same order. Proposed technique has been integrated with Detectron2, MMDetection and YOLOv5 models and it is publicly available at https://github.com/obss/sahi.git .
abstract_zh: 检测场景中的小物体和远处物体是监控应用中的主要挑战。此类物体由图像中的少量像素表示，并且缺乏足够的细节，使得使用传统检测器难以检测到它们。在这项工作中，提出了一种名为切片辅助超推理（SAHI）的开源框架，它为小物体检测提供通用的切片辅助推理和微调管道。所提出的技术是通用的，因为它可以应用在任何可用的物体检测器之上，而无需任何微调。使用 Visdrone 和 xView 航空目标检测数据集上的目标检测基线进行的实验评估表明，所提出的推理方法可以将 FCOS、VFNet 和 TOOD 检测器的目标检测 AP 分别提高 6.8%、5.1% 和 5.3%。此外，通过切片辅助微调可以进一步提高检测精度，导致AP按顺序累计增加12.7%、13.4%和14.5%。所提出的技术已与 Detectron2、MMDetection 和 YOLOv5 模型集成，并可在 https://github.com/obss/sahi.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAHI的开源框架，通过切片辅助超推理和微调技术提升小物体检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统检测器在像素稀疏的小物体和远距离物体检测中表现不佳，缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计通用切片辅助推理与微调流程，无需模型调整即可适配任意检测器，并集成至Detectron2等主流框架。
AI.result: 在Visdrone和xView数据集上，FCOS/VFNet/TOOD检测器AP分别提升6.8%/5.1%/5.3%；结合微调后累计提升达12.7%/13.4%/14.5%。
AI.conclusion: SAHI通过切片增强技术显著提升小物体检测精度，且具有良好的框架兼容性与开源可扩展性。

authors_text: Siobhan Duncan,Gissell Estrada-Rodriguez,Jakub Stocek,Mauro Dragone,Patricia A. Vargas,Heiko Gimperlein
title: Efficient quantitative assessment of robot swarms: coverage and targeting Lévy strategies
title_zh: 机器人群的有效定量评估：覆盖范围和目标 Lévy 策略
comment: 28 pages, 11 figures, to appear in Bioinspiration & Biomimetics
comments: 28 pages, 11 figures, to appear in Bioinspiration & Biomimetics
abstract: Biologically inspired strategies have long been adapted to swarm robotic systems, including biased random walks, reaction to chemotactic cues and long-range coordination. In this paper we apply analysis tools developed for modeling biological systems, such as continuum descriptions, to the efficient quantitative characterization of robot swarms. As an illustration, both Brownian and Lévy strategies with a characteristic long-range movement are discussed. As a result we obtain computationally fast methods for the optimization of robot movement laws to achieve a prescribed collective behavior. We show how to compute performance metrics like coverage and hitting times, and illustrate the accuracy and efficiency of our approach for area coverage and search problems. Comparisons between the continuum model and robotic simulations confirm the quantitative agreement and speed up of our approach. Results confirm and quantify the advantage of Lévy strategies over Brownian motion for search and area coverage problems in swarm robotics.
summary: Biologically inspired strategies have long been adapted to swarm robotic systems, including biased random walks, reaction to chemotactic cues and long-range coordination. In this paper we apply analysis tools developed for modeling biological systems, such as continuum descriptions, to the efficient quantitative characterization of robot swarms. As an illustration, both Brownian and Lévy strategies with a characteristic long-range movement are discussed. As a result we obtain computationally fast methods for the optimization of robot movement laws to achieve a prescribed collective behavior. We show how to compute performance metrics like coverage and hitting times, and illustrate the accuracy and efficiency of our approach for area coverage and search problems. Comparisons between the continuum model and robotic simulations confirm the quantitative agreement and speed up of our approach. Results confirm and quantify the advantage of Lévy strategies over Brownian motion for search and area coverage problems in swarm robotics.
abstract_zh: 受生物学启发的策略长期以来一直适用于群体机器人系统，包括有偏差的随机游走、对趋化信号的反应和远程协调。在本文中，我们应用为生物系统建模而开发的分析工具（例如连续描述）来对机器人群进行有效的定量表征。作为说明，我们讨论了具有特征性远程运动的布朗策略和列维策略。因此，我们获得了用于优化机器人运动规律的快速计算方法，以实现规定的集体行为。我们展示了如何计算覆盖范围和命中时间等性能指标，并说明了我们针对区域覆盖和搜索问题的方法的准确性和效率。连续模型和机器人模拟之间的比较证实了我们的方法的定量一致性和速度。结果证实并量化了 Lévy 策略相对于布朗运动在群体机器人搜索和区域覆盖问题上的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用连续体模型对机器人集群的覆盖和搜索策略进行高效定量评估，重点比较布朗运动与Lévy策略的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 生物启发的机器人集群策略缺乏高效的定量分析工具，需开发快速优化方法以实现特定集体行为并提升搜索与覆盖效率。
AI.method: 应用生物系统建模工具（如连续体描述），通过计算覆盖度、命中时间等指标，结合连续模型与机器人仿真对比验证方法准确性与效率。
AI.result: 连续模型与仿真结果定量一致且计算加速，证实Lévy策略在搜索与覆盖任务中优于布朗运动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人集群行为优化提供理论支持，Lévy策略在复杂环境搜索中具有显著优势。

We show how to compute performance metrics like coverage and hitting times, and illustrate the accuracy and efficiency of our approach for area coverage and search problems. Comparisons between the continuum model and robotic simulations confirm the quantitative agreement and speed up of our approach. Results confirm and quantify the advantage of Lévy strategies over Brownian motion for search and area coverage problems in swarm robotics. 受生物学启发的策略长期以来一直适用于群体机器人系统，包括有偏差的随机游走、对趋化信号的反应和远程协调。在本文中，我们应用为生物系统建模而开发的分析工具（例如连续描述）来对机器人群进行有效的定量表征。作为说明，我们讨论了具有特征性远程运动的布朗策略和列维策略。因此，我们获得了用于优化机器人运动规律的快速计算方法，以实现规定的集体行为。我们展示了如何计算覆盖范围和命中时间等性能指标，并说明了我们针对区域覆盖和搜索问题的方法的准确性和效率。连续模型和机器人模拟之间的比较证实了我们的方法的定量一致性和速度。结果证实并量化了 Lévy 策略相对于布朗运动在群体机器人搜索和区域覆盖问题上的优势。 本文提出利用连续体模型对机器人集群的覆盖和搜索策略进行高效定量评估，重点比较布朗运动与Lévy策略的性能差异。 Siobhan Duncan,Gissell Estrada-Rodriguez,Jakub Stocek,Mauro Dragone,Patricia A. Vargas,Heiko Gimperlein cs.RO,nlin.AO

authors_text: Tesshu Hanaka,Michael Lampis
title: Hedonic Games and Treewidth Revisited
title_zh: 重温享乐游戏和 Treewidth
abstract: We revisit the complexity of the well-studied notion of Additively Separable Hedonic Games (ASHGs). Such games model a basic clustering or coalition formation scenario in which selfish agents are represented by the vertices of an edge-weighted digraph $G=(V,E)$, and the weight of an arc $uv$ denotes the utility $u$ gains by being in the same coalition as $v$. We focus on (arguably) the most basic stability question about such a game: given a graph, does a Nash stable solution exist and can we find it efficiently? We study the (parameterized) complexity of ASHG stability when the underlying graph has treewidth $t$ and maximum degree $Δ$. The current best FPT algorithm for this case was claimed by Peters [AAAI 2016], with time complexity roughly $2^{O(Δ^5t)}$. We present an algorithm with parameter dependence $(Δt)^{O(Δt)}$, significantly improving upon the parameter dependence on $Δ$ given by Peters, albeit with a slightly worse dependence on $t$. Our main result is that this slight performance deterioration with respect to $t$ is actually completely justified: we observe that the previously claimed algorithm is incorrect, and that in fact no algorithm can achieve dependence $t^{o(t)}$ for bounded-degree graphs, unless the ETH fails. This, together with corresponding bounds we provide on the dependence on $Δ$ and the joint parameter establishes that our algorithm is essentially optimal for both parameters, under the ETH. We then revisit the parameterization by treewidth alone and resolve a question also posed by Peters by showing that Nash Stability remains strongly NP-hard on stars under additive preferences. Nevertheless, we also discover an island of mild tractability: we show that Connected Nash Stability is solvable in pseudo-polynomial time for constant $t$, though with an XP dependence on $t$ which, as we establish, cannot be avoided.
summary: We revisit the complexity of the well-studied notion of Additively Separable Hedonic Games (ASHGs). Such games model a basic clustering or coalition formation scenario in which selfish agents are represented by the vertices of an edge-weighted digraph $G=(V,E)$, and the weight of an arc $uv$ denotes the utility $u$ gains by being in the same coalition as $v$. We focus on (arguably) the most basic stability question about such a game: given a graph, does a Nash stable solution exist and can we find it efficiently? We study the (parameterized) complexity of ASHG stability when the underlying graph has treewidth $t$ and maximum degree $Δ$. The current best FPT algorithm for this case was claimed by Peters [AAAI 2016], with time complexity roughly $2^{O(Δ^5t)}$. We present an algorithm with parameter dependence $(Δt)^{O(Δt)}$, significantly improving upon the parameter dependence on $Δ$ given by Peters, albeit with a slightly worse dependence on $t$. Our main result is that this slight performance deterioration with respect to $t$ is actually completely justified: we observe that the previously claimed algorithm is incorrect, and that in fact no algorithm can achieve dependence $t^{o(t)}$ for bounded-degree graphs, unless the ETH fails. This, together with corresponding bounds we provide on the dependence on $Δ$ and the joint parameter establishes that our algorithm is essentially optimal for both parameters, under the ETH. We then revisit the parameterization by treewidth alone and resolve a question also posed by Peters by showing that Nash Stability remains strongly NP-hard on stars under additive preferences. Nevertheless, we also discover an island of mild tractability: we show that Connected Nash Stability is solvable in pseudo-polynomial time for constant $t$, though with an XP dependence on $t$ which, as we establish, cannot be avoided.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视经过深入研究的可加性可分离快乐游戏（ASHG）概念的复杂性。此类博弈模拟了基本的聚类或联盟形成场景，其中自私代理由边加权有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 的顶点表示，弧 $uv$ 的权重表示与 $v$ 处于同一联盟中的效用 $u$ 收益。我们关注（可以说）此类游戏最基本的稳定性问题：给定一个图，是否存在纳什稳定解以及我们能否有效地找到它？我们研究当底层图具有树宽 $t$ 和最大度 $Δ$ 时 ASHG 稳定性的（参数化）复杂性。 Peters [AAAI 2016] 声称目前针对这种情况的最佳 FPT 算法，时间复杂度约为 $2^{O(Δ^5t)}$。我们提出了一种具有参数依赖性 $(Δt)^{O(Δt)}$ 的算法，显着改进了 Peters 给出的参数对 $Δ$ 的依赖性，尽管对 $t$ 的依赖性稍差。我们的主要结果是，相对于 $t$ 的这种轻微的性能下降实际上是完全合理的：我们观察到之前声称的算法是不正确的，并且实际上没有算法可以实现有界度图的依赖 $t^{o(t)}$，除非 ETH 失败。这与我们提供的对 $Δ$ 和联合参数的依赖关系所提供的相应界限一起，表明我们的算法在 ETH 下对于这两个参数本质上都是最优的。然后，我们重新审视仅通过树宽进行参数化，并通过证明纳什稳定性在加性偏好下对恒星仍然具有很强的 NP 困难性，解决了 Peters 也提出的问题。尽管如此，我们也发现了一个温和易处理的岛屿：我们证明了连通纳什稳定性对于常数 $t$ 在伪多项式时间内是可解的，尽管 XP 依赖于 $t$，正如我们所确定的那样，这是无法避免的。

AI.tldr: 本文重新研究了可加分离享乐博弈（ASHGs）的稳定性问题，重点分析了在树宽和最大度数参数下的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在参数依赖性上存在不足，且对树宽和最大度数的最优性缺乏理论证明，需改进算法并验证其下界。
AI.method: 提出一种参数依赖性为$(Δt)^{O(Δt)}$的FPT算法，并通过ETH假设证明了原算法的错误性及新算法的最优性。
AI.result: 新算法显著优化了最大度数的参数依赖性，同时证明了在树宽参数下无多项式时间算法（除非ETH失效），并发现连通纳什稳定性的伪多项式解法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的算法在树宽和最大度数参数下均达到ETH假设下的最优性，且揭示了连通纳什稳定性的部分可解情形。

authors_text: Ali Hatamizadeh,Hongxu Yin,Pavlo Molchanov,Andriy Myronenko,Wenqi Li,Prerna Dogra,Andrew Feng,Mona G. Flores,Jan Kautz,Daguang Xu,Holger R. Roth
title: Do Gradient Inversion Attacks Make Federated Learning Unsafe?
title_zh: 梯度反转攻击会使联邦学习不安全吗？
comment: Revised version; Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging; Improved and reformatted version of https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-1147182/v2; Added NVFlare reference
comments: Revised version; Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging; Improved and reformatted version of https://www.researchsquare.com/article/rs-1147182/v2; Added NVFlare reference
abstract: Federated learning (FL) allows the collaborative training of AI models without needing to share raw data. This capability makes it especially interesting for healthcare applications where patient and data privacy is of utmost concern. However, recent works on the inversion of deep neural networks from model gradients raised concerns about the security of FL in preventing the leakage of training data. In this work, we show that these attacks presented in the literature are impractical in FL use-cases where the clients' training involves updating the Batch Normalization (BN) statistics and provide a new baseline attack that works for such scenarios. Furthermore, we present new ways to measure and visualize potential data leakage in FL. Our work is a step towards establishing reproducible methods of measuring data leakage in FL and could help determine the optimal tradeoffs between privacy-preserving techniques, such as differential privacy, and model accuracy based on quantifiable metrics. Code is available at https://nvidia.github.io/NVFlare/research/quantifying-data-leakage.
summary: Federated learning (FL) allows the collaborative training of AI models without needing to share raw data. This capability makes it especially interesting for healthcare applications where patient and data privacy is of utmost concern. However, recent works on the inversion of deep neural networks from model gradients raised concerns about the security of FL in preventing the leakage of training data. In this work, we show that these attacks presented in the literature are impractical in FL use-cases where the clients' training involves updating the Batch Normalization (BN) statistics and provide a new baseline attack that works for such scenarios. Furthermore, we present new ways to measure and visualize potential data leakage in FL. Our work is a step towards establishing reproducible methods of measuring data leakage in FL and could help determine the optimal tradeoffs between privacy-preserving techniques, such as differential privacy, and model accuracy based on quantifiable metrics. Code is available at https://nvidia.github.io/NVFlare/research/quantifying-data-leakage.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 允许协作训练 AI 模型，而无需共享原始数据。此功能使其对于最关心患者和数据隐私的医疗保健应用程序特别有趣。然而，最近关于从模型梯度反转深度神经网络的研究引起了人们对 FL 在防止训练数据泄漏方面的安全性的担忧。在这项工作中，我们表明文献中提出的这些攻击在 FL 用例中是不切实际的，其中客户的训练涉及更新批量归一化 (BN) 统计数据并提供适用于此类场景的新基线攻击。此外，我们还提出了测量和可视化 FL 中潜在数据泄漏的新方法。我们的工作是朝着建立测量 FL 数据泄漏的可重复方法迈出的一步，并且可以帮助确定隐私保护技术（例如差异隐私）和基于可量化指标的模型准确性之间的最佳权衡。代码可在 https://nvidia.github.io/NVFlare/research/quantifying-data-leakage 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中梯度反转攻击的实际威胁，提出适用于批量归一化场景的新攻击方法，并建立数据泄露量化评估框架。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在医疗等隐私敏感场景中广泛应用，但梯度反转攻击可能泄露训练数据。现有攻击方法在涉及批量归一化（BN）统计更新的联邦学习场景中效果有限，需改进评估方法。
AI.method: 分析现有攻击在BN场景下的局限性，设计新型基线攻击方法；提出数据泄露的量化指标与可视化技术，建立可复现的评估体系。
AI.result: 新攻击方法在BN联邦学习场景中有效，量化指标可准确反映数据泄露风险，为隐私保护技术（如差分隐私）与模型精度的权衡提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 本文为联邦学习数据泄露提供了可量化评估方法，有助于优化隐私保护策略与模型性能的平衡，代码已开源。

Code is available at https://nvidia.github.io/NVFlare/research/quantifying-data-leakage. 联邦学习 (FL) 允许协作训练 AI 模型，而无需共享原始数据。此功能使其对于最关心患者和数据隐私的医疗保健应用程序特别有趣。然而，最近关于从模型梯度反转深度神经网络的研究引起了人们对 FL 在防止训练数据泄漏方面的安全性的担忧。在这项工作中，我们表明文献中提出的这些攻击在 FL 用例中是不切实际的，其中客户的训练涉及更新批量归一化 (BN) 统计数据并提供适用于此类场景的新基线攻击。此外，我们还提出了测量和可视化 FL 中潜在数据泄漏的新方法。我们的工作是朝着建立测量 FL 数据泄漏的可重复方法迈出的一步，并且可以帮助确定隐私保护技术（例如差异隐私）和基于可量化指标的模型准确性之间的最佳权衡。代码可在 https://nvidia.github.io/NVFlare/research/quantifying-data-leakage 获取。 本文研究联邦学习中梯度反转攻击的实际威胁，提出适用于批量归一化场景的新攻击方法，并建立数据泄露量化评估框架。 Ali Hatamizadeh,Hongxu Yin,Pavlo Molchanov,Andriy Myronenko,Wenqi Li,Prerna Dogra,Andrew Feng,Mona G. Flores,Jan Kautz,Daguang Xu,Holger R. Roth cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.DC

authors_text: Foivos Ntelemis,Yaochu Jin,Spencer A. Thomas
title: A Generic Self-Supervised Framework of Learning Invariant Discriminative Features
title_zh: 学习不变判别特征的通用自监督框架
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has become a popular method for generating invariant representations without the need for human annotations. Nonetheless, the desired invariant representation is achieved by utilising prior online transformation functions on the input data. As a result, each SSL framework is customised for a particular data type, e.g., visual data, and further modifications are required if it is used for other dataset types. On the other hand, autoencoder (AE), which is a generic and widely applicable framework, mainly focuses on dimension reduction and is not suited for learning invariant representation. This paper proposes a generic SSL framework based on a constrained self-labelling assignment process that prevents degenerate solutions. Specifically, the prior transformation functions are replaced with a self-transformation mechanism, derived through an unsupervised training process of adversarial training, for imposing invariant representations. Via the self-transformation mechanism, pairs of augmented instances can be generated from the same input data. Finally, a training objective based on contrastive learning is designed by leveraging both the self-labelling assignment and the self-transformation mechanism. Despite the fact that the self-transformation process is very generic, the proposed training strategy outperforms a majority of state-of-the-art representation learning methods based on AE structures. To validate the performance of our method, we conduct experiments on four types of data, namely visual, audio, text, and mass spectrometry data, and compare them in terms of four quantitative metrics. Our comparison results indicate that the proposed method demonstrate robustness and successfully identify patterns within the datasets.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has become a popular method for generating invariant representations without the need for human annotations. Nonetheless, the desired invariant representation is achieved by utilising prior online transformation functions on the input data. As a result, each SSL framework is customised for a particular data type, e.g., visual data, and further modifications are required if it is used for other dataset types. On the other hand, autoencoder (AE), which is a generic and widely applicable framework, mainly focuses on dimension reduction and is not suited for learning invariant representation. This paper proposes a generic SSL framework based on a constrained self-labelling assignment process that prevents degenerate solutions. Specifically, the prior transformation functions are replaced with a self-transformation mechanism, derived through an unsupervised training process of adversarial training, for imposing invariant representations. Via the self-transformation mechanism, pairs of augmented instances can be generated from the same input data. Finally, a training objective based on contrastive learning is designed by leveraging both the self-labelling assignment and the self-transformation mechanism. Despite the fact that the self-transformation process is very generic, the proposed training strategy outperforms a majority of state-of-the-art representation learning methods based on AE structures. To validate the performance of our method, we conduct experiments on four types of data, namely visual, audio, text, and mass spectrometry data, and compare them in terms of four quantitative metrics. Our comparison results indicate that the proposed method demonstrate robustness and successfully identify patterns within the datasets.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）已成为一种无需人工注释即可生成不变表示的流行方法。尽管如此，通过利用输入数据上的先前在线变换函数来实现所需的不变表示。因此，每个 SSL 框架都是针对特定数据类型（例如可视数据）定制的，如果用于其他数据集类型，则需要进一步修改。另一方面，自动编码器（AE）是一种通用且适用范围广泛的框架，主要侧重于降维，不适合学习不变表示。本文提出了一种基于约束自标记分配过程的通用 SSL 框架，可防止退化解决方案。具体来说，先验变换函数被替换为自变换机制，该机制是通过对抗性训练的无监督训练过程导出的，用于强加不变表示。通过自转换机制，可以从相同的输入数据生成成对的增强实例。最后，利用自标记分配和自转化机制设计了基于对比学习的训练目标。尽管自我转变过程非常通用，但所提出的训练策略优于大多数基于 AE 结构的最先进的表示学习方法。为了验证我们方法的性能，我们对四种类型的数据（即视觉、音频、文本和质谱数据）进行了实验，并根据四种定量指标对它们进行了比较。我们的比较结果表明，所提出的方法表现出鲁棒性并成功识别数据集中的模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的自监督学习框架，用于学习具有不变性和判别性的特征表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖特定数据类型的先验变换函数，缺乏通用性；而自编码器虽通用但难以学习不变表示，需解决跨数据类型的特征学习问题。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练生成自变换机制替代先验变换，结合自标注分配与对比学习设计训练目标，生成增强实例对以学习不变特征。
AI.result: 在视觉、音频、文本和质谱数据上优于多数基于自编码器的前沿方法，在四类定量指标中展现鲁棒性与模式识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过自变换机制实现跨数据类型的通用不变特征学习，验证了方法的有效性与广泛适用性。

authors_text: Márton Benedek,Péter Biró,Matthew Johnson,Daniël Paulusma,Xin Ye
title: The Complexity of Matching Games: A Survey
title_zh: 配对游戏的复杂性：一项调查
comment: ef:Journal Of Artificial Intelligence Research, Volume 77, pages 459-485, 2023
comments: ef:Journal Of Artificial Intelligence Research, Volume 77, pages 459-485, 2023
abstract: Matching games naturally generalize assignment games, a well-known class of cooperative games. Interest in matching games has grown recently due to some breakthrough results and new applications. This state-of-the-art survey provides an overview of matching games and extensions, such as $b$-matching games and partitioned matching games; the latter originating from the emerging area of international kidney exchange. In this survey we focus on computational complexity aspects of various game-theoretical solution concepts, such as the core, nucleolus and Shapley value, when the input is restricted to a matching game or one if its variants.
summary: Matching games naturally generalize assignment games, a well-known class of cooperative games. Interest in matching games has grown recently due to some breakthrough results and new applications. This state-of-the-art survey provides an overview of matching games and extensions, such as $b$-matching games and partitioned matching games; the latter originating from the emerging area of international kidney exchange. In this survey we focus on computational complexity aspects of various game-theoretical solution concepts, such as the core, nucleolus and Shapley value, when the input is restricted to a matching game or one if its variants.
abstract_zh: 匹配游戏自然地概括了分配游戏，这是一类著名的合作游戏。由于一些突破性的成果和新的应用，最近人们对配对游戏的兴趣日益浓厚。这项最先进的调查提供了匹配游戏和扩展的概述，例如 $b$ 匹配游戏和分区匹配游戏；后者起源于国际肾脏交换这一新兴领域。在这项调查中，当输入仅限于匹配游戏或其变体时，我们重点关注各种博弈论解决方案概念的计算复杂性方面，例如核心、核仁和沙普利值。

AI.tldr: 综述匹配游戏及其扩展的计算复杂性，重点分析核心、核仁和夏普利值等解概念的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 匹配游戏作为分配游戏的推广，因突破性成果和新应用（如国际肾脏交换）而受到关注，需系统分析其计算复杂性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结匹配游戏及其变体（如b-匹配、分区匹配）在核心、核仁和夏普利值等解概念下的计算复杂性研究成果。
AI.result: 系统梳理了匹配游戏及扩展的计算复杂性，明确了不同解概念的复杂性边界，并指出了未来研究方向，如算法改进和新应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 匹配游戏的计算复杂性分析对理论发展和实际应用（如肾脏交换）至关重要，但仍需进一步研究高效算法和扩展模型。

ai_content.tldr: 综述匹配游戏及其扩展的计算复杂性，重点分析核心、核仁和夏普利值等解概念的计算复杂性。

authors_text: Jules Sanchez,Jean-Emmanuel Deschaud,François Goulette
title: COLA: COarse LAbel pre-training for 3D semantic segmentation of sparse LiDAR datasets
title_zh: COLA：稀疏 LiDAR 数据集 3D 语义分割的 COarse LAbel 预训练
abstract: Transfer learning is a proven technique in 2D computer vision to leverage the large amount of data available and achieve high performance with datasets limited in size due to the cost of acquisition or annotation. In 3D, annotation is known to be a costly task; nevertheless, pre-training methods have only recently been investigated. Due to this cost, unsupervised pre-training has been heavily favored. In this work, we tackle the case of real-time 3D semantic segmentation of sparse autonomous driving LiDAR scans. Such datasets have been increasingly released, but each has a unique label set. We propose here an intermediate-level label set called coarse labels, which can easily be used on any existing and future autonomous driving datasets, thus allowing all the data available to be leveraged at once without any additional manual labeling. This way, we have access to a larger dataset, alongside a simple task of semantic segmentation. With it, we introduce a new pre-training task: coarse label pre-training, also called COLA. We thoroughly analyze the impact of COLA on various datasets and architectures and show that it yields a noticeable performance improvement, especially when only a small dataset is available for the finetuning task.
summary: Transfer learning is a proven technique in 2D computer vision to leverage the large amount of data available and achieve high performance with datasets limited in size due to the cost of acquisition or annotation. In 3D, annotation is known to be a costly task; nevertheless, pre-training methods have only recently been investigated. Due to this cost, unsupervised pre-training has been heavily favored. In this work, we tackle the case of real-time 3D semantic segmentation of sparse autonomous driving LiDAR scans. Such datasets have been increasingly released, but each has a unique label set. We propose here an intermediate-level label set called coarse labels, which can easily be used on any existing and future autonomous driving datasets, thus allowing all the data available to be leveraged at once without any additional manual labeling. This way, we have access to a larger dataset, alongside a simple task of semantic segmentation. With it, we introduce a new pre-training task: coarse label pre-training, also called COLA. We thoroughly analyze the impact of COLA on various datasets and architectures and show that it yields a noticeable performance improvement, especially when only a small dataset is available for the finetuning task.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习是 2D 计算机视觉中一项经过验证的技术，可利用大量可用数据，并在由于采集或注释成本而限制数据集大小的情况下实现高性能。在 3D 中，注释是一项成本高昂的任务；然而，预训练方法直到最近才被研究。由于这种成本，无监督预训练受到了极大的青睐。在这项工作中，我们解决了稀疏自动驾驶 LiDAR 扫描的实时 3D 语义分割的情况。此类数据集已越来越多地发布，但每个数据集都有独特的标签集。我们在这里提出了一种称为粗标签的中间级标签集，它可以轻松地用于任何现有和未来的自动驾驶数据集，从而允许立即利用所有可用数据，而无需任何额外的手动标签。这样，我们就可以访问更大的数据集，以及简单的语义分割任务。有了它，我们引入了一个新的预训练任务：粗标签预训练，也称为COLA。我们彻底分析了 COLA 对各种数据集和架构的影响，并表明它带来了显着的性能改进，特别是当只有一个小数据集可用于微调任务时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COLA预训练方法，通过使用粗粒度标签解决稀疏LiDAR数据集的3D语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 3D点云标注成本高昂且数据集标签集不统一，传统预训练难以有效利用多源数据。
AI.method: 设计通用粗粒度标签体系，基于此构建COLA预训练任务，实现跨数据集的无监督预训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和网络结构上验证有效，尤其在微调数据量较少时性能提升显著。
AI.conclusion: COLA方法通过统一标签体系有效提升稀疏LiDAR数据的3D分割性能，为小样本场景提供新思路。
