search_text: COLA: COarse LAbel pre-training for 3D semantic segmentation of sparse LiDAR datasets COLA：稀疏 LiDAR 数据集 3D 语义分割的 COarse LAbel 预训练 Transfer learning is a proven technique in 2D computer vision to leverage the large amount of data available and achieve high performance with datasets limited in size due to the cost of acquisition or annotation. In 3D, annotation is known to be a costly task; nevertheless, pre-training methods have only recently been investigated. Due to this cost, unsupervised pre-training has been heavily favored. In this work, we tackle the case of real-time 3D semantic segmentation of sparse autonomous driving LiDAR scans. Such datasets have been increasingly released, but each has a unique label set. We propose here an intermediate-level label set called coarse labels, which can easily be used on any existing and future autonomous driving datasets, thus allowing all the data available to be leveraged at once without any additional manual labeling. This way, we have access to a larger dataset, alongside a simple task of semantic segmentation. With it, we introduce a new pre-training task: coarse label pre-training, also called COLA. We thoroughly analyze the impact of COLA on various datasets and architectures and show that it yields a noticeable performance improvement, especially when only a small dataset is available for the finetuning task. 迁移学习是 2D 计算机视觉中一项经过验证的技术，可利用大量可用数据，并在由于采集或注释成本而限制数据集大小的情况下实现高性能。在 3D 中，注释是一项成本高昂的任务；然而，预训练方法直到最近才被研究。由于这种成本，无监督预训练受到了极大的青睐。在这项工作中，我们解决了稀疏自动驾驶 LiDAR 扫描的实时 3D 语义分割的情况。此类数据集已越来越多地发布，但每个数据集都有独特的标签集。我们在这里提出了一种称为粗标签的中间级标签集，它可以轻松地用于任何现有和未来的自动驾驶数据集，从而允许立即利用所有可用数据，而无需任何额外的手动标签。这样，我们就可以访问更大的数据集，以及简单的语义分割任务。有了它，我们引入了一个新的预训练任务：粗标签预训练，也称为COLA。我们彻底分析了 COLA 对各种数据集和架构的影响，并表明它带来了显着的性能改进，特别是当只有一个小数据集可用于微调任务时。 本文提出COLA预训练方法，通过使用粗粒度标签解决稀疏LiDAR数据集的3D语义分割问题。 Jules Sanchez,Jean-Emmanuel Deschaud,François Goulette cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ninad Mehendale,Pragya Gupta,Nishant Rajadhyaksha,Ansh Dagha,Mihir Hundiwala,Aditi Paretkar,Sakshi Chavan,Tanmay Mishra
title: A Graphical Approach For Brain Haemorrhage Segmentation
title_zh: 脑出血分割的图形方法
abstract: Haemorrhaging of the brain is the leading cause of death in people between the ages of 15 and 24 and the third leading cause of death in people older than that. Computed tomography (CT) is an imaging modality used to diagnose neurological emergencies, including stroke and traumatic brain injury. Recent advances in Deep Learning and Image Processing have utilised different modalities like CT scans to help automate the detection and segmentation of brain haemorrhage occurrences. In this paper, we propose a novel implementation of an architecture consisting of traditional Convolutional Neural Networks(CNN) along with Graph Neural Networks(GNN) to produce a holistic model for the task of brain haemorrhage segmentation.GNNs work on the principle of neighbourhood aggregation thus providing a reliable estimate of global structures present in images. GNNs work with few layers thus in turn requiring fewer parameters to work with. We were able to achieve a dice coefficient score of around 0.81 with limited data with our implementation.
summary: Haemorrhaging of the brain is the leading cause of death in people between the ages of 15 and 24 and the third leading cause of death in people older than that. Computed tomography (CT) is an imaging modality used to diagnose neurological emergencies, including stroke and traumatic brain injury. Recent advances in Deep Learning and Image Processing have utilised different modalities like CT scans to help automate the detection and segmentation of brain haemorrhage occurrences. In this paper, we propose a novel implementation of an architecture consisting of traditional Convolutional Neural Networks(CNN) along with Graph Neural Networks(GNN) to produce a holistic model for the task of brain haemorrhage segmentation.GNNs work on the principle of neighbourhood aggregation thus providing a reliable estimate of global structures present in images. GNNs work with few layers thus in turn requiring fewer parameters to work with. We were able to achieve a dice coefficient score of around 0.81 with limited data with our implementation.
abstract_zh: 脑出血是 15 岁至 24 岁人群死亡的主要原因，也是 15 岁以上人群死亡的第三大原因。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 是一种用于诊断神经系统紧急情况的成像方式，包括中风和创伤性脑损伤。深度学习和图像处理的最新进展利用了 CT 扫描等不同模式来帮助自动检测和分割脑出血事件。在本文中，我们提出了一种由传统卷积神经网络（CNN）和图神经网络（GNN）组成的架构的新颖实现，为脑出血分割任务生成一个整体模型。GNN 基于邻域聚合的原理工作，从而提供对图像中存在的全局结构的可靠估计。 GNN 的工作层数较少，因此需要使用的参数也较少。通过我们的实施，我们能够利用有限的数据实现 0.81 左右的骰子系数得分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合传统卷积神经网络（CNN）和图神经网络（GNN）的新型架构，用于脑出血分割任务。
AI.motivation: 脑出血是15-24岁人群的首要死亡原因，且CT扫描在诊断中至关重要。现有方法需更高效的分割模型以应对数据有限的挑战。
AI.method: 融合CNN的局部特征提取能力与GNN的全局结构建模能力，利用GNN的邻域聚合机制减少参数量并提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在有限数据集上实现了约0.81的Dice系数，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模型在减少参数量的同时保持较高分割性能，为脑出血检测提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Changan Chen,Ruohan Gao,Paul Calamia,Kristen Grauman
title: Visual Acoustic Matching
title_zh: 视声匹配
abstract: We introduce the visual acoustic matching task, in which an audio clip is transformed to sound like it was recorded in a target environment. Given an image of the target environment and a waveform for the source audio, the goal is to re-synthesize the audio to match the target room acoustics as suggested by its visible geometry and materials. To address this novel task, we propose a cross-modal transformer model that uses audio-visual attention to inject visual properties into the audio and generate realistic audio output. In addition, we devise a self-supervised training objective that can learn acoustic matching from in-the-wild Web videos, despite their lack of acoustically mismatched audio. We demonstrate that our approach successfully translates human speech to a variety of real-world environments depicted in images, outperforming both traditional acoustic matching and more heavily supervised baselines.
summary: We introduce the visual acoustic matching task, in which an audio clip is transformed to sound like it was recorded in a target environment. Given an image of the target environment and a waveform for the source audio, the goal is to re-synthesize the audio to match the target room acoustics as suggested by its visible geometry and materials. To address this novel task, we propose a cross-modal transformer model that uses audio-visual attention to inject visual properties into the audio and generate realistic audio output. In addition, we devise a self-supervised training objective that can learn acoustic matching from in-the-wild Web videos, despite their lack of acoustically mismatched audio. We demonstrate that our approach successfully translates human speech to a variety of real-world environments depicted in images, outperforming both traditional acoustic matching and more heavily supervised baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了视觉声学匹配任务，其中音频剪辑被转换为听起来像在目标环境中录制的声音。给定目标环境的图像和源音频的波形，目标是重新合成音频以匹配目标房间的声学效果，如其可见几何形状和材料所建议的那样。为了解决这一新任务，我们提出了一种跨模态转换器模型，该模型使用视听注意力将视觉属性注入音频并生成真实的音频输出。此外，我们设计了一个自我监督的训练目标，可以从野外网络视频中学习声学匹配，尽管它们缺乏声学不匹配的音频。我们证明，我们的方法成功地将人类语音转换为图像中描绘的各种现实世界环境，优于传统的声学匹配和更严格监督的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种视觉声学匹配任务，通过输入目标环境图像和源音频，生成符合目标环境声学特性的音频。
AI.motivation: 传统声学匹配方法依赖标注数据且无法利用视觉信息，而实际场景中缺乏匹配的音频数据，需探索更高效的学习方式。
AI.method: 设计跨模态Transformer模型，结合音频-视觉注意力机制注入视觉属性，并通过自监督训练目标利用网络视频学习声学匹配。
AI.result: 方法成功将语音转换为多种现实环境音频，优于传统声学匹配及强监督基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 利用视觉信息和自监督学习可有效生成环境适配的音频，为跨模态声学转换提供新思路。

To address this novel task, we propose a cross-modal transformer model that uses audio-visual attention to inject visual properties into the audio and generate realistic audio output. In addition, we devise a self-supervised training objective that can learn acoustic matching from in-the-wild Web videos, despite their lack of acoustically mismatched audio. We demonstrate that our approach successfully translates human speech to a variety of real-world environments depicted in images, outperforming both traditional acoustic matching and more heavily supervised baselines. 我们介绍了视觉声学匹配任务，其中音频剪辑被转换为听起来像在目标环境中录制的声音。给定目标环境的图像和源音频的波形，目标是重新合成音频以匹配目标房间的声学效果，如其可见几何形状和材料所建议的那样。为了解决这一新任务，我们提出了一种跨模态转换器模型，该模型使用视听注意力将视觉属性注入音频并生成真实的音频输出。此外，我们设计了一个自我监督的训练目标，可以从野外网络视频中学习声学匹配，尽管它们缺乏声学不匹配的音频。我们证明，我们的方法成功地将人类语音转换为图像中描绘的各种现实世界环境，优于传统的声学匹配和更严格监督的基线。 本文提出了一种视觉声学匹配任务，通过输入目标环境图像和源音频，生成符合目标环境声学特性的音频。 Changan Chen,Ruohan Gao,Paul Calamia,Kristen Grauman cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ona de Gibert,Ksenia Kharitonova,Blanca Calvo Figueras,Jordi Armengol-Estapé,Maite Melero
title: Sequence-to-Sequence Resources for Catalan
title_zh: 加泰罗尼亚语的序列到序列资源
abstract: In this work, we introduce sequence-to-sequence language resources for Catalan, a moderately under-resourced language, towards two tasks, namely: Summarization and Machine Translation (MT). We present two new abstractive summarization datasets in the domain of newswire. We also introduce a parallel Catalan-English corpus, paired with three different brand new test sets. Finally, we evaluate the data presented with competing state of the art models, and we develop baselines for these tasks using a newly created Catalan BART. We release the resulting resources of this work under open license to encourage the development of language technology in Catalan.
summary: In this work, we introduce sequence-to-sequence language resources for Catalan, a moderately under-resourced language, towards two tasks, namely: Summarization and Machine Translation (MT). We present two new abstractive summarization datasets in the domain of newswire. We also introduce a parallel Catalan-English corpus, paired with three different brand new test sets. Finally, we evaluate the data presented with competing state of the art models, and we develop baselines for these tasks using a newly created Catalan BART. We release the resulting resources of this work under open license to encourage the development of language technology in Catalan.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们为加泰罗尼亚语（一种资源适度不足的语言）引入了序列到序列的语言资源，用于两个任务，即：摘要和机器翻译（MT）。我们在新闻专线领域提出了两个新的抽象摘要数据集。我们还引入了一个平行的加泰罗尼亚语-英语语料库，搭配三个不同的全新测试集。最后，我们评估与最先进的竞争模型提供的数据，并使用新创建的加泰罗尼亚 BART 为这些任务制定基线。我们在开放许可下发布这项工作的最终资源，以鼓励加泰罗尼亚语语言技术的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文为加泰罗尼亚语创建序列到序列语言资源，用于摘要生成和机器翻译任务，包括新数据集、平行语料库及评估基线模型。
AI.motivation: 加泰罗尼亚语作为资源相对不足的语言，缺乏足够的序列到序列任务数据，限制了相关技术的发展。
AI.method: 构建新闻领域抽象摘要数据集、加泰罗尼亚-英语平行语料库及测试集，基于新开发的加泰罗尼亚BART模型进行任务评估。
AI.result: 发布开放许可的资源，包括数据集、语料库及基线模型，为后续研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 通过提供多任务语言资源，推动加泰罗尼亚语自然语言处理技术的发展与应用研究。

authors_text: Petra Poklukar,Vladislav Polianskii,Anastasia Varava,Florian Pokorny,Danica Kragic
title: Delaunay Component Analysis for Evaluation of Data Representations
title_zh: 用于评估数据表示的 Delaunay 分量分析
abstract: Advanced representation learning techniques require reliable and general evaluation methods. Recently, several algorithms based on the common idea of geometric and topological analysis of a manifold approximated from the learned data representations have been proposed. In this work, we introduce Delaunay Component Analysis (DCA) - an evaluation algorithm which approximates the data manifold using a more suitable neighbourhood graph called Delaunay graph. This provides a reliable manifold estimation even for challenging geometric arrangements of representations such as clusters with varying shape and density as well as outliers, which is where existing methods often fail. Furthermore, we exploit the nature of Delaunay graphs and introduce a framework for assessing the quality of individual novel data representations. We experimentally validate the proposed DCA method on representations obtained from neural networks trained with contrastive objective, supervised and generative models, and demonstrate various use cases of our extended single point evaluation framework.
summary: Advanced representation learning techniques require reliable and general evaluation methods. Recently, several algorithms based on the common idea of geometric and topological analysis of a manifold approximated from the learned data representations have been proposed. In this work, we introduce Delaunay Component Analysis (DCA) - an evaluation algorithm which approximates the data manifold using a more suitable neighbourhood graph called Delaunay graph. This provides a reliable manifold estimation even for challenging geometric arrangements of representations such as clusters with varying shape and density as well as outliers, which is where existing methods often fail. Furthermore, we exploit the nature of Delaunay graphs and introduce a framework for assessing the quality of individual novel data representations. We experimentally validate the proposed DCA method on representations obtained from neural networks trained with contrastive objective, supervised and generative models, and demonstrate various use cases of our extended single point evaluation framework.
abstract_zh: 先进的表征学习技术需要可靠且通用的评估方法。最近，已经提出了几种基于从学习的数据表示近似的流形几何和拓扑分析的共同思想的算法。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Delaunay 分量分析 (DCA) - 一种评估算法，它使用更合适的邻域图（称为 Delaunay 图）来近似数据流形。即使对于具有挑战性的表示几何排列（例如具有不同形状和密度的簇以及异常值），这也提供了可靠的流形估计，而这是现有方法经常失败的地方。此外，我们利用 Delaunay 图的性质并引入了一个用于评估单个新颖数据表示的质量的框架。我们通过实验验证了所提出的 DCA 方法，该方法是通过对比目标、监督和生成模型训练的神经网络获得的表示，并演示了我们扩展的单点评估框架的各种用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Delaunay图的数据表示评估方法DCA，用于更可靠地分析机器学习模型的表示质量。
AI.motivation: 现有流形分析方法在处理复杂几何结构（如形状/密度变化的聚类和离群点）时存在评估失效问题，需要更稳健的表示质量评估框架。
AI.method: 构建Delaunay邻接图近似数据流形，利用其几何特性开发单点表示质量评估框架，并在对比学习、监督和生成模型的表示上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明DCA能有效评估不同模型表示质量，尤其在处理复杂几何结构时优于现有方法，且框架可支持多种应用场景。
AI.conclusion: DCA通过Delaunay图提供了更可靠的流形估计和表示评估方案，其扩展框架为分析单个数据表示提供了实用工具。

authors_text: Pierre Marza,Corentin Kervadec,Grigory Antipov,Moez Baccouche,Christian Wolf
title: An experimental study of the vision-bottleneck in VQA
title_zh: VQA视觉瓶颈的实验研究
abstract: As in many tasks combining vision and language, both modalities play a crucial role in Visual Question Answering (VQA). To properly solve the task, a given model should both understand the content of the proposed image and the nature of the question. While the fusion between modalities, which is another obviously important part of the problem, has been highly studied, the vision part has received less attention in recent work. Current state-of-the-art methods for VQA mainly rely on off-the-shelf object detectors delivering a set of object bounding boxes and embeddings, which are then combined with question word embeddings through a reasoning module. In this paper, we propose an in-depth study of the vision-bottleneck in VQA, experimenting with both the quantity and quality of visual objects extracted from images. We also study the impact of two methods to incorporate the information about objects necessary for answering a question, in the reasoning module directly, and earlier in the object selection stage. This work highlights the importance of vision in the context of VQA, and the interest of tailoring vision methods used in VQA to the task at hand.
summary: As in many tasks combining vision and language, both modalities play a crucial role in Visual Question Answering (VQA). To properly solve the task, a given model should both understand the content of the proposed image and the nature of the question. While the fusion between modalities, which is another obviously important part of the problem, has been highly studied, the vision part has received less attention in recent work. Current state-of-the-art methods for VQA mainly rely on off-the-shelf object detectors delivering a set of object bounding boxes and embeddings, which are then combined with question word embeddings through a reasoning module. In this paper, we propose an in-depth study of the vision-bottleneck in VQA, experimenting with both the quantity and quality of visual objects extracted from images. We also study the impact of two methods to incorporate the information about objects necessary for answering a question, in the reasoning module directly, and earlier in the object selection stage. This work highlights the importance of vision in the context of VQA, and the interest of tailoring vision methods used in VQA to the task at hand.
abstract_zh: 与许多结合视觉和语言的任务一样，这两种模式在视觉问答 (VQA) 中都发挥着至关重要的作用。为了正确解决任务，给定的模型应该既理解所提议图像的内容又理解问题的本质。虽然模态之间的融合是问题的另一个明显重要的部分，已经得到了深入的研究，但视觉部分在最近的工作中受到的关注较少。当前最先进的 VQA 方法主要依赖于现成的对象检测器提供一组对象边界框和嵌入，然后通过推理模块将其与问题词嵌入相结合。在本文中，我们提出对 VQA 中的视觉瓶颈进行深入研究，对从图像中提取的视觉对象的数量和质量进行实验。我们还研究了两种方法的影响，即直接在推理模块中以及在对象选择阶段的早期将回答问题所需的对象信息合并起来。这项工作强调了视觉在 VQA 背景下的重要性，以及根据手头的任务定制 VQA 中使用的视觉方法的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究视觉问答（VQA）中的视觉瓶颈问题，分析视觉信息提取的数量和质量对任务的影响，并探讨两种整合视觉信息的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA研究更关注多模态融合，而忽视了视觉信息本身的优化。作者认为视觉部分对任务性能至关重要，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 实验对比不同数量和质量的视觉物体提取效果，并测试两种整合方式：1) 在推理模块直接使用物体信息；2) 在物体选择阶段提前筛选关键物体。
AI.result: 结果表明视觉信息的质量和整合时机显著影响模型性能，证明优化视觉处理流程对提升VQA效果具有重要意义。
AI.conclusion: 视觉模块在VQA中起关键作用，需根据任务需求定制视觉信息处理方法，而非依赖通用目标检测器。

search_text: An experimental study of the vision-bottleneck in VQA VQA视觉瓶颈的实验研究 As in many tasks combining vision and language, both modalities play a crucial role in Visual Question Answering (VQA). To properly solve the task, a given model should both understand the content of the proposed image and the nature of the question. While the fusion between modalities, which is another obviously important part of the problem, has been highly studied, the vision part has received less attention in recent work. Current state-of-the-art methods for VQA mainly rely on off-the-shelf object detectors delivering a set of object bounding boxes and embeddings, which are then combined with question word embeddings through a reasoning module. In this paper, we propose an in-depth study of the vision-bottleneck in VQA, experimenting with both the quantity and quality of visual objects extracted from images. We also study the impact of two methods to incorporate the information about objects necessary for answering a question, in the reasoning module directly, and earlier in the object selection stage. This work highlights the importance of vision in the context of VQA, and the interest of tailoring vision methods used in VQA to the task at hand. 与许多结合视觉和语言的任务一样，这两种模式在视觉问答 (VQA) 中都发挥着至关重要的作用。为了正确解决任务，给定的模型应该既理解所提议图像的内容又理解问题的本质。虽然模态之间的融合是问题的另一个明显重要的部分，已经得到了深入的研究，但视觉部分在最近的工作中受到的关注较少。当前最先进的 VQA 方法主要依赖于现成的对象检测器提供一组对象边界框和嵌入，然后通过推理模块将其与问题词嵌入相结合。在本文中，我们提出对 VQA 中的视觉瓶颈进行深入研究，对从图像中提取的视觉对象的数量和质量进行实验。我们还研究了两种方法的影响，即直接在推理模块中以及在对象选择阶段的早期将回答问题所需的对象信息合并起来。这项工作强调了视觉在 VQA 背景下的重要性，以及根据手头的任务定制 VQA 中使用的视觉方法的兴趣。 本文通过实验研究视觉问答（VQA）中的视觉瓶颈问题，分析视觉信息提取的数量和质量对任务的影响，并探讨两种整合视觉信息的方法。 Pierre Marza,Corentin Kervadec,Grigory Antipov,Moez Baccouche,Christian Wolf cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Ling,Rongjun Qin
title: A Graph-Matching Approach for Cross-view Registration of Over-view 2 and Street-view based Point Clouds
title_zh: 一种用于概览 2 和基于街景的点云的跨视图配准的图形匹配方法
abstract: In this paper, based on the assumption that the object boundaries (e.g., buildings) from the over-view data should coincide with footprints of façade 3D points generated from street-view photogrammetric images, we aim to address this problem by proposing a fully automated geo-registration method for cross-view data, which utilizes semantically segmented object boundaries as view-invariant features under a global optimization framework through graph-matching: taking the over-view point clouds generated from stereo/multi-stereo satellite images and the street-view point clouds generated from monocular video images as the inputs, the proposed method models segments of buildings as nodes of graphs, both detected from the satellite-based and street-view based point clouds, thus to form the registration as a graph-matching problem to allow non-rigid matches; to enable a robust solution and fully utilize the topological relations between these segments, we propose to address the graph-matching problem on its conjugate graph solved through a belief-propagation algorithm. The matched nodes will be subject to a further optimization to allow precise-registration, followed by a constrained bundle adjustment on the street-view image to keep 2D29 3D consistencies, which yields well-registered street-view images and point clouds to the satellite point clouds.
summary: In this paper, based on the assumption that the object boundaries (e.g., buildings) from the over-view data should coincide with footprints of façade 3D points generated from street-view photogrammetric images, we aim to address this problem by proposing a fully automated geo-registration method for cross-view data, which utilizes semantically segmented object boundaries as view-invariant features under a global optimization framework through graph-matching: taking the over-view point clouds generated from stereo/multi-stereo satellite images and the street-view point clouds generated from monocular video images as the inputs, the proposed method models segments of buildings as nodes of graphs, both detected from the satellite-based and street-view based point clouds, thus to form the registration as a graph-matching problem to allow non-rigid matches; to enable a robust solution and fully utilize the topological relations between these segments, we propose to address the graph-matching problem on its conjugate graph solved through a belief-propagation algorithm. The matched nodes will be subject to a further optimization to allow precise-registration, followed by a constrained bundle adjustment on the street-view image to keep 2D29 3D consistencies, which yields well-registered street-view images and point clouds to the satellite point clouds.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，基于概览数据中的对象边界（例如建筑物）应与街景摄影测量图像生成的立面 3D 点的足迹一致的假设，我们旨在通过提出一种完全自动化的交叉视图数据地理配准方法来解决这个问题，该方法通过图匹配在全局优化框架下利用语义分割的对象边界作为视图不变特征：采用立体/多立体卫星生成的概览点云以图像和单目视频图像生成的街景点云作为输入，所提出的方法将建筑物的片段建模为图的节点，两者都是从基于卫星的点云和基于街景的点云检测到的，从而将配准形成为图匹配问题，以允许非刚性匹配；为了实现鲁棒的解决方案并充分利用这些段之间的拓扑关系，我们建议通过置信传播算法解决其共轭图上的图匹配问题。匹配的节点将进行进一步优化，以实现精确配准，然后对街景图像进行约束捆绑调整，以保持 2D29 3D 一致性，从而生成配准良好的街景图像和点云到卫星点云。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图匹配的跨视角点云配准方法，将卫星影像生成的概览点云与街景影像生成的街景点云进行自动地理配准。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理卫星影像与街景影像之间因视角差异导致的点云配准问题，需利用语义信息实现更精确的跨视角对齐。
AI.method: 通过构建包含建筑分割节点的图模型，采用图匹配算法结合信念传播优化拓扑关系，并通过约束光束法平差保持2D-3D一致性。
AI.result: 实现了卫星点云与街景点云的高精度配准，验证了方法在复杂场景下的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义分割与图匹配框架有效解决了跨视角点云配准难题，为多源遥感数据融合提供了新思路。

authors_text: Elan Rosenfeld,Pradeep Ravikumar,Andrej Risteski
title: Domain-Adjusted Regression or: ERM May Already Learn Features Sufficient for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 域调整回归或：ERM 可能已经学习足以进行分布外泛化的特征
abstract: A common explanation for the failure of deep networks to generalize out-of-distribution is that they fail to recover the "correct" features. We challenge this notion with a simple experiment which suggests that ERM already learns sufficient features and that the current bottleneck is not feature learning, but robust regression. Our findings also imply that given a small amount of data from the target distribution, retraining only the last linear layer will give excellent performance. We therefore argue that devising simpler methods for learning predictors on existing features is a promising direction for future research. Towards this end, we introduce Domain-Adjusted Regression (DARE), a convex objective for learning a linear predictor that is provably robust under a new model of distribution shift. Rather than learning one function, DARE performs a domain-specific adjustment to unify the domains in a canonical latent space and learns to predict in this space. Under a natural model, we prove that the DARE solution is the minimax-optimal predictor for a constrained set of test distributions. Further, we provide the first finite-environment convergence guarantee to the minimax risk, improving over existing analyses which only yield minimax predictors after an environment threshold. Evaluated on finetuned features, we find that DARE compares favorably to prior methods, consistently achieving equal or better performance.
summary: A common explanation for the failure of deep networks to generalize out-of-distribution is that they fail to recover the "correct" features. We challenge this notion with a simple experiment which suggests that ERM already learns sufficient features and that the current bottleneck is not feature learning, but robust regression. Our findings also imply that given a small amount of data from the target distribution, retraining only the last linear layer will give excellent performance. We therefore argue that devising simpler methods for learning predictors on existing features is a promising direction for future research. Towards this end, we introduce Domain-Adjusted Regression (DARE), a convex objective for learning a linear predictor that is provably robust under a new model of distribution shift. Rather than learning one function, DARE performs a domain-specific adjustment to unify the domains in a canonical latent space and learns to predict in this space. Under a natural model, we prove that the DARE solution is the minimax-optimal predictor for a constrained set of test distributions. Further, we provide the first finite-environment convergence guarantee to the minimax risk, improving over existing analyses which only yield minimax predictors after an environment threshold. Evaluated on finetuned features, we find that DARE compares favorably to prior methods, consistently achieving equal or better performance.
abstract_zh: 深度网络未能泛化分布外的一个常见解释是它们无法恢复“正确”的特征。我们通过一个简单的实验挑战了这个概念，该实验表明 ERM 已经学习了足够的特征，并且当前的瓶颈不是特征学习，而是鲁棒回归。我们的研究结果还表明，给定目标分布中的少量数据，仅重新训练最后一个线性层将提供出色的性能。因此，我们认为设计更简单的方法来学习现有特征的预测器是未来研究的一个有希望的方向。为此，我们引入了域调整回归（DARE），这是一个用于学习线性预测器的凸目标，该预测器在新的分布偏移模型下被证明是稳健的。 DARE 不是学习一个函数，而是执行特定于领域的调整，以统一规范潜在空间中的域，并学习在该空间中进行预测。在自然模型下，我们证明 DARE 解决方案是一组受约束的测试分布的极小极大最优预测器。此外，我们为最小最大风险提供了第一个有限环境收敛保证，改进了仅在环境阈值后产生最小最大预测器的现有分析。通过对微调功能进行评估，我们发现 DARE 与之前的方法相比具有优势，始终能够实现相同或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Domain-Adjusted Regression (DARE)的方法，主张通过改进回归而非特征学习来解决深度网络在分布外泛化中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为深度网络泛化失败源于特征学习不足，但作者通过实验表明ERM已能学习到足够特征，真正瓶颈在于鲁棒回归，因此需探索更有效的回归方法。
AI.method: 提出DARE方法，通过凸优化目标在统一的潜在空间中对齐不同领域，并证明其在分布偏移下的最优性，同时提供有限环境下的收敛保证。
AI.result: 实验显示DARE在微调特征上表现优于或等于现有方法，理论分析证明其解在约束测试分布下达到最小最大最优预测。
AI.conclusion: 改进现有特征上的预测器设计是未来研究方向，DARE通过领域自适应回归有效提升了分布外泛化性能。

search_text: Domain-Adjusted Regression or: ERM May Already Learn Features Sufficient for Out-of-Distribution Generalization 域调整回归或：ERM 可能已经学习足以进行分布外泛化的特征 A common explanation for the failure of deep networks to generalize out-of-distribution is that they fail to recover the "correct" features. We challenge this notion with a simple experiment which suggests that ERM already learns sufficient features and that the current bottleneck is not feature learning, but robust regression. Our findings also imply that given a small amount of data from the target distribution, retraining only the last linear layer will give excellent performance. We therefore argue that devising simpler methods for learning predictors on existing features is a promising direction for future research. Towards this end, we introduce Domain-Adjusted Regression (DARE), a convex objective for learning a linear predictor that is provably robust under a new model of distribution shift. Rather than learning one function, DARE performs a domain-specific adjustment to unify the domains in a canonical latent space and learns to predict in this space. Under a natural model, we prove that the DARE solution is the minimax-optimal predictor for a constrained set of test distributions. Further, we provide the first finite-environment convergence guarantee to the minimax risk, improving over existing analyses which only yield minimax predictors after an environment threshold. Evaluated on finetuned features, we find that DARE compares favorably to prior methods, consistently achieving equal or better performance. 深度网络未能泛化分布外的一个常见解释是它们无法恢复“正确”的特征。我们通过一个简单的实验挑战了这个概念，该实验表明 ERM 已经学习了足够的特征，并且当前的瓶颈不是特征学习，而是鲁棒回归。我们的研究结果还表明，给定目标分布中的少量数据，仅重新训练最后一个线性层将提供出色的性能。因此，我们认为设计更简单的方法来学习现有特征的预测器是未来研究的一个有希望的方向。为此，我们引入了域调整回归（DARE），这是一个用于学习线性预测器的凸目标，该预测器在新的分布偏移模型下被证明是稳健的。 DARE 不是学习一个函数，而是执行特定于领域的调整，以统一规范潜在空间中的域，并学习在该空间中进行预测。在自然模型下，我们证明 DARE 解决方案是一组受约束的测试分布的极小极大最优预测器。此外，我们为最小最大风险提供了第一个有限环境收敛保证，改进了仅在环境阈值后产生最小最大预测器的现有分析。通过对微调功能进行评估，我们发现 DARE 与之前的方法相比具有优势，始终能够实现相同或更好的性能。 本文提出了一种名为Domain-Adjusted Regression (DARE)的方法，主张通过改进回归而非特征学习来解决深度网络在分布外泛化中的不足。 Elan Rosenfeld,Pradeep Ravikumar,Andrej Risteski cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yong-Lu Li,Xinpeng Liu,Xiaoqian Wu,Yizhuo Li,Zuoyu Qiu,Liang Xu,Yue Xu,Hao-Shu Fang,Cewu Lu
title: HAKE: A Knowledge Engine Foundation for Human Activity Understanding
title_zh: HAKE：人类活动理解的知识引擎基础
abstract: Human activity understanding is of widespread interest in artificial intelligence and spans diverse applications like health care and behavior analysis. Although there have been advances in deep learning, it remains challenging. The object recognition-like solutions usually try to map pixels to semantics directly, but activity patterns are much different from object patterns, thus hindering success. In this work, we propose a novel paradigm to reformulate this task in two stages: first mapping pixels to an intermediate space spanned by atomic activity primitives, then programming detected primitives with interpretable logic rules to infer semantics. To afford a representative primitive space, we build a knowledge base including 26+ M primitive labels and logic rules from human priors or automatic discovering. Our framework, the Human Activity Knowledge Engine (HAKE), exhibits superior generalization ability and performance upon canonical methods on challenging benchmarks. Code and data are available at http://hake-mvig.cn/.
summary: Human activity understanding is of widespread interest in artificial intelligence and spans diverse applications like health care and behavior analysis. Although there have been advances in deep learning, it remains challenging. The object recognition-like solutions usually try to map pixels to semantics directly, but activity patterns are much different from object patterns, thus hindering success. In this work, we propose a novel paradigm to reformulate this task in two stages: first mapping pixels to an intermediate space spanned by atomic activity primitives, then programming detected primitives with interpretable logic rules to infer semantics. To afford a representative primitive space, we build a knowledge base including 26+ M primitive labels and logic rules from human priors or automatic discovering. Our framework, the Human Activity Knowledge Engine (HAKE), exhibits superior generalization ability and performance upon canonical methods on challenging benchmarks. Code and data are available at http://hake-mvig.cn/.
abstract_zh: 人类活动理解在人工智能领域引起了广泛的兴趣，涵盖了医疗保健和行为分析等多种应用。尽管深度学习取得了进步，但仍然具有挑战性。类似对象识别的解决方案通常尝试将像素直接映射到语义，但活动模式与对象模式有很大不同，从而阻碍了成功。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的范例，分两个阶段重新表述此任务：首先将像素映射到由原子活动原语跨越的中间空间，然后使用可解释的逻辑规则对检测到的原语进行编程以推断语义。为了提供具有代表性的原始空间，我们构建了一个知识库，其中包括 26+ M 个原始标签和来自人类先验或自动发现的逻辑规则。我们的框架人类活动知识引擎（HAKE）在具有挑战性的基准上根据规范方法表现出卓越的泛化能力和性能。代码和数据可在http://hake-mvig.cn/获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAKE框架，通过两阶段方法解决人类活动理解问题：先将像素映射到原子活动原语的中间空间，再利用逻辑规则编程推断语义。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法直接映射像素到语义效果不佳，因活动模式与物体模式差异大，缺乏对活动逻辑结构的建模。
AI.method: 构建包含2600万+原子活动原语及逻辑规则的知识库，分两阶段处理：像素到原语映射，再通过可解释逻辑规则组合原语推断高层语义。
AI.result: HAKE在多个基准测试中展现优于传统方法的泛化能力和性能，代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: HAKE通过融合知识库与逻辑规则，为人类活动理解提供了可解释且高效的新型解决方案。

authors_text: Shimin Zhang,Ziteng Wang,Jiayao Sun,Yihui Fu,Biao Tian,Qiang Fu,Lei Xie
title: Multi-Task Deep Residual Echo Suppression with Echo-aware Loss
title_zh: 具有回声感知损失的多任务深度残余回声抑制
abstract: This paper introduces the NWPU Team's entry to the ICASSP 2022 AEC Challenge. We take a hybrid approach that cascades a linear AEC with a neural post-filter. The former is used to deal with the linear echo components while the latter suppresses the residual non-linear echo components. We use gated convolutional F-T-LSTM neural network (GFTNN) as the backbone and shape the post-filter by a multi-task learning (MTL) framework, where a voice activity detection (VAD) module is adopted as an auxiliary task along with echo suppression, with the aim to avoid over suppression that may cause speech distortion. Moreover, we adopt an echo-aware loss function, where the mean square error (MSE) loss can be optimized particularly for every time-frequency bin (TF-bin) according to the signal-to-echo ratio (SER), leading to further suppression on the echo. Extensive ablation study shows that the time delay estimation (TDE) module in neural post-filter leads to better perceptual quality, and an adaptive filter with better convergence will bring consistent performance gain for the post-filter. Besides, we find that using the linear echo as the input of our neural post-filter is a better choice than using the reference signal directly. In the ICASSP 2022 AEC-Challenge, our approach has ranked the 1st place on word accuracy (WAcc) (0.817) and the 3rd place on both mean opinion score (MOS) (4.502) and the final score (0.864).
summary: This paper introduces the NWPU Team's entry to the ICASSP 2022 AEC Challenge. We take a hybrid approach that cascades a linear AEC with a neural post-filter. The former is used to deal with the linear echo components while the latter suppresses the residual non-linear echo components. We use gated convolutional F-T-LSTM neural network (GFTNN) as the backbone and shape the post-filter by a multi-task learning (MTL) framework, where a voice activity detection (VAD) module is adopted as an auxiliary task along with echo suppression, with the aim to avoid over suppression that may cause speech distortion. Moreover, we adopt an echo-aware loss function, where the mean square error (MSE) loss can be optimized particularly for every time-frequency bin (TF-bin) according to the signal-to-echo ratio (SER), leading to further suppression on the echo. Extensive ablation study shows that the time delay estimation (TDE) module in neural post-filter leads to better perceptual quality, and an adaptive filter with better convergence will bring consistent performance gain for the post-filter. Besides, we find that using the linear echo as the input of our neural post-filter is a better choice than using the reference signal directly. In the ICASSP 2022 AEC-Challenge, our approach has ranked the 1st place on word accuracy (WAcc) (0.817) and the 3rd place on both mean opinion score (MOS) (4.502) and the final score (0.864).
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了西北工业大学团队参加ICASSP 2022 AEC挑战赛的情况。我们采用混合方法，将线性 AEC 与神经后置滤波器级联。前者用于处理线性回波成分，后者用于抑制残留的非线性回波成分。我们使用门控卷积F-T-LSTM神经网络（GFTNN）作为主干，并通过多任务学习（MTL）框架塑造后置滤波器，其中语音活动检测（VAD）模块与回声抑制一起作为辅助任务，旨在避免可能导致语音失真的过度抑制。此外，我们采用回声感知损失函数，其中可以根据信号回声比（SER）特别针对每个时频仓（TF-b​​in）优化均方误差（MSE）损失，从而进一步抑制回声。广泛的消融研究表明，神经后置滤波器中的时间延迟估计（TDE）模块可以带来更好的感知质量，而具有更好收敛性的自适应滤波器将为后置滤波器带来一致的性能增益。此外，我们发现使用线性回波作为神经后置滤波器的输入比直接使用参考信号是更好的选择。在 ICASSP 2022 AEC-Challenge 中，我们的方法在单词准确性 (WAcc) (0.817) 上排名第一，在平均意见得分 (MOS) (4.502) 和最终得分 (0.864) 上排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合线性回声消除与神经网络后滤波的多任务深度残差回声抑制方法，用于ICASSP 2022 AEC挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 传统回声消除方法易因过度抑制导致语音失真，需通过多任务学习与感知优化提升抑制效果。
AI.method: 采用线性AEC与GFTNN神经网络级联架构，结合多任务学习框架（含VAD辅助任务）及基于信噪比的时频域自适应损失函数。
AI.result: 在ICASSP 2022比赛中获得词准确率第1名（0.817）、MOS第3名（4.502）及综合得分第3名（0.864）。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构与感知驱动的损失函数有效提升回声抑制性能，验证了时延估计模块与自适应滤波器的关键作用。

In the ICASSP 2022 AEC-Challenge, our approach has ranked the 1st place on word accuracy (WAcc) (0.817) and the 3rd place on both mean opinion score (MOS) (4.502) and the final score (0.864). 本文介绍了西北工业大学团队参加ICASSP 2022 AEC挑战赛的情况。我们采用混合方法，将线性 AEC 与神经后置滤波器级联。前者用于处理线性回波成分，后者用于抑制残留的非线性回波成分。我们使用门控卷积F-T-LSTM神经网络（GFTNN）作为主干，并通过多任务学习（MTL）框架塑造后置滤波器，其中语音活动检测（VAD）模块与回声抑制一起作为辅助任务，旨在避免可能导致语音失真的过度抑制。此外，我们采用回声感知损失函数，其中可以根据信号回声比（SER）特别针对每个时频仓（TF-b​​in）优化均方误差（MSE）损失，从而进一步抑制回声。广泛的消融研究表明，神经后置滤波器中的时间延迟估计（TDE）模块可以带来更好的感知质量，而具有更好收敛性的自适应滤波器将为后置滤波器带来一致的性能增益。此外，我们发现使用线性回波作为神经后置滤波器的输入比直接使用参考信号是更好的选择。在 ICASSP 2022 AEC-Challenge 中，我们的方法在单词准确性 (WAcc) (0.817) 上排名第一，在平均意见得分 (MOS) (4.502) 和最终得分 (0.864) 上排名第三。 本文提出一种结合线性回声消除与神经网络后滤波的多任务深度残差回声抑制方法，用于ICASSP 2022 AEC挑战赛。 Shimin Zhang,Ziteng Wang,Jiayao Sun,Yihui Fu,Biao Tian,Qiang Fu,Lei Xie cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shubhangi Ghosh,Luigi Gresele,Julius von Kügelgen,Michel Besserve,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: On Pitfalls of Identifiability in Unsupervised Learning. A Note on: "Desiderata for Representation Learning: A Causal Perspective"
title_zh: 关于无监督学习中可识别性的陷阱。关于“表征学习的需求：因果视角”的注释
abstract: Model identifiability is a desirable property in the context of unsupervised representation learning. In absence thereof, different models may be observationally indistinguishable while yielding representations that are nontrivially related to one another, thus making the recovery of a ground truth generative model fundamentally impossible, as often shown through suitably constructed counterexamples. In this note, we discuss one such construction, illustrating a potential failure case of an identifiability result presented in "Desiderata for Representation Learning: A Causal Perspective" by Wang & Jordan (2021). The construction is based on the theory of nonlinear independent component analysis. We comment on implications of this and other counterexamples for identifiable representation learning.
summary: Model identifiability is a desirable property in the context of unsupervised representation learning. In absence thereof, different models may be observationally indistinguishable while yielding representations that are nontrivially related to one another, thus making the recovery of a ground truth generative model fundamentally impossible, as often shown through suitably constructed counterexamples. In this note, we discuss one such construction, illustrating a potential failure case of an identifiability result presented in "Desiderata for Representation Learning: A Causal Perspective" by Wang & Jordan (2021). The construction is based on the theory of nonlinear independent component analysis. We comment on implications of this and other counterexamples for identifiable representation learning.
abstract_zh: 在无监督表示学习的背景下，模型可识别性是一个理想的属性。如果没有这种情况，不同的模型可能在观察上无法区分，同时产生彼此之间不平凡相关的表示，从而使得恢复地面实况生成模型根本上是不可能的，正如通过适当构造的反例所经常显示的那样。在本文中，我们讨论了这样的一种构造，说明了 Wang 和 Jordan（2021）在“表征学习的需求：因果视角”中提出的可识别性结果的潜在失败案例。该结构基于非线性独立分量分析理论。我们评论这个例子和其他反例对可识别表征学习的影响。

AI.tldr: 分析无监督学习中可识别性的陷阱，并指出Wang & Jordan（2021）提出的可识别性结果的潜在失败案例。
AI.motivation: 探讨无监督表征学习中模型可识别性不足可能导致的问题，并验证现有可识别性结果的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过构造基于非线性独立成分分析理论的反例，验证Wang & Jordan（2021）提出的可识别性结果的局限性。
AI.result: 构造了一个反例，证明Wang & Jordan（2021）的可识别性结论在特定条件下不成立，并讨论了此类反例对可识别表征学习的启示。
AI.conclusion: 强调模型可识别性在无监督学习中的关键作用，指出现有理论需进一步完善以避免类似反例的出现。

authors_text: Sayantan Auddy,Jakob Hollenstein,Matteo Saveriano,Antonio Rodríguez-Sánchez,Justus Piater
title: Continual Learning from Demonstration of Robotics Skills
title_zh: 从机器人技能演示中不断学习
comment: To appear in Robotics and Autonomous Systems
comments: To appear in Robotics and Autonomous Systems
abstract: Methods for teaching motion skills to robots focus on training for a single skill at a time. Robots capable of learning from demonstration can considerably benefit from the added ability to learn new movement skills without forgetting what was learned in the past. To this end, we propose an approach for continual learning from demonstration using hypernetworks and neural ordinary differential equation solvers. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach in remembering long sequences of trajectory learning tasks without the need to store any data from past demonstrations. Our results show that hypernetworks outperform other state-of-the-art continual learning approaches for learning from demonstration. In our experiments, we use the popular LASA benchmark, and two new datasets of kinesthetic demonstrations collected with a real robot that we introduce in this paper called the HelloWorld and RoboTasks datasets. We evaluate our approach on a physical robot and demonstrate its effectiveness in learning real-world robotic tasks involving changing positions as well as orientations. We report both trajectory error metrics and continual learning metrics, and we propose two new continual learning metrics. Our code, along with the newly collected datasets, is available at https://github.com/sayantanauddy/clfd.
summary: Methods for teaching motion skills to robots focus on training for a single skill at a time. Robots capable of learning from demonstration can considerably benefit from the added ability to learn new movement skills without forgetting what was learned in the past. To this end, we propose an approach for continual learning from demonstration using hypernetworks and neural ordinary differential equation solvers. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach in remembering long sequences of trajectory learning tasks without the need to store any data from past demonstrations. Our results show that hypernetworks outperform other state-of-the-art continual learning approaches for learning from demonstration. In our experiments, we use the popular LASA benchmark, and two new datasets of kinesthetic demonstrations collected with a real robot that we introduce in this paper called the HelloWorld and RoboTasks datasets. We evaluate our approach on a physical robot and demonstrate its effectiveness in learning real-world robotic tasks involving changing positions as well as orientations. We report both trajectory error metrics and continual learning metrics, and we propose two new continual learning metrics. Our code, along with the newly collected datasets, is available at https://github.com/sayantanauddy/clfd.
abstract_zh: 向机器人教授运动技能的方法侧重于一次训练一项技能。能够从演示中学习的机器人可以从学习新运动技能的额外能力中获益匪浅，而不会忘记过去学到的东西。为此，我们提出了一种使用超网络和神经常微分方程求解器从演示中持续学习的方法。我们凭经验证明了这种方法在记住长序列轨迹学习任务方面的有效性，而无需存储过去演示的任何数据。我们的结果表明，超网络在从演示中学习方面优于其他最先进的持续学习方法。在我们的实验中，我们使用流行的 LASA 基准，以及我们在本文中介绍的真实机器人收集的两个新的动觉演示数据集，称为 HelloWorld 和 RoboTasks 数据集。我们在物理机器人上评估我们的方法，并证明其在学习涉及改变位置和方向的现实世界机器人任务方面的有效性。我们报告了轨迹误差指标和持续学习指标，并且我们提出了两个新的持续学习指标。我们的代码以及新收集的数据集可在 https://github.com/sayantanauddy/clfd 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超网络和神经常微分方程求解器的机器人技能持续学习方法，使机器人能够通过演示学习新技能而不遗忘旧技能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人技能学习方法通常仅针对单一技能训练，难以实现技能的持续积累。需要开发无需存储历史演示数据即可学习新技能的持续学习方法。
AI.method: 采用超网络架构结合神经常微分方程求解器，通过动态生成网络参数实现技能的持续学习。在LASA基准测试及新收集的HelloWorld和RoboTasks数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在轨迹误差和持续学习指标上优于现有方法，成功应用于真实机器人学习位置和方向变化的复杂任务，并提出两种新的持续学习评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 超网络方法为机器人持续学习提供了有效解决方案，代码和数据集已开源，为未来研究提供了实验基础。

authors_text: Danny Hermelin,Hendrik Molter,Dvir Shabtay
title: Minimizing the Weighted Number of Tardy Jobs via (max,+)-Convolutions
title_zh: 通过 (max,+)-卷积最小化迟到作业的加权数量
abstract: The $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ problem asks to determine -- given $n$ jobs each with its own processing time, weight, and due date -- the minimum weighted number of tardy jobs in any single machine non-preemptive schedule for these jobs. This is a classical scheduling problem that generalizes both Knapsack, and Subset Sum. The best known pseudo-polynomial algorithm for $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$, due to Lawler and Moore [Management Science'69], dates back to the late 60s and has a running time of $O(d_{\max}n)$, where $n$ is the number of jobs and $d_{\max}$ is their maximal due date. A recent lower bound by Cygan \emph{et al.}~[ICALP'19] for Knapsack shows that $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ cannot be solved in $\widetilde{O}((n+d_{\max})^{2-\varepsilon})$ time, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, under a plausible conjecture. This still leaves a gap between the best known lower bound and upper bound for the problem. In this paper we design a new simple algorithm for $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ that uses $(\max,+)$-convolutions as its main tool, and outperforms the Lawler and Moore algorithm under several parameter ranges. In particular, depending on the specific method of computing $(\max,+)$-convolutions, its running time can be bounded by - $\widetilde{O}(n+d_{\#}d_{\max}^2)$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d^2_{\#}d_{\max}w_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d_{\#}d_{\max}p_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 +d_{\max}w^2_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 + d_{\#}(d_{\max}w_{\max})^{1.5})$. Here, $d_{\#}$ denotes the number of \emph{different} due dates in the instance, $p_{\max}$ denotes the maximum processing time of any job, and $w_{\max}$ denotes the maximum weight of any job.

In this paper we design a new simple algorithm for $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ that uses $(\max,+)$-convolutions as its main tool, and outperforms the Lawler and Moore algorithm under several parameter ranges. In particular, depending on the specific method of computing $(\max,+)$-convolutions, its running time can be bounded by - $\widetilde{O}(n+d_{\#}d_{\max}^2)$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d^2_{\#}d_{\max}w_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d_{\#}d_{\max}p_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 +d_{\max}w^2_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 + d_{\#}(d_{\max}w_{\max})^{1.5})$. Here, $d_{\#}$ denotes the number of \emph{different} due dates in the instance, $p_{\max}$ denotes the maximum processing time of any job, and $w_{\max}$ denotes the maximum weight of any job.

search_text: Minimizing the Weighted Number of Tardy Jobs via (max,+)-Convolutions 通过 (max,+)-卷积最小化迟到作业的加权数量 The $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ problem asks to determine -- given $n$ jobs each with its own processing time, weight, and due date -- the minimum weighted number of tardy jobs in any single machine non-preemptive schedule for these jobs. This is a classical scheduling problem that generalizes both Knapsack, and Subset Sum. The best known pseudo-polynomial algorithm for $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$, due to Lawler and Moore [Management Science'69], dates back to the late 60s and has a running time of $O(d_{\max}n)$, where $n$ is the number of jobs and $d_{\max}$ is their maximal due date. A recent lower bound by Cygan \emph{et al.}~[ICALP'19] for Knapsack shows that $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ cannot be solved in $\widetilde{O}((n+d_{\max})^{2-\varepsilon})$ time, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, under a plausible conjecture. This still leaves a gap between the best known lower bound and upper bound for the problem. In this paper we design a new simple algorithm for $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ that uses $(\max,+)$-convolutions as its main tool, and outperforms the Lawler and Moore algorithm under several parameter ranges. In particular, depending on the specific method of computing $(\max,+)$-convolutions, its running time can be bounded by - $\widetilde{O}(n+d_{\#}d_{\max}^2)$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d^2_{\#}d_{\max}w_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d_{\#}d_{\max}p_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 +d_{\max}w^2_{\max})$. - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 + d_{\#}(d_{\max}w_{\max})^{1.5})$. Here, $d_{\#}$ denotes the number of \emph{different} due dates in the instance, $p_{\max}$ denotes the maximum processing time of any job, and $w_{\max}$ denotes the maximum weight of any job. $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ 问题要求确定（给定 $n$ 个作业，每个作业都有自己的处理时间、权重和到期日期）在这些作业的任何单机非抢占式计划中迟到作业的最小加权数量。这是一个经典的调度问题，概括了背包和子集和。最著名的 $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ 伪多项式算法，由 Lawler 和 Moore [管理科学'69] 提出，可以追溯到 60 年代末，运行时间为 $O(d_{\max}n)$，其中 $n$ 是作业数量，$d_{\max}$ 是它们的最大到期日期。最近 Cygan \emph{et al.}~[ICALP'19] 对 Knapsack 的下界表明，在合理的猜想下，对于任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，$1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ 无法在 $\widetilde{O}((n+d_{\max})^{2-\varepsilon})$ 时间内求解。这仍然在该问题的最著名的下限和上限之间留下了差距。在本文中，我们为 $1 \mid \mid Σw_j U_j$ 设计了一种新的简单算法，该算法使用 $(\max,+)$-卷积作为主要工具，并且在多个参数范围下优于 Lawler 和 Moore 算法。特别是，根据计算 $(\max,+)$-卷积的具体方法，其运行时间可以受 - $\widetilde{O}(n+d_{\#}d_{\max}^2)$ 限制。 - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d^2_{\#}d_{\max}w_{\max})$。 - $\widetilde{O}(d_{\#}n +d_{\#}d_{\max}p_{\max})$。 - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 +d_{\max}w^2_{\max})$。 - $\widetilde{O}(n^2 + d_{\#}(d_{\max}w_{\max})^{1.5})$。其中，$d_{\#}$ 表示实例中 \emph{ different} 到期日的数量，$p_{\max}$ 表示任何作业的最大处理时间，$w_{\max}$ 表示任何作业的最大权重。 本文提出了一种基于(max,+)-卷积的新算法，用于解决单机调度问题中最小化加权延迟作业数量的问题。 Danny Hermelin,Hendrik Molter,Dvir Shabtay cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Yao Wan,Wei Zhao,Hongyu Zhang,Yulei Sui,Guandong Xu,Hai Jin
title: What Do They Capture? -- A Structural Analysis of Pre-Trained Language Models for Source Code
title_zh: 他们捕捉什么？ -- 源代码预训练语言模型的结构分析
comment: Accepted by ICSE 2022 (The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering)
comments: Accepted by ICSE 2022 (The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering)
abstract: Recently, many pre-trained language models for source code have been proposed to model the context of code and serve as a basis for downstream code intelligence tasks such as code completion, code search, and code summarization. These models leverage masked pre-training and Transformer and have achieved promising results. However, currently there is still little progress regarding interpretability of existing pre-trained code models. It is not clear why these models work and what feature correlations they can capture. In this paper, we conduct a thorough structural analysis aiming to provide an interpretation of pre-trained language models for source code (e.g., CodeBERT, and GraphCodeBERT) from three distinctive perspectives: (1) attention analysis, (2) probing on the word embedding, and (3) syntax tree induction. Through comprehensive analysis, this paper reveals several insightful findings that may inspire future studies: (1) Attention aligns strongly with the syntax structure of code. (2) Pre-training language models of code can preserve the syntax structure of code in the intermediate representations of each Transformer layer. (3) The pre-trained models of code have the ability of inducing syntax trees of code. Theses findings suggest that it may be helpful to incorporate the syntax structure of code into the process of pre-training for better code representations.
summary: Recently, many pre-trained language models for source code have been proposed to model the context of code and serve as a basis for downstream code intelligence tasks such as code completion, code search, and code summarization. These models leverage masked pre-training and Transformer and have achieved promising results. However, currently there is still little progress regarding interpretability of existing pre-trained code models. It is not clear why these models work and what feature correlations they can capture. In this paper, we conduct a thorough structural analysis aiming to provide an interpretation of pre-trained language models for source code (e.g., CodeBERT, and GraphCodeBERT) from three distinctive perspectives: (1) attention analysis, (2) probing on the word embedding, and (3) syntax tree induction. Through comprehensive analysis, this paper reveals several insightful findings that may inspire future studies: (1) Attention aligns strongly with the syntax structure of code. (2) Pre-training language models of code can preserve the syntax structure of code in the intermediate representations of each Transformer layer. (3) The pre-trained models of code have the ability of inducing syntax trees of code. Theses findings suggest that it may be helpful to incorporate the syntax structure of code into the process of pre-training for better code representations.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了许多针对源代码的预训练语言模型来对代码上下文进行建模，并作为下游代码智能任务（例如代码完成、代码搜索和代码摘要）的基础。这些模型利用 masked 预训练和 Transformer 并取得了可喜的结果。然而，目前在现有预训练代码模型的可解释性方面仍然进展甚微。目前尚不清楚这些模型为何有效以及它们可以捕获哪些特征相关性。在本文中，我们进行了彻底的结构分析，旨在从三个不同的角度解释源代码的预训练语言模型（例如 CodeBERT 和 GraphCodeBERT）：（1）注意力分析，（2）词嵌入探测，以及（3）语法树归纳。通过综合分析，本文揭示了一些可能启发未来研究的富有洞察力的发现：（1）注意力与代码的语法结构密切相关。 (2)代码的预训练语言模型可以在每个Transformer层的中间表示中保留代码的语法结构。 (3)预训练的代码模型具有归纳代码语法树的能力。这些研究结果表明，将代码的语法结构纳入预训练过程可能会有所帮助，以获得更好的代码表示。

AI.tldr: 本文对预训练代码语言模型（如CodeBERT和GraphCodeBERT）进行结构分析，探讨其捕捉代码特征的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练代码模型的可解释性不足，不清楚其为何有效及能捕捉哪些特征关联。
AI.method: 从注意力机制分析、词嵌入探测和语法树归纳三个角度进行结构分析。
AI.result: 发现注意力与代码语法结构强相关，模型在各Transformer层保留语法结构，且具备归纳代码语法树的能力。
AI.conclusion: 将代码语法结构纳入预训练过程可能有助于提升代码表示效果。

authors_text: Shuo Niu,Hugh S. Manon,Ava Bartolome,Nguyen B. Ha,Keegan Veazey
title: Close-up and Whispering: An Understanding of Multimodal and Parasocial Interactions in YouTube ASMR videos
title_zh: 特写与耳语：对 YouTube ASMR 视频中多模式和准社会互动的理解
abstract: ASMR (Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response) has grown to immense popularity on YouTube and drawn HCI designers' attention to its effects and applications in design. YouTube ASMR creators incorporate visual elements, sounds, motifs of touching and tasting, and other scenarios in multisensory video interactions to deliver enjoyable and relaxing experiences to their viewers. ASMRtists engage viewers by social, physical, and task attractions. Research has identified the benefits of ASMR in mental wellbeing. However, ASMR remains an understudied phenomenon in the HCI community, constraining designers' ability to incorporate ASMR in video-based designs. This work annotates and analyzes the interaction modalities and parasocial attractions of 2663 videos to identify unique experiences. YouTube comment sections are also analyzed to compare viewers' responses to different ASMR interactions. We find that ASMR videos are experiences of multimodal social connection, relaxing physical intimacy, and sensory-rich activity observation. Design implications are discussed to foster future ASMR-augmented video interactions.
summary: ASMR (Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response) has grown to immense popularity on YouTube and drawn HCI designers' attention to its effects and applications in design. We find that ASMR videos are experiences of multimodal social connection, relaxing physical intimacy, and sensory-rich activity observation. Design implications are discussed to foster future ASMR-augmented video interactions.
abstract_zh: ASMR（自主感觉经络反应）在 YouTube 上非常受欢迎，并引起了 HCI 设计师对其在设计中的效果和应用的关注。 YouTube ASMR 创作者将视觉元素、声音、触摸和品尝的主题以及其他场景融入多感官视频交互中，为观众提供愉快和放松的体验。 ASMR 艺术家通过社交、身体和任务吸引力来吸引观众。研究已经确定了 ASMR 对心理健康的益处。然而，ASMR 在 HCI 社区中仍然是一个未被充分研究的现象，限制了设计人员将 ASMR 纳入基于视频的设计的能力。这项工作注释并分析了 2663 个视频的交互方式和准社会吸引力，以识别独特的体验。还分析了 YouTube 评论部分，以比较观众对不同 ASMR 互动的反应。我们发现 ASMR 视频是多模式社交联系、放松的身体亲密和感官丰富的活动观察的体验。讨论了设计含义，以促进未来的 ASMR 增强视频交互。

AI.tldr: 本文分析YouTube ASMR视频中的多模态与拟社会互动，探讨其在人机交互设计中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: ASMR在YouTube上广受欢迎且对心理健康有益，但其在人机交互（HCI）领域的研究不足，限制了设计应用。
AI.method: 对2663个ASMR视频进行标注分析，并结合评论区内容比较观众对不同互动方式的反馈。
AI.result: 发现ASMR视频通过多模态社交连接、放松的亲密感和感官丰富的活动观察，提供独特的沉浸体验。
AI.conclusion: 提出设计建议以增强未来ASMR增强型视频互动，强调需进一步研究其交互机制与用户需求。

search_text: Close-up and Whispering: An Understanding of Multimodal and Parasocial Interactions in YouTube ASMR videos 特写与耳语：对 YouTube ASMR 视频中多模式和准社会互动的理解 ASMR (Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response) has grown to immense popularity on YouTube and drawn HCI designers' attention to its effects and applications in design. YouTube ASMR creators incorporate visual elements, sounds, motifs of touching and tasting, and other scenarios in multisensory video interactions to deliver enjoyable and relaxing experiences to their viewers. ASMRtists engage viewers by social, physical, and task attractions. Research has identified the benefits of ASMR in mental wellbeing. However, ASMR remains an understudied phenomenon in the HCI community, constraining designers' ability to incorporate ASMR in video-based designs. This work annotates and analyzes the interaction modalities and parasocial attractions of 2663 videos to identify unique experiences. YouTube comment sections are also analyzed to compare viewers' responses to different ASMR interactions. We find that ASMR videos are experiences of multimodal social connection, relaxing physical intimacy, and sensory-rich activity observation. Design implications are discussed to foster future ASMR-augmented video interactions. authors_text: Hans L. Bodlaender,Gunther Cornelissen,Marieke van der Wegen
title: Problems hard for treewidth but easy for stable gonality
title_zh: 对于树宽来说很难解决问题，但是对于稳定的goality来说却很容易
abstract: We show that some natural problems that are XNLP-hard (which implies W[t]-hardness for all t) when parameterized by pathwidth or treewidth, become FPT when parameterized by stable gonality, a novel graph parameter based on optimal maps from graphs to trees. The problems we consider are classical flow and orientation problems, such as Undirected Flow with Lower Bounds (which is strongly NP-complete, as shown by Itai), Minimum Maximum Outdegree (for which W[1]-hardness for treewidth was proven by Szeider), and capacitated optimization problems such as Capacitated (Red-Blue) Dominating Set (for which W[1]-hardness was proven by Dom, Lokshtanov, Saurabh and Villanger). Our hardness proofs (that beat existing results) use reduction to a recent XNLP-complete problem (Accepting Non-deterministic Checking Counter Machine). The new easy parameterized algorithms use a novel notion of weighted tree partition with an associated parameter that we call treebreadth, inspired by Seese's notion of tree-partite graphs, as well as techniques from dynamical programming and integer linear programming.
summary: We show that some natural problems that are XNLP-hard (which implies W[t]-hardness for all t) when parameterized by pathwidth or treewidth, become FPT when parameterized by stable gonality, a novel graph parameter based on optimal maps from graphs to trees. The problems we consider are classical flow and orientation problems, such as Undirected Flow with Lower Bounds (which is strongly NP-complete, as shown by Itai), Minimum Maximum Outdegree (for which W[1]-hardness for treewidth was proven by Szeider), and capacitated optimization problems such as Capacitated (Red-Blue) Dominating Set (for which W[1]-hardness was proven by Dom, Lokshtanov, Saurabh and Villanger). Our hardness proofs (that beat existing results) use reduction to a recent XNLP-complete problem (Accepting Non-deterministic Checking Counter Machine). The new easy parameterized algorithms use a novel notion of weighted tree partition with an associated parameter that we call treebreadth, inspired by Seese's notion of tree-partite graphs, as well as techniques from dynamical programming and integer linear programming.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，当用路径宽度或树宽参数化时，一些自然问题是 XNLP 困难的（这意味着所有 t 的 W[t] 难度），当用稳定的角度（一种基于从图到树的最佳映射的新型图参数）参数化时，就会变成 FPT。我们考虑的问题是经典的流和方向问题，例如具有下界的无向流（这是强 NP 完全的，如 Itai 所示）、最小最大出度（其中树宽的 W[1]-硬度由 Szeider 证明），以及容量优化问题，例如容量（红-蓝）支配集（其中 W[1]-硬度由 Dom、Lokshtanov、Saurabh 和 Villanger 证明）。我们的硬度证明（击败现有结果）使用简化来解决最近的 XNLP 完整问题（接受非确定性检查计数器机）。新的简单参数化算法使用加权树分区的新颖概念以及我们称为树宽度的相关参数，其灵感来自 Seese 的树分区图概念以及动态规划和整数线性规划技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了某些经典图问题在基于稳定生成度（stable gonality）的参数下变得固定参数可解（FPT），而这些问题在以树宽（treewidth）为参数时是XNLP难的。
AI.motivation: 传统参数如树宽在处理某些图问题时存在计算复杂性瓶颈，需探索新型参数（如稳定生成度）以实现更高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过将问题归约到XNLP完全问题证明硬度，并设计基于加权树划分和动态规划的新算法，结合整数线性规划技术。
AI.result: 证明了包括有下界流问题、最小最大出度问题和带容量支配集问题等在稳定生成度参数下具有FPT算法，突破了原有树宽参数的复杂性限制。
AI.conclusion: 稳定生成度作为新型图参数能有效降低特定问题的计算复杂性，为参数化算法研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Amin Hosseininasab,Willem-Jan van Hoeve,Andre A. Cire
title: Memory-Efficient Sequential Pattern Mining with Hybrid Tries
title_zh: 使用混合尝试的内存高效序列模式挖掘
abstract: This paper develops a memory-efficient approach for Sequential Pattern Mining (SPM), a fundamental topic in knowledge discovery that faces a well-known memory bottleneck for large data sets. Our methodology involves a novel hybrid trie data structure that exploits recurring patterns to compactly store the data set in memory; and a corresponding mining algorithm designed to effectively extract patterns from this compact representation. Numerical results on small to medium-sized real-life test instances show an average improvement of 85% in memory consumption and 49% in computation time compared to the state of the art. For large data sets, our algorithm stands out as the only capable SPM approach within 256GB of system memory, potentially saving 1.7TB in memory consumption.
summary: This paper develops a memory-efficient approach for Sequential Pattern Mining (SPM), a fundamental topic in knowledge discovery that faces a well-known memory bottleneck for large data sets. Our methodology involves a novel hybrid trie data structure that exploits recurring patterns to compactly store the data set in memory; and a corresponding mining algorithm designed to effectively extract patterns from this compact representation. Numerical results on small to medium-sized real-life test instances show an average improvement of 85% in memory consumption and 49% in computation time compared to the state of the art. For large data sets, our algorithm stands out as the only capable SPM approach within 256GB of system memory, potentially saving 1.7TB in memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 本文为顺序模式挖掘（SPM）开发了一种内存高效的方法，这是知识发现的一个基本主题，面临着众所周知的大型数据集的内存瓶颈。我们的方法涉及一种新颖的混合 trie 数据结构，该结构利用重复模式将数据集紧凑地存储在内存中；以及相应的挖掘算法，旨在从这种紧凑的表示中有效地提取模式。中小型实际测试实例的数值结果显示，与现有技术相比，内存消耗平均提高了 85%，计算时间平均提高了 49%。对于大型数据集，我们的算法脱颖而出，成为 256GB 系统内存内唯一有能力的 SPM 方法，可能节省 1.7TB 的内存消耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合前缀树结构的高效内存序列模式挖掘方法，解决传统方法在处理大数据集时的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 序列模式挖掘在大数据场景下面临严重内存限制，现有方法难以在有限内存中处理大规模数据集。
AI.method: 设计混合前缀树数据结构压缩存储数据，并开发配套挖掘算法从紧凑表示中提取模式。
AI.result: 在中小型数据集上实现内存消耗降低85%、计算时间缩短49%，且是唯一能在256GB内存处理大数据集的算法，节省1.7TB内存。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效突破序列模式挖掘的内存限制，在保持效率的同时显著提升大规模数据处理能力。

For large data sets, our algorithm stands out as the only capable SPM approach within 256GB of system memory, potentially saving 1.7TB in memory consumption. 本文为顺序模式挖掘（SPM）开发了一种内存高效的方法，这是知识发现的一个基本主题，面临着众所周知的大型数据集的内存瓶颈。我们的方法涉及一种新颖的混合 trie 数据结构，该结构利用重复模式将数据集紧凑地存储在内存中；以及相应的挖掘算法，旨在从这种紧凑的表示中有效地提取模式。中小型实际测试实例的数值结果显示，与现有技术相比，内存消耗平均提高了 85%，计算时间平均提高了 49%。对于大型数据集，我们的算法脱颖而出，成为 256GB 系统内存内唯一有能力的 SPM 方法，可能节省 1.7TB 的内存消耗。 本文提出一种基于混合前缀树结构的高效内存序列模式挖掘方法，解决传统方法在处理大数据集时的内存瓶颈问题。 Amin Hosseininasab,Willem-Jan van Hoeve,Andre A. Cire cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Virginie Do,Matthieu Hervouin,Jérôme Lang,Piotr Skowron
title: Online Approval Committee Elections
title_zh: 在线审批委员会选举
abstract: Assume $k$ candidates need to be selected. The candidates appear over time. Each time one appears, it must be immediately selected or rejected -- a decision that is made by a group of individuals through voting. Assume the voters use approval ballots, i.e., for each candidate they only specify whether they consider it acceptable or not. This setting can be seen as a voting variant of choosing $k$ secretaries. Our contribution is twofold. (1) We assess to what extent the committees that are computed online can proportionally represent the voters. (2) If a prior probability over candidate approvals is available, we show how to compute committees with maximal expected score.
summary: Assume $k$ candidates need to be selected. The candidates appear over time. Each time one appears, it must be immediately selected or rejected -- a decision that is made by a group of individuals through voting. Assume the voters use approval ballots, i.e., for each candidate they only specify whether they consider it acceptable or not. This setting can be seen as a voting variant of choosing $k$ secretaries. Our contribution is twofold. (1) We assess to what extent the committees that are computed online can proportionally represent the voters. (2) If a prior probability over candidate approvals is available, we show how to compute committees with maximal expected score.
abstract_zh: 假设需要选择 $k$ 候选人。候选人随着时间的推移出现。每次出现时，都必须立即选择或拒绝——这是由一群人通过投票做出的决定。假设选民使用批准选票，即对于每个候选人，他们仅指定他们是否认为可以接受。这个设置可以看作是选择$k$秘书的投票变体。我们的贡献是双重的。 (1) 我们评估在线计算的委员会在多大程度上可以按比例代表选民。 (2) 如果候选人批准的先验概率可用，我们将展示如何计算具有最大预期分数的委员会。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线环境下基于批准投票的委员会选举问题，探讨如何动态选择候选人以实现比例代表性和最大化预期得分。
AI.motivation: 传统选举模型难以应对实时决策场景，而在线批准委员会选举需在候选人依次出现时即时决策，需平衡比例代表性和最优结果计算。
AI.method: 通过理论分析评估在线委员会的比例代表性，并结合先验概率设计最大化预期得分的算法。
AI.result: 证明了在线委员会在特定条件下可实现比例代表性，并提出基于先验概率的最优委员会计算方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为动态选举场景提供了理论支持和算法框架，有效结合了实时决策与统计优化需求。

authors_text: Julia Chuzhoy,Zihan Tan
title: A Subpolynomial Approximation Algorithm for Graph Crossing Number in Low-Degree Graphs
title_zh: 低度图中图交叉数的次多项式逼近算法
abstract: We consider the classical Minimum Crossing Number problem: given an $n$-vertex graph $G$, compute a drawing of $G$ in the plane, while minimizing the number of crossings between the images of its edges. This is a fundamental and extensively studied problem, whose approximability status is widely open. In all currently known approximation algorithms, the approximation factor depends polynomially on $Δ$ -- the maximum vertex degree in $G$. The best current approximation algorithm achieves an $O(n^{1/2-\varepsilon}\cdot \text{poly}(Δ\cdot\log n))$-approximation, for a small fixed constant $ε$, while the best negative result is APX-hardness, leaving a large gap in our understanding of this basic problem. In this paper we design a randomized $O\left(2^{O((\log n)^{7/8}\log\log n)}\cdot\text{poly}(Δ)\right )$-approximation algorithm for Minimum Crossing Number. This is the first approximation algorithm for the problem that achieves a subpolynomial in $n$ approximation factor (albeit only in graphs whose maximum vertex degree is subpolynomial in $n$). In order to achieve this approximation factor, we design a new algorithm for a closely related problem called Crossing Number with Rotation System, in which, for every vertex $v\in V(G)$, the circular ordering, in which the images of the edges incident to $v$ must enter the image of $v$ in the drawing is fixed as part of the input. Combining this result with the recent reduction of [Chuzhoy, Mahabadi, Tan '20] immediately yields the improved approximation algorithm for Minimum Crossing Number. We introduce several new technical tools, that we hope will be helpful in obtaining better algorithms for the problem in the future.
summary: We consider the classical Minimum Crossing Number problem: given an $n$-vertex graph $G$, compute a drawing of $G$ in the plane, while minimizing the number of crossings between the images of its edges. This is a fundamental and extensively studied problem, whose approximability status is widely open. In all currently known approximation algorithms, the approximation factor depends polynomially on $Δ$ -- the maximum vertex degree in $G$. The best current approximation algorithm achieves an $O(n^{1/2-\varepsilon}\cdot \text{poly}(Δ\cdot\log n))$-approximation, for a small fixed constant $ε$, while the best negative result is APX-hardness, leaving a large gap in our understanding of this basic problem. In this paper we design a randomized $O\left(2^{O((\log n)^{7/8}\log\log n)}\cdot\text{poly}(Δ)\right )$-approximation algorithm for Minimum Crossing Number. This is the first approximation algorithm for the problem that achieves a subpolynomial in $n$ approximation factor (albeit only in graphs whose maximum vertex degree is subpolynomial in $n$). In order to achieve this approximation factor, we design a new algorithm for a closely related problem called Crossing Number with Rotation System, in which, for every vertex $v\in V(G)$, the circular ordering, in which the images of the edges incident to $v$ must enter the image of $v$ in the drawing is fixed as part of the input. Combining this result with the recent reduction of [Chuzhoy, Mahabadi, Tan '20] immediately yields the improved approximation algorithm for Minimum Crossing Number. We introduce several new technical tools, that we hope will be helpful in obtaining better algorithms for the problem in the future.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑经典的最小交叉数问题：给定一个 $n$ 顶点图 $G$，计算平面上 $G$ 的绘图，同时最小化其边缘图像之间的交叉数。这是一个基础且被广泛研究的问题，其近似性状态是广泛开放的。在所有当前已知的近似算法中，近似因子多项式取决于$Δ$——$G$中的最大顶点度。对于一个小的固定常数 $ε$，当前最好的近似算法实现了 $O(n^{1/2-\varepsilon}\cdot \text{poly}(Δ\cdot\log n))$ 近似，而最好的负结果是 APX 硬度，这在我们对这个基本问题的理解上留下了很大的差距。在本文中，我们设计了一种最小交叉数的随机 $O\left(2^{O((\log n)^{7/8}\log\log n)}\cdot\text{poly}(Δ)\right )$ 近似算法。这是该问题的第一个近似算法，可在 $n$ 近似因子中实现次多项式（尽管仅在最大顶点度为 $n$ 次多项式的图中）。为了实现这个近似因子，我们为一个紧密相关的问题设计了一种新算法，称为“交叉数与旋转系统”，其中，对于每个顶点$v\in V(G)$，循环排序（其中与$v$相关的边的图像必须进入绘图中$v$的图像）被固定为输入的一部分。将此结果与最近的 [Chuzhoy, Mahabadi, Tan '20] 的减少相结合，立即产生了改进的最小交叉数近似算法。我们引入了几种新的技术工具，我们希望这些工具将有助于在未来获得更好的算法来解决该问题。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种针对低度图的次多项式近似算法，用于解决图的最小交叉数问题。
AI.motivation: 最小交叉数问题是图论中的经典难题，现有算法的近似因子依赖于图的最大度数Δ的多项式，而本文旨在突破这一限制，提出更高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的旋转系统交叉数问题算法，并结合现有归约技术，设计随机化算法以降低近似因子对n的依赖。
AI.result: 首次实现n的次多项式近似因子（当Δ为n的次多项式时），近似比为O(2^{O((log n)^{7/8} log log n)}·poly(Δ))。
AI.conclusion: 该算法填补了APX难与现有结果间的理论空白，并为未来改进交叉数问题算法提供了新工具。

authors_text: H. Toprak Kesgin,M. Fatih Amasyali
title: Development and Comparison of Scoring Functions in Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 课程学习评分功能的开发与比较
abstract: Curriculum Learning is the presentation of samples to the machine learning model in a meaningful order instead of a random order. The main challenge of Curriculum Learning is determining how to rank these samples. The ranking of the samples is expressed by the scoring function. In this study, scoring functions were compared using data set features, using the model to be trained, and using another model and their ensemble versions. Experiments were performed for 4 images and 4 text datasets. No significant differences were found between scoring functions for text datasets, but significant improvements were obtained in scoring functions created using transfer learning compared to classical model training and other scoring functions for image datasets. It shows that different new scoring functions are waiting to be found for text classification tasks.
summary: Curriculum Learning is the presentation of samples to the machine learning model in a meaningful order instead of a random order. The main challenge of Curriculum Learning is determining how to rank these samples. The ranking of the samples is expressed by the scoring function. In this study, scoring functions were compared using data set features, using the model to be trained, and using another model and their ensemble versions. Experiments were performed for 4 images and 4 text datasets. No significant differences were found between scoring functions for text datasets, but significant improvements were obtained in scoring functions created using transfer learning compared to classical model training and other scoring functions for image datasets. It shows that different new scoring functions are waiting to be found for text classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 课程学习是以有意义的顺序而不是随机顺序向机器学习模型呈现样本。课程学习的主要挑战是确定如何对这些样本进行排序。样本的排名由评分函数表示。在本研究中，使用数据集特征、使用要训练的模型以及使用另一个模型及其集成版本来比较评分函数。对 4 个图像和 4 个文本数据集进行了实验。文本数据集的评分函数之间没有发现显着差异，但与经典模型训练和图像数据集的其他评分函数相比，使用迁移学习创建的评分函数获得了显着改进。它表明文本分类任务正在等待寻找不同的新评分函数。

AI.tldr: 开发并比较课程学习中的评分函数，以确定如何有效排序样本。
AI.motivation: 课程学习中样本排序是关键挑战，评分函数的选择直接影响模型性能，因此需要比较不同评分函数以提升效果。
AI.method: 通过比较基于数据集特征、待训练模型、其他模型及其集成版本的评分函数，并在4个图像和4个文本数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 文本数据集评分函数无显著差异，但图像数据集使用迁移学习的评分函数相比经典方法有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 文本分类任务中仍有待发现新的评分函数以提升课程学习效果。

ai_content.tldr: 开发并比较课程学习中的评分函数，以确定如何有效排序样本。
ai_content.motivation: 课程学习中样本排序是关键挑战，评分函数的选择直接影响模型性能，因此需要比较不同评分函数以提升效果。
ai_content.method: 通过比较基于数据集特征、待训练模型、其他模型及其集成版本的评分函数，并在4个图像和4个文本数据集上进行实验。
ai_content.result: 文本数据集评分函数无显著差异，但图像数据集使用迁移学习的评分函数相比经典方法有显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 文本分类任务中仍有待发现新的评分函数以提升课程学习效果。

search_text: Development and Comparison of Scoring Functions in Curriculum Learning 课程学习评分功能的开发与比较 Curriculum Learning is the presentation of samples to the machine learning model in a meaningful order instead of a random order. The main challenge of Curriculum Learning is determining how to rank these samples. The ranking of the samples is expressed by the scoring function. In this study, scoring functions were compared using data set features, using the model to be trained, and using another model and their ensemble versions. Experiments were performed for 4 images and 4 text datasets. No significant differences were found between scoring functions for text datasets, but significant improvements were obtained in scoring functions created using transfer learning compared to classical model training and other scoring functions for image datasets. It shows that different new scoring functions are waiting to be found for text classification tasks. 课程学习是以有意义的顺序而不是随机顺序向机器学习模型呈现样本。课程学习的主要挑战是确定如何对这些样本进行排序。样本的排名由评分函数表示。在本研究中，使用数据集特征、使用要训练的模型以及使用另一个模型及其集成版本来比较评分函数。对 4 个图像和 4 个文本数据集进行了实验。文本数据集的评分函数之间没有发现显着差异，但与经典模型训练和图像数据集的其他评分函数相比，使用迁移学习创建的评分函数获得了显着改进。它表明文本分类任务正在等待寻找不同的新评分函数。 开发并比较课程学习中的评分函数，以确定如何有效排序样本。 H. Toprak Kesgin,M. Fatih Amasyali cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuncheng Jia,Ruichen Zuo,Tielin Zhang,Hongxing Liu,Bo Xu
title: Motif-topology and Reward-learning improved Spiking Neural Network for Efficient Multi-sensory Integration
title_zh: 基序拓扑和奖励学习改进了尖峰神经网络，实现高效的多感官集成
abstract: Network architectures and learning principles are key in forming complex functions in artificial neural networks (ANNs) and spiking neural networks (SNNs). SNNs are considered the new-generation artificial networks by incorporating more biological features than ANNs, including dynamic spiking neurons, functionally specified architectures, and efficient learning paradigms. In this paper, we propose a Motif-topology and Reward-learning improved SNN (MR-SNN) for efficient multi-sensory integration. MR-SNN contains 13 types of 3-node Motif topologies which are first extracted from independent single-sensory learning paradigms and then integrated for multi-sensory classification. The experimental results showed higher accuracy and stronger robustness of the proposed MR-SNN than other conventional SNNs without using Motifs. Furthermore, the proposed reward learning paradigm was biologically plausible and can better explain the cognitive McGurk effect caused by incongruent visual and auditory sensory signals.
summary: Network architectures and learning principles are key in forming complex functions in artificial neural networks (ANNs) and spiking neural networks (SNNs). SNNs are considered the new-generation artificial networks by incorporating more biological features than ANNs, including dynamic spiking neurons, functionally specified architectures, and efficient learning paradigms. In this paper, we propose a Motif-topology and Reward-learning improved SNN (MR-SNN) for efficient multi-sensory integration. MR-SNN contains 13 types of 3-node Motif topologies which are first extracted from independent single-sensory learning paradigms and then integrated for multi-sensory classification. The experimental results showed higher accuracy and stronger robustness of the proposed MR-SNN than other conventional SNNs without using Motifs. Furthermore, the proposed reward learning paradigm was biologically plausible and can better explain the cognitive McGurk effect caused by incongruent visual and auditory sensory signals.
abstract_zh: 网络架构和学习原理是在人工神经网络 (ANN) 和尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 中形成复杂函数的关键。 SNN 被认为是新一代人工网络，它比 ANN 结合了更多的生物特征，包括动态尖峰神经元、功能指定的架构和高效的学习范式。在本文中，我们提出了一种基序拓扑和奖励学习改进的 SNN（MR-SNN），用于高效的多感官集成。 MR-SNN 包含 13 种 3 节点 Motif 拓扑，这些拓扑首先从独立的单感官学习范式中提取，然后集成以进行多感官分类。实验结果表明，与其他不使用 Motif 的传统 SNN 相比，所提出的 MR-SNN 具有更高的准确性和更强的鲁棒性。此外，所提出的奖励学习范式在生物学上是合理的，并且可以更好地解释由不一致的视觉和听觉感觉信号引起的认知麦格克效应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Motif拓扑与奖励学习的改进型脉冲神经网络（MR-SNN），用于提升多感官信息整合的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统脉冲神经网络（SNN）在多感官整合任务中存在准确性和鲁棒性不足的问题，需引入生物合理性更强的结构与学习机制。
AI.method: 设计包含13种3节点Motif拓扑的网络架构，通过单感官学习提取特征后融合多感官信息，并采用生物 plausible 的奖励学习机制优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明MR-SNN在分类准确率和鲁棒性上优于传统SNN，且其奖励学习机制能有效解释视听不一致下的麦格克效应。
AI.conclusion: MR-SNN通过Motif拓扑与奖励学习的结合，实现了更高效的多感官整合，为类脑感知系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Junkyeong Choi,Hyucksung Kwon,Woongkyu Lee,Jungwook Choi,Jieun Lim
title: Learning from distinctive candidates to optimize reduced-precision convolution program on tensor cores
title_zh: 向独特的候选者学习以优化张量核上的低精度卷积程序
abstract: Convolution is one of the fundamental operations of deep neural networks with demanding matrix computation. In a graphic processing unit (GPU), Tensor Core is a specialized matrix processing hardware equipped with reduced-precision matrix-multiply-accumulate (MMA) instructions to increase throughput. However, it is challenging to achieve optimal performance since the best scheduling of MMA instructions varies for different convolution sizes. In particular, reduced-precision MMA requires many elements grouped as a matrix operand, seriously limiting data reuse and imposing packing and layout overhead on the schedule. This work proposes an automatic scheduling method of reduced-precision MMA for convolution operation. In this method, we devise a search space that explores the thread tile and warp sizes to increase the data reuse despite a large matrix operand of reduced-precision MMA. The search space also includes options of register-level packing and layout optimization to lesson overhead of handling reduced-precision data. Finally, we propose a search algorithm to find the best schedule by learning from the distinctive candidates. This reduced-precision MMA optimization method is evaluated on convolution operations of popular neural networks to demonstrate substantial speedup on Tensor Core compared to the state of the arts with shortened search time.
summary: Convolution is one of the fundamental operations of deep neural networks with demanding matrix computation. In a graphic processing unit (GPU), Tensor Core is a specialized matrix processing hardware equipped with reduced-precision matrix-multiply-accumulate (MMA) instructions to increase throughput. However, it is challenging to achieve optimal performance since the best scheduling of MMA instructions varies for different convolution sizes. In particular, reduced-precision MMA requires many elements grouped as a matrix operand, seriously limiting data reuse and imposing packing and layout overhead on the schedule. This work proposes an automatic scheduling method of reduced-precision MMA for convolution operation. In this method, we devise a search space that explores the thread tile and warp sizes to increase the data reuse despite a large matrix operand of reduced-precision MMA. The search space also includes options of register-level packing and layout optimization to lesson overhead of handling reduced-precision data. Finally, we propose a search algorithm to find the best schedule by learning from the distinctive candidates. This reduced-precision MMA optimization method is evaluated on convolution operations of popular neural networks to demonstrate substantial speedup on Tensor Core compared to the state of the arts with shortened search time.
abstract_zh: 卷积是深度神经网络的基本运算之一，对矩阵计算要求很高。在图形处理单元 (GPU) 中，Tensor Core 是一种专门的矩阵处理硬件，配备了降低精度的矩阵乘法累加 (MMA) 指令以提高吞吐量。然而，实现最佳性能具有挑战性，因为 MMA 指令的最佳调度因不同的卷积大小而异。特别是，降低精度的 MMA 需要将许多元素分组为矩阵操作数，这严重限制了数据重用，并在进度表上增加了打包和布局开销。这项工作提出了一种用于卷积运算的降低精度MMA的自动调度方法。在这种方法中，我们设计了一个搜索空间来探索线程块和扭曲大小，以增加数据重用，尽管精度降低的 MMA 矩阵操作数很大。搜索空间还包括寄存器级打包和布局优化的选项，以减少处理精度降低的数据的开销。最后，我们提出了一种搜索算法，通过学习独特的候选者来找到最佳的时间表。这种降低精度的 MMA 优化方法在流行神经网络的卷积运算上进行了评估，以证明与现有技术相比，Tensor Core 具有显着的加速效果，同时缩短了搜索时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动调度方法，通过学习不同候选方案优化低精度卷积在Tensor Core上的性能。
AI.motivation: Tensor Core的低精度矩阵乘法指令在处理不同尺寸卷积时性能差异大，且数据重用和打包开销限制了效率，需自动调度优化。
AI.method: 设计包含线程块/ warp尺寸探索的搜索空间，结合寄存器级打包与布局优化选项，并通过学习候选方案的搜索算法确定最佳调度。
AI.result: 在主流神经网络卷积操作中实现相比现有技术显著加速，且搜索时间缩短。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了Tensor Core上低精度卷积的执行效率，验证了自动调度优化的可行性。
