authors_text: Seokju Cho,Sunghwan Hong,Seungryong Kim
title: CATs++: Boosting Cost Aggregation with Convolutions and Transformers
title_zh: CATs++：通过卷积和变压器促进成本聚合
comment: Accepted to TPAMI. Project page:https://ku-cvlab.github.io/CATs-PlusPlus-Project-Page/ arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02520
comments: Accepted to TPAMI. Project page:https://ku-cvlab.github.io/CATs-PlusPlus-Project-Page/ arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02520
abstract: Cost aggregation is a highly important process in image matching tasks, which aims to disambiguate the noisy matching scores. Existing methods generally tackle this by hand-crafted or CNN-based methods, which either lack robustness to severe deformations or inherit the limitation of CNNs that fail to discriminate incorrect matches due to limited receptive fields and inadaptability. In this paper, we introduce Cost Aggregation with Transformers (CATs) to tackle this by exploring global consensus among initial correlation map with the help of some architectural designs that allow us to fully enjoy global receptive fields of self-attention mechanism. Also, to alleviate some of the limitations that CATs may face, i.e., high computational costs induced by the use of a standard transformer that its complexity grows with the size of spatial and feature dimensions, which restrict its applicability only at limited resolution and result in rather limited performance, we propose CATs++, an extension of CATs. Our proposed methods outperform the previous state-of-the-art methods by large margins, setting a new state-of-the-art for all the benchmarks, including PF-WILLOW, PF-PASCAL, and SPair-71k. We further provide extensive ablation studies and analyses.

Existing methods generally tackle this by hand-crafted or CNN-based methods, which either lack robustness to severe deformations or inherit the limitation of CNNs that fail to discriminate incorrect matches due to limited receptive fields and inadaptability. In this paper, we introduce Cost Aggregation with Transformers (CATs) to tackle this by exploring global consensus among initial correlation map with the help of some architectural designs that allow us to fully enjoy global receptive fields of self-attention mechanism. Also, to alleviate some of the limitations that CATs may face, i.e., high computational costs induced by the use of a standard transformer that its complexity grows with the size of spatial and feature dimensions, which restrict its applicability only at limited resolution and result in rather limited performance, we propose CATs++, an extension of CATs. Our proposed methods outperform the previous state-of-the-art methods by large margins, setting a new state-of-the-art for all the benchmarks, including PF-WILLOW, PF-PASCAL, and SPair-71k. We further provide extensive ablation studies and analyses.
abstract_zh: 成本聚合是图像匹配任务中非常重要的过程，其目的是消除噪声匹配分数的歧义。现有的方法通常通过手工或基于 CNN 的方法来解决这个问题，这些方法要么缺乏对严重变形的鲁棒性，要么继承了 CNN 的局限性，由于有限的感受野和不适应性而无法区分不正确的匹配。在本文中，我们引入了变压器成本聚合（CAT）来解决这个问题，通过在一些架构设计的帮助下探索初始相关图之间的全局共识，使我们能够充分享受自注意力机制的全局感受野。此外，为了缓解 CAT 可能面临的一些限制，即使用标准转换器导致的高计算成本，其复杂性随着空间和特征维度的大小而增加，这限制了其仅在有限的分辨率下适用并导致相当有限的性能，我们提出 CATs++，CAT 的扩展。我们提出的方法大大优于以前最先进的方法，为所有基准测试（包括 PF-WILLOW、PF-PASCAL 和 SPair-71k）设定了新的最先进方法。我们进一步提供广泛的消融研究和分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CATs++方法，通过结合卷积和Transformer结构提升图像匹配任务中的代价聚合效果。
AI.motivation: 传统手工设计或CNN-based方法在处理严重形变时鲁棒性不足，且受限于CNN的局部感受野，无法有效区分错误匹配。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的全局共识探索机制，结合自注意力机制的全局感受野，并提出CATs++优化计算成本问题。
AI.result: 在PF-WILLOW、PF-PASCAL和SPair-71k基准测试中大幅超越现有SOTA方法，且提供大量消融实验分析。
AI.conclusion: CATs++通过全局信息建模和计算优化有效解决了代价聚合难题，为图像匹配任务树立了新基准。

authors_text: MohammadJavad Salehi,Kari Hooli,Jari Hulkkonen,Antti Tolli
title: Enhancing Next-Generation Extended Reality Applications with Coded Caching
title_zh: 通过编码缓存增强下一代扩展现实应用程序
abstract: The next evolutionary step in human-computer interfaces will bring forward immersive digital experiences that submerge users in a 3D world while allowing them to interact with virtual or twin objects. Accordingly, various collaborative extended reality (XR) applications are expected to emerge, imposing stringent performance requirements on the underlying wireless connectivity infrastructure. In this paper, we examine how novel multi-antenna coded caching (CC) techniques can facilitate high-rate low-latency communications and improve users' quality of experience (QoE) in our envisioned multi-user XR scenario. Specifically, we discuss how these techniques make it possible to prioritize the content relevant to wireless bottleneck areas while enabling the cumulative cache memory of the users to be utilized as an additional communication resource. In this regard, we first explore recent advancements in multi-antenna CC that facilitate the efficient use of distributed in-device memory resources. Then, we review how XR application requirements are addressed within the third-generation partnership project (3GPP) framework and how our envisioned XR scenario relates to the foreseen use cases. Finally, we identify new challenges arising from integrating CC techniques into multi-user XR scenarios and propose novel solutions to address them in practice.
summary: The next evolutionary step in human-computer interfaces will bring forward immersive digital experiences that submerge users in a 3D world while allowing them to interact with virtual or twin objects. Accordingly, various collaborative extended reality (XR) applications are expected to emerge, imposing stringent performance requirements on the underlying wireless connectivity infrastructure. In this paper, we examine how novel multi-antenna coded caching (CC) techniques can facilitate high-rate low-latency communications and improve users' quality of experience (QoE) in our envisioned multi-user XR scenario. Specifically, we discuss how these techniques make it possible to prioritize the content relevant to wireless bottleneck areas while enabling the cumulative cache memory of the users to be utilized as an additional communication resource. In this regard, we first explore recent advancements in multi-antenna CC that facilitate the efficient use of distributed in-device memory resources. Then, we review how XR application requirements are addressed within the third-generation partnership project (3GPP) framework and how our envisioned XR scenario relates to the foreseen use cases. Finally, we identify new challenges arising from integrating CC techniques into multi-user XR scenarios and propose novel solutions to address them in practice.
abstract_zh: 人机界面的下一个进化步骤将带来沉浸式数字体验，让用户沉浸在 3D 世界中，同时允许他们与虚拟或孪生对象进行交互。因此，预计会出现各种协作扩展现实（XR）应用程序，对底层无线连接基础设施提出严格的性能要求。在本文中，我们研究了新颖的多天线编码缓存 (CC) 技术如何在我们设想的多用户 XR 场景中促进高速率低延迟通信并提高用户的体验质量 (QoE)。具体来说，我们讨论这些技术如何能够优先考虑与无线瓶颈区域相关的内容，同时使用户的累积高速缓存能够用作额外的通信资源。在这方面，我们首先探讨多天线 CC 的最新进展，这些进展有助于有效利用分布式设备内内存资源。然后，我们回顾如何在第三代合作伙伴项目 (3GPP) 框架内解决 XR 应用需求，以及我们设想的 XR 场景如何与预见的用例相关联。最后，我们确定了将 CC 技术集成到多用户 XR 场景中所带来的新挑战，并提出了新的解决方案来在实践中解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何利用多天线编码缓存技术提升下一代扩展现实（XR）应用的无线通信性能和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 随着沉浸式XR应用对无线网络性能提出更高要求，传统通信技术难以满足低延迟、高带宽需求，需探索新型缓存技术优化资源利用。
AI.method: 分析多天线编码缓存技术如何高效利用分布式设备内存，结合3GPP框架评估XR需求，并提出针对多用户XR场景的集成方案与挑战应对策略。
AI.result: 明确了编码缓存技术在XR场景中的关键作用，识别了集成过程中的技术挑战，并提出了资源优先级分配等创新解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 编码缓存技术可显著提升XR通信效率，但需进一步研究其在实际多用户场景中的动态资源管理和协议适配问题。

authors_text: Taeahn Kwon,Minkyung Jeong,Eon-Suk Ko,Youngki Lee
title: Captivate! Contextual Language Guidance for Parent-Child Interaction
title_zh: 着迷！亲子互动情境语言指导
comment: Published as a conference paper at CHI 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at CHI 2022
abstract: To acquire language, children need rich language input. However, many parents find it difficult to provide children with sufficient language input, which risks delaying their language development. To aid these parents, we design Captivate!, the first system that provides contextual language guidance to parents during play. Our system tracks both visual and spoken language cues to infer targets of joint attention, enabling the real-time suggestion of situation-relevant phrases for the parent. We design our system through a user-centered process with immigrant families--a highly vulnerable yet understudied population--as well as professional speech language therapists. Next, we evaluate Captivate! on parents with children aged 1-3 to observe improvements in responsive language use. We share insights into developing contextual guidance technology for linguistically diverse families.
summary: To acquire language, children need rich language input. However, many parents find it difficult to provide children with sufficient language input, which risks delaying their language development. To aid these parents, we design Captivate!, the first system that provides contextual language guidance to parents during play. Our system tracks both visual and spoken language cues to infer targets of joint attention, enabling the real-time suggestion of situation-relevant phrases for the parent. We design our system through a user-centered process with immigrant families--a highly vulnerable yet understudied population--as well as professional speech language therapists. Next, we evaluate Captivate! on parents with children aged 1-3 to observe improvements in responsive language use. We share insights into developing contextual guidance technology for linguistically diverse families.
abstract_zh: 为了获得语言，孩子需要丰富的语言输入。然而，许多家长发现很难为孩子提供足够的语言输入，这可能会延迟他们的语言发展。为了帮助这些父母，我们设计了 Captivate!，这是第一个在游戏过程中为父母提供情境语言指导的系统。我们的系统跟踪视觉和口语线索，以推断共同关注的目标，从而为家长提供与情境相关的短语的实时建议。我们通过以用户为中心的流程设计我们的系统，涉及移民家庭（高度脆弱但未被充分研究的人群）以及专业的言语治疗师。接下来我们来评测Captivate！对有 1-3 岁孩子的父母进行调查，观察响应性语言使用的改善情况。我们分享为语言多样化家庭开发情境指导技术的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为Captivate!的系统，通过上下文语言指导帮助家长在亲子互动中提供更丰富的语言输入。
AI.motivation: 许多家长难以提供足够的语言输入，可能导致儿童语言发育迟缓，尤其需要支持语言多样性的家庭。
AI.method: 系统通过追踪视觉和语音线索推断共同注意目标，实时提供情境相关短语建议，并通过用户中心设计与移民家庭及语言治疗师合作开发。
AI.result: 对1-3岁儿童家长的评估显示，系统有效提升了家长的回应性语言使用能力。
AI.conclusion: 上下文指导技术可为语言多样性家庭提供有效支持，未来需进一步优化技术以适应更多场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为Captivate!的系统，通过上下文语言指导帮助家长在亲子互动中提供更丰富的语言输入。
ai_content.motivation: 许多家长难以提供足够的语言输入，可能导致儿童语言发育迟缓，尤其需要支持语言多样性的家庭。
ai_content.method: 系统通过追踪视觉和语音线索推断共同注意目标，实时提供情境相关短语建议，并通过用户中心设计与移民家庭及语言治疗师合作开发。
ai_content.result: 对1-3岁儿童家长的评估显示，系统有效提升了家长的回应性语言使用能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 上下文指导技术可为语言多样性家庭提供有效支持，未来需进一步优化技术以适应更多场景。

search_text: Captivate! Contextual Language Guidance for Parent-Child Interaction 着迷！亲子互动情境语言指导 To acquire language, children need rich language input. However, many parents find it difficult to provide children with sufficient language input, which risks delaying their language development. To aid these parents, we design Captivate!, the first system that provides contextual language guidance to parents during play. Our system tracks both visual and spoken language cues to infer targets of joint attention, enabling the real-time suggestion of situation-relevant phrases for the parent. We design our system through a user-centered process with immigrant families--a highly vulnerable yet understudied population--as well as professional speech language therapists. Next, we evaluate Captivate! on parents with children aged 1-3 to observe improvements in responsive language use. We share insights into developing contextual guidance technology for linguistically diverse families. 为了获得语言，孩子需要丰富的语言输入。然而，许多家长发现很难为孩子提供足够的语言输入，这可能会延迟他们的语言发展。为了帮助这些父母，我们设计了 Captivate!，这是第一个在游戏过程中为父母提供情境语言指导的系统。我们的系统跟踪视觉和口语线索，以推断共同关注的目标，从而为家长提供与情境相关的短语的实时建议。我们通过以用户为中心的流程设计我们的系统，涉及移民家庭（高度脆弱但未被充分研究的人群）以及专业的言语治疗师。接下来我们来评测Captivate！对有 1-3 岁孩子的父母进行调查，观察响应性语言使用的改善情况。我们分享为语言多样化家庭开发情境指导技术的见解。 本文设计了一种名为Captivate!的系统，通过上下文语言指导帮助家长在亲子互动中提供更丰富的语言输入。 Taeahn Kwon,Minkyung Jeong,Eon-Suk Ko,Youngki Lee cs.HC

authors_text: Prasun Roy,Saumik Bhattacharya,Subhankar Ghosh,Umapada Pal
title: Multi-scale Attention Guided Pose Transfer
title_zh: 多尺度注意力引导姿势转移
abstract: Pose transfer refers to the probabilistic image generation of a person with a previously unseen novel pose from another image of that person having a different pose. Due to potential academic and commercial applications, this problem is extensively studied in recent years. Among the various approaches to the problem, attention guided progressive generation is shown to produce state-of-the-art results in most cases. In this paper, we present an improved network architecture for pose transfer by introducing attention links at every resolution level of the encoder and decoder. By utilizing such dense multi-scale attention guided approach, we are able to achieve significant improvement over the existing methods both visually and analytically. We conclude our findings with extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons against several existing methods on the DeepFashion dataset.
summary: Pose transfer refers to the probabilistic image generation of a person with a previously unseen novel pose from another image of that person having a different pose. Due to potential academic and commercial applications, this problem is extensively studied in recent years. Among the various approaches to the problem, attention guided progressive generation is shown to produce state-of-the-art results in most cases. In this paper, we present an improved network architecture for pose transfer by introducing attention links at every resolution level of the encoder and decoder. By utilizing such dense multi-scale attention guided approach, we are able to achieve significant improvement over the existing methods both visually and analytically. We conclude our findings with extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons against several existing methods on the DeepFashion dataset.
abstract_zh: 姿势转移是指从具有不同姿势的人的另一张图像生成具有先前未见过的新姿势的人的概率图像。由于潜在的学术和商业应用，这个问题近年来得到了广泛的研究。在解决该问题的各种方法中，注意力引导渐进生成在大多数情况下被证明可以产生最先进的结果。在本文中，我们通过在编码器和解码器的每个分辨率级别引入注意链接，提出了一种改进的姿势传输网络架构。通过利用这种密集的多尺度注意力引导方法，我们能够在视觉上和分析上实现对现有方法的显着改进。我们通过与 DeepFashion 数据集上的几种现有方法进行广泛的定性和定量比较来得出我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度注意力机制的姿态迁移方法，旨在从源图像生成目标姿态的图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法如注意力引导渐进生成已取得进展，但如何进一步提升生成质量与细节保持仍是挑战，需更有效的多尺度注意力机制。
AI.method: 通过在编码器和解码器的每个分辨率层级引入密集的多尺度注意力链接，增强特征间的跨层交互，提升生成效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在视觉效果和定量指标上均优于现有方法，尤其在细节保留和姿态准确性上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度注意力机制有效提升了姿态迁移效果，为后续研究提供了新的网络架构思路。

authors_text: John Björkman Nilsson
title: Punctuation restoration in Swedish through fine-tuned KB-BERT
title_zh: 通过微调 KB-BERT 恢复瑞典语标点符号
abstract: Presented here is a method for automatic punctuation restoration in Swedish using a BERT model. The method is based on KB-BERT, a publicly available, neural network language model pre-trained on a Swedish corpus by National Library of Sweden. This model has then been fine-tuned for this specific task using a corpus of government texts. With a lower-case and unpunctuated Swedish text as input, the model is supposed to return a grammatically correct punctuated copy of the text as output. A successful solution to this problem brings benefits for an array of NLP domains, such as speech-to-text and automated text. Only the punctuation marks period, comma and question marks were considered for the project, due to a lack of data for more rare marks such as semicolon. Additionally, some marks are somewhat interchangeable with the more common, such as exclamation points and periods. Thus, the data set had all exclamation points replaced with periods. The fine-tuned Swedish BERT model, dubbed prestoBERT, achieved an overall F1-score of 78.9. The proposed model scored similarly to international counterparts, with Hungarian and Chinese models obtaining F1-scores of 82.2 and 75.6 respectively. As further comparison, a human evaluation case study was carried out. The human test group achieved an overall F1-score of 81.7, but scored substantially worse than prestoBERT on both period and comma. Inspecting output sentences from the model and humans show satisfactory results, despite the difference in F1-score. The disconnect seems to stem from an unnecessary focus on replicating the exact same punctuation used in the test set, rather than providing any of the number of correct interpretations. If the loss function could be rewritten to reward all grammatically correct outputs, rather than only the one original example, the performance could improve significantly for both prestoBERT and the human group.

The fine-tuned Swedish BERT model, dubbed prestoBERT, achieved an overall F1-score of 78.9. As further comparison, a human evaluation case study was carried out. abstract_zh: 这里介绍的是一种使用 BERT 模型自动恢复瑞典语标点符号的方法。该方法基于 KB-BERT，这是一种公开的神经网络语言模型，由瑞典国家图书馆在瑞典语语料库上进行了预训练。然后使用政府文本语料库对该模型进行微调以适应这一特定任务。使用小写且不带标点的瑞典语文本作为输入，该模型应该返回语法正确的带标点的文本副本作为输出。此问题的成功解决方案将为一系列 NLP 领域带来好处，例如语音转文本和自动文本。由于缺乏分号等更罕见标记的数据，该项目仅考虑了标点符号、句号、逗号和问号。此外，某些标记在某种程度上可以与更常见的标记互换，例如感叹号和句号。因此，数据集的所有感叹号都替换为句点。经过微调的瑞典 BERT 模型（称为 prestoBERT）的总体 F1 得分为 78.9。所提出的模型得分与国际同行相似，匈牙利和中国模型的 F1 分数分别为 82.2 和 75.6。为了进一步比较，进行了人体评估案例研究。人类测试组的总体 F1 得分为 81.7，但在句点和逗号方面的得分明显低于 prestoBERT。尽管 F1 分数存在差异，但检查模型和人类的输出句子显示出令人满意的结果。这种脱节似乎源于不必要地关注复制测试集中使用的完全相同的标点符号，而不是提供任何正确的解释。如果可以重写损失函数以奖励所有语法正确的输出，而不仅仅是一个原始示例，那么 prestoBERT 和人类组的性能都可以显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于KB-BERT的瑞典语标点恢复方法，通过微调模型实现对无标点文本的自动标点添加。
AI.motivation: 标点恢复对语音转文本等NLP任务至关重要，而瑞典语缺乏足够标注数据。研究聚焦于常见标点（句号、逗号、问号），因罕见标点数据不足且部分标点可互换。
AI.method: 使用瑞典国家图书馆预训练的KB-BERT模型，基于政府文本语料微调。将数据集中的感叹号替换为句号以简化任务，并开发名为prestoBERT的模型进行标点预测。
AI.result: prestoBERT在测试集上取得78.9的F1分数，优于中文模型（75.6）但略低于匈牙利模型（82.2）。人工评估组F1为81.7，但在句号和逗号任务上表现显著低于模型。
AI.conclusion: 当前损失函数过度追求与测试集完全一致的标点，而忽视了语法正确性的多样性。若优化损失函数以奖励所有合理标点方案，可同时提升模型与人工表现。

As further comparison, a human evaluation case study was carried out. The human test group achieved an overall F1-score of 81.7, but scored substantially worse than prestoBERT on both period and comma. Inspecting output sentences from the model and humans show satisfactory results, despite the difference in F1-score. The disconnect seems to stem from an unnecessary focus on replicating the exact same punctuation used in the test set, rather than providing any of the number of correct interpretations. If the loss function could be rewritten to reward all grammatically correct outputs, rather than only the one original example, the performance could improve significantly for both prestoBERT and the human group. 这里介绍的是一种使用 BERT 模型自动恢复瑞典语标点符号的方法。该方法基于 KB-BERT，这是一种公开的神经网络语言模型，由瑞典国家图书馆在瑞典语语料库上进行了预训练。然后使用政府文本语料库对该模型进行微调以适应这一特定任务。使用小写且不带标点的瑞典语文本作为输入，该模型应该返回语法正确的带标点的文本副本作为输出。此问题的成功解决方案将为一系列 NLP 领域带来好处，例如语音转文本和自动文本。由于缺乏分号等更罕见标记的数据，该项目仅考虑了标点符号、句号、逗号和问号。此外，某些标记在某种程度上可以与更常见的标记互换，例如感叹号和句号。因此，数据集的所有感叹号都替换为句点。经过微调的瑞典 BERT 模型（称为 prestoBERT）的总体 F1 得分为 78.9。所提出的模型得分与国际同行相似，匈牙利和中国模型的 F1 分数分别为 82.2 和 75.6。为了进一步比较，进行了人体评估案例研究。人类测试组的总体 F1 得分为 81.7，但在句点和逗号方面的得分明显低于 prestoBERT。尽管 F1 分数存在差异，但检查模型和人类的输出句子显示出令人满意的结果。这种脱节似乎源于不必要地关注复制测试集中使用的完全相同的标点符号，而不是提供任何正确的解释。如果可以重写损失函数以奖励所有语法正确的输出，而不仅仅是一个原始示例，那么 prestoBERT 和人类组的性能都可以显着提高。 本文提出一种基于KB-BERT的瑞典语标点恢复方法，通过微调模型实现对无标点文本的自动标点添加。 John Björkman Nilsson cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ivan Karpukhin,Stanislav Dereka,Sergey Kolesnikov
title: Probabilistic Embeddings Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视概率嵌入
abstract: In recent years, deep metric learning and its probabilistic extensions claimed state-of-the-art results in the face verification task. Despite improvements in face verification, probabilistic methods received little attention in the research community and practical applications. In this paper, we, for the first time, perform an in-depth analysis of known probabilistic methods in verification and retrieval tasks. We study different design choices and propose a simple extension, achieving new state-of-the-art results among probabilistic methods. Finally, we study confidence prediction and show that it correlates with data quality, but contains little information about prediction error probability. We thus provide a new confidence evaluation benchmark and establish a baseline for future confidence prediction research. PyTorch implementation is publicly released.
summary: In recent years, deep metric learning and its probabilistic extensions claimed state-of-the-art results in the face verification task. Despite improvements in face verification, probabilistic methods received little attention in the research community and practical applications. In this paper, we, for the first time, perform an in-depth analysis of known probabilistic methods in verification and retrieval tasks. We study different design choices and propose a simple extension, achieving new state-of-the-art results among probabilistic methods. Finally, we study confidence prediction and show that it correlates with data quality, but contains little information about prediction error probability. We thus provide a new confidence evaluation benchmark and establish a baseline for future confidence prediction research. PyTorch implementation is publicly released.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度度量学习及其概率扩展在人脸验证任务中取得了最先进的结果。尽管人脸验证有所改进，但概率方法在研究界和实际应用中很少受到关注。在本文中，我们首次对验证和检索任务中的已知概率方法进行了深入分析。我们研究不同的设计选择并提出一个简单的扩展，在概率方法中实现了新的最先进的结果。最后，我们研究了置信度预测，并表明它与数据质量相关，但几乎不包含有关预测误差概率的信息。因此，我们提供了一个新的置信度评估基准，并为未来的置信度预测研究建立了基线。 PyTorch 实现已公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视概率嵌入方法在验证和检索任务中的应用，分析设计选择并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管概率方法在人脸识别中有效，但其在研究和应用中未获足够关注，需深入分析以挖掘潜力。
AI.method: 分析现有概率方法的设计选择，提出简单扩展；研究置信度预测与数据质量的关系，建立新评估基准。
AI.result: 在概率方法中实现新最先进结果，提出置信度评估基准并公开PyTorch实现。
AI.conclusion: 概率嵌入具有潜力，但置信度预测需进一步研究，本文为未来工作提供了基线和工具。

authors_text: Jiaxi Gu,Xiaojun Meng,Guansong Lu,Lu Hou,Minzhe Niu,Xiaodan Liang,Lewei Yao,Runhui Huang,Wei Zhang,Xin Jiang,Chunjing Xu,Hang Xu
title: Wukong: A 100 Million Large-scale Chinese Cross-modal Pre-training Benchmark
title_zh: Wukong：亿级大规模中文跨模态预训练基准
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Track Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022 Track Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models have shown remarkable performance on various downstream tasks. Their success heavily relies on the scale of pre-trained cross-modal datasets. However, the lack of large-scale datasets and benchmarks in Chinese hinders the development of Chinese VLP models and broader multilingual applications. In this work, we release a large-scale Chinese cross-modal dataset named Wukong, which contains 100 million Chinese image-text pairs collected from the web. Wukong aims to benchmark different multi-modal pre-training methods to facilitate the VLP research and community development. Furthermore, we release a group of models pre-trained with various image encoders (ViT-B/ViT-L/SwinT) and also apply advanced pre-training techniques into VLP such as locked-image text tuning, token-wise similarity in contrastive learning, and reduced-token interaction. Extensive experiments and a benchmarking of different downstream tasks including a new largest human-verified image-text test dataset are also provided. Experiments show that Wukong can serve as a promising Chinese pre-training dataset and benchmark for different cross-modal learning methods. For the zero-shot image classification task on 10 datasets, $Wukong_{ViT-L}$ achieves an average accuracy of 73.03%. For the image-text retrieval task, it achieves a mean recall of 71.6% on AIC-ICC which is 12.9% higher than WenLan 2.0. Also, our Wukong models are benchmarked on downstream tasks with other variants on multiple datasets, e.g., Flickr8K-CN, Flickr-30K-CN, COCO-CN, et al. More information can be referred to: https://wukong-dataset.github.io/wukong-dataset/.
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models have shown remarkable performance on various downstream tasks. Their success heavily relies on the scale of pre-trained cross-modal datasets. However, the lack of large-scale datasets and benchmarks in Chinese hinders the development of Chinese VLP models and broader multilingual applications. In this work, we release a large-scale Chinese cross-modal dataset named Wukong, which contains 100 million Chinese image-text pairs collected from the web. Wukong aims to benchmark different multi-modal pre-training methods to facilitate the VLP research and community development. Furthermore, we release a group of models pre-trained with various image encoders (ViT-B/ViT-L/SwinT) and also apply advanced pre-training techniques into VLP such as locked-image text tuning, token-wise similarity in contrastive learning, and reduced-token interaction. Extensive experiments and a benchmarking of different downstream tasks including a new largest human-verified image-text test dataset are also provided. Experiments show that Wukong can serve as a promising Chinese pre-training dataset and benchmark for different cross-modal learning methods. For the zero-shot image classification task on 10 datasets, $Wukong_{ViT-L}$ achieves an average accuracy of 73.03%. For the image-text retrieval task, it achieves a mean recall of 71.6% on AIC-ICC which is 12.9% higher than WenLan 2.0. Also, our Wukong models are benchmarked on downstream tasks with other variants on multiple datasets, e.g., Flickr8K-CN, Flickr-30K-CN, COCO-CN, et al. More information can be referred to: https://wukong-dataset.github.io/wukong-dataset/.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型在各种下游任务上表现出了卓越的性能。他们的成功在很大程度上依赖于预训练的跨模式数据集的规模。然而，中文大规模数据集和基准的缺乏阻碍了中文VLP模型的发展和更广泛的多语言应用。在这项工作中，我们发布了一个名为 Wukong 的大规模中文跨模态数据集，其中包含从网络收集的 1 亿个中文图像文本对。 Wukong 旨在对不同的多模态预训练方法进行基准测试，以促进 VLP 研究和社区发展。此外，我们发布了一组使用各种图像编码器（ViT-B/ViT-L/SwinT）进行预训练的模型，并将先进的预训练技术应用到 VLP 中，例如锁定图像文本调整、对比学习中的标记相似性以及减少标记交互。还提供了广泛的实验和不同下游任务的基准测试，包括新的最大的经过人类验证的图像文本测试数据集。实验表明，Wukong 可以作为一个有前途的中文预训练数据集和不同跨模态学习方法的基准。对于 10 个数据集上的零样本图像分类任务，$Wukong_{ViT-L}$ 的平均准确率达到 73.03%。对于图文检索任务，它在AIC-ICC上实现了71.6%的平均召回率，比文澜2.0高出12.9%。此外，我们的 Wukong 模型在多个数据集上的其他变体的下游任务上进行了基准测试，例如 Flickr8K-CN、Flickr-30K-CN、COCO-CN 等。更多信息可以参考：https://wukong-dataset.github.io/wukong-dataset/。

AI.tldr: 本文发布了一个名为Wukong的中文跨模态预训练基准数据集，包含1亿个中文图像-文本对，并评估了多种预训练方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有中文视觉-语言预训练模型因缺乏大规模数据集和基准而发展受限，亟需构建高质量中文跨模态数据以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建1亿中文图像-文本对数据集，采用ViT-B/ViT-L/SwinT等图像编码器，并应用锁图文本微调、对比学习token级相似性等先进技术进行预训练。
AI.result: 在零样本图像分类任务中，Wukong_ViT-L平均准确率达73.03%；在AIC-ICC图像-文本检索任务中均召回率71.6%，较WenLan 2.0提升12.9%。
AI.conclusion: Wukong为中文跨模态预训练提供了有效基准，可促进多模态学习方法的发展与应用。

authors_text: Pınar Baki,Heysem Kaya,Elvan Çiftçi,Hüseyin Güleç,Albert Ali Salah
title: Speech Analysis for Automatic Mania Assessment in Bipolar Disorder
title_zh: 双相情感障碍自动躁狂评估的语音分析
abstract: Bipolar disorder is a mental disorder that causes periods of manic and depressive episodes. In this work, we classify recordings from Bipolar Disorder corpus that contain 7 different tasks, into hypomania, mania, and remission classes using only speech features. We perform our experiments on splitted tasks from the interviews. Best results achieved on the model trained with 6th and 7th tasks together gives 0.53 UAR (unweighted average recall) result which is higher than the baseline results of the corpus.
summary: Bipolar disorder is a mental disorder that causes periods of manic and depressive episodes. In this work, we classify recordings from Bipolar Disorder corpus that contain 7 different tasks, into hypomania, mania, and remission classes using only speech features. We perform our experiments on splitted tasks from the interviews. Best results achieved on the model trained with 6th and 7th tasks together gives 0.53 UAR (unweighted average recall) result which is higher than the baseline results of the corpus.
abstract_zh: 双相情感障碍是一种导致躁狂和抑郁发作的精神障碍。在这项工作中，我们仅使用语音特征将双向情感障碍语料库中包含 7 个不同任务的录音分类为轻躁狂、躁狂和缓解类别。我们对采访中的分割任务进行实验。第 6 项和第 7 项任务一起训练的模型取得的最佳结果为 0.53 UAR（未加权平均召回率）结果，高于语料库的基线结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过分析语音特征，自动评估双相障碍患者的躁狂状态，将其分为轻躁狂、躁狂和缓解期三类。
AI.motivation: 双相障碍的诊断通常依赖主观评估，而语音分析可提供客观指标，有助于实现自动化和更精准的病情评估。
AI.method: 从双相障碍语料库中提取语音特征，利用第6和第7个任务的数据训练分类模型，并采用UAR（未加权平均召回率）作为评估指标。
AI.result: 在第6和第7任务联合训练的模型中，UAR达到0.53，优于语料库的基线结果。
AI.conclusion: 语音特征可有效辅助双相障碍躁狂状态的自动分类，未来可结合更多数据或特征优化模型性能。

search_text: Speech Analysis for Automatic Mania Assessment in Bipolar Disorder 双相情感障碍自动躁狂评估的语音分析 Bipolar disorder is a mental disorder that causes periods of manic and depressive episodes. In this work, we classify recordings from Bipolar Disorder corpus that contain 7 different tasks, into hypomania, mania, and remission classes using only speech features. We perform our experiments on splitted tasks from the interviews. Best results achieved on the model trained with 6th and 7th tasks together gives 0.53 UAR (unweighted average recall) result which is higher than the baseline results of the corpus. 双相情感障碍是一种导致躁狂和抑郁发作的精神障碍。在这项工作中，我们仅使用语音特征将双向情感障碍语料库中包含 7 个不同任务的录音分类为轻躁狂、躁狂和缓解类别。我们对采访中的分割任务进行实验。第 6 项和第 7 项任务一起训练的模型取得的最佳结果为 0.53 UAR（未加权平均召回率）结果，高于语料库的基线结果。 本论文通过分析语音特征，自动评估双相障碍患者的躁狂状态，将其分为轻躁狂、躁狂和缓解期三类。 Pınar Baki,Heysem Kaya,Elvan Çiftçi,Hüseyin Güleç,Albert Ali Salah eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Chengshi Zheng,Wenzhe Liu,Andong Li,Yuxuan Ke,Xiaodong Li
title: Low-latency Monaural Speech Enhancement with Deep Filter-bank Equalizer
title_zh: 通过深度滤波器组均衡器实现低延迟单声道语音增强
abstract: It is highly desirable that speech enhancement algorithms can achieve good performance while keeping low latency for many applications, such as digital hearing aids, acoustically transparent hearing devices, and public address systems. To improve the performance of traditional low-latency speech enhancement algorithms, a deep filter-bank equalizer (FBE) framework was proposed, which integrated a deep learning-based subband noise reduction network with a deep learning-based shortened digital filter mapping network. In the first network, a deep learning model was trained with a controllable small frame shift to satisfy the low-latency demand, i.e., $\le$ 4 ms, so as to obtain (complex) subband gains, which could be regarded as an adaptive digital filter in each frame. In the second network, to reduce the latency, this adaptive digital filter was implicitly shortened by a deep learning-based framework, and was then applied to noisy speech to reconstruct the enhanced speech without the overlap-add method. Experimental results on the WSJ0-SI84 corpus indicated that the proposed deep FBE with only 4-ms latency achieved much better performance than traditional low-latency speech enhancement algorithms in terms of the indices such as PESQ, STOI, and the amount of noise reduction.
summary: It is highly desirable that speech enhancement algorithms can achieve good performance while keeping low latency for many applications, such as digital hearing aids, acoustically transparent hearing devices, and public address systems. To improve the performance of traditional low-latency speech enhancement algorithms, a deep filter-bank equalizer (FBE) framework was proposed, which integrated a deep learning-based subband noise reduction network with a deep learning-based shortened digital filter mapping network. In the first network, a deep learning model was trained with a controllable small frame shift to satisfy the low-latency demand, i.e., $\le$ 4 ms, so as to obtain (complex) subband gains, which could be regarded as an adaptive digital filter in each frame. In the second network, to reduce the latency, this adaptive digital filter was implicitly shortened by a deep learning-based framework, and was then applied to noisy speech to reconstruct the enhanced speech without the overlap-add method. Experimental results on the WSJ0-SI84 corpus indicated that the proposed deep FBE with only 4-ms latency achieved much better performance than traditional low-latency speech enhancement algorithms in terms of the indices such as PESQ, STOI, and the amount of noise reduction.
abstract_zh: 对于许多应用（例如数字助听器、透声助听设备和公共广播系统）来说，非常希望语音增强算法能够实现良好的性能，同时保持低延迟。为了提高传统低延迟语音增强算法的性能，提出了一种深度滤波器组均衡器（FBE）框架，该框架集成了基于深度学习的子带降噪网络和基于深度学习的缩短数字滤波器映射网络。在第一个网络中，用可控的小帧移位来训练深度学习模型，以满足低延迟需求，即$\le$ 4 ms，从而获得（复）子带增益，可以将其视为每帧中的自适应数字滤波器。在第二个网络中，为了减少延迟，这种自适应数字滤波器通过基于深度学习的框架隐式缩短，然后应用于噪声语音以重建增强语音，而无需重叠相加方法。在WSJ0-SI84语料库上的实验结果表明，所提出的仅4ms延迟的深度FBE在PESQ、STOI和降噪量等指标方面比传统低延迟语音增强算法取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低延迟单声道语音增强方法，通过深度滤波器组均衡器框架结合子带降噪网络和缩短数字滤波器映射网络。
AI.motivation: 传统低延迟语音增强算法在性能和延迟之间难以平衡，而实际应用如助听器和公共广播系统需要兼顾高效降噪与低延迟。
AI.method: 设计包含两个深度学习网络的框架：1) 采用可控小帧移的子带降噪网络生成自适应滤波器；2) 通过深度学习缩短滤波器长度，避免重叠相加法直接重构增强语音。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-SI84数据集上，4ms延迟的深度FBE方法在PESQ、STOI和降噪量指标上均优于传统低延迟算法。
AI.conclusion: 深度滤波器组均衡器框架有效解决了语音增强中性能与延迟的矛盾，为实时音频应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seungpyo Kang,Minseon Kim,Kyoungmin Min
title: Machine Learning-Aided Discovery of Superionic Solid-State Electrolyte for Li-Ion Batteries
title_zh: 机器学习辅助发现锂离子电池超离子固态电解质
abstract: Li-Ion Solid-State Electrolytes (Li-SSEs) are a promising solution that resolves the critical issues of conventional Li-Ion Batteries (LIBs) such as poor ionic conductivity, interfacial instability, and dendrites growth. In this study, a platform consisting of a high-throughput screening and a machine-learning surrogate model for discovering superionic Li-SSEs among 20,237 Li-containing materials is developed. For the training database, the ionic conductivity of Na SuperIonic CONductor (NASICON) and Li SuperIonic CONductor (LISICON) type SSEs are obtained from the previous literature. Then, the chemical descriptor (CD) and additional structural properties are used as machine-readable features. Li-SSE candidates are selected through the screening criteria, and the prediction on the ionic conductivity of those is followed. Then, to reduce uncertainty in the surrogate model, the ensemble method by considering the best-performing two models is employed, whose mean prediction accuracy is 0.843 and 0.829, respectively. Furthermore, first-principles calculations are conducted for confirming the ionic conductivity of the strong candidates. Finally, six potential superionic Li-SSEs that have not previously been investigated are proposed. We believe that the constructed platform can accelerate the search for Li-SSEs with high ionic conductivity at minimum cost.
summary: Li-Ion Solid-State Electrolytes (Li-SSEs) are a promising solution that resolves the critical issues of conventional Li-Ion Batteries (LIBs) such as poor ionic conductivity, interfacial instability, and dendrites growth. In this study, a platform consisting of a high-throughput screening and a machine-learning surrogate model for discovering superionic Li-SSEs among 20,237 Li-containing materials is developed. For the training database, the ionic conductivity of Na SuperIonic CONductor (NASICON) and Li SuperIonic CONductor (LISICON) type SSEs are obtained from the previous literature. Then, the chemical descriptor (CD) and additional structural properties are used as machine-readable features. Li-SSE candidates are selected through the screening criteria, and the prediction on the ionic conductivity of those is followed. Then, to reduce uncertainty in the surrogate model, the ensemble method by considering the best-performing two models is employed, whose mean prediction accuracy is 0.843 and 0.829, respectively. Furthermore, first-principles calculations are conducted for confirming the ionic conductivity of the strong candidates. Finally, six potential superionic Li-SSEs that have not previously been investigated are proposed. We believe that the constructed platform can accelerate the search for Li-SSEs with high ionic conductivity at minimum cost.
abstract_zh: 锂离子固态电解质（Li-SSE）是一种很有前途的解决方案，它解决了传统锂离子电池（LIB）的关键问题，例如离子电导率差、界面不稳定和枝晶生长等。在这项研究中，开发了一个由高通量筛选和机器学习替代模型组成的平台，用于在 20,237 种含锂材料中发现超离子 Li-SSE。对于训练数据库，Na SuperIonic CONductor (NASICON) 和 Li SuperIonic CONductor (LISICON) 型 SSE 的离子电导率是从以前的文献中获得的。然后，化学描述符（CD）和附加结构特性被用作机器可读的特征。通过筛选标准选择Li-SSE候选物，并对其离子电导率进行预测。然后，为了减少代理模型的不确定性，采用考虑表现最好的两个模型的集成方法，其平均预测精度分别为0.843和0.829。此外，还进行了第一性原理计算，以确认强候选材料的离子电导率。最后，提出了六种之前尚未研究过的潜在超离子 Li-SSE。我们相信，所构建的平台可以以最低的成本加速寻找具有高离子电导率的Li-SSE。

AI.tldr: 开发结合高通量筛选与机器学习的平台，用于发现具有高离子电导率的锂离子固态电解质（Li-SSEs）。
AI.motivation: 传统锂离子电池存在离子电导率低、界面不稳定及枝晶生长等问题，亟需高效发现高性能固态电解质的方法。
AI.method: 基于NASICON和LISICON类型电解质的离子电导率数据，利用化学描述符和结构特性作为特征训练机器学习模型，并通过集成学习降低预测不确定性，结合第一性原理计算验证候选材料。
AI.result: 提出六种未被研究过的潜在超离子导体Li-SSEs，模型预测准确率分别为0.843和0.829。
AI.conclusion: 该平台可高效低成本加速高离子电导率Li-SSEs的筛选与发现。

search_text: Machine Learning-Aided Discovery of Superionic Solid-State Electrolyte for Li-Ion Batteries 机器学习辅助发现锂离子电池超离子固态电解质 Li-Ion Solid-State Electrolytes (Li-SSEs) are a promising solution that resolves the critical issues of conventional Li-Ion Batteries (LIBs) such as poor ionic conductivity, interfacial instability, and dendrites growth. In this study, a platform consisting of a high-throughput screening and a machine-learning surrogate model for discovering superionic Li-SSEs among 20,237 Li-containing materials is developed. For the training database, the ionic conductivity of Na SuperIonic CONductor (NASICON) and Li SuperIonic CONductor (LISICON) type SSEs are obtained from the previous literature. Then, the chemical descriptor (CD) and additional structural properties are used as machine-readable features. Li-SSE candidates are selected through the screening criteria, and the prediction on the ionic conductivity of those is followed. Then, to reduce uncertainty in the surrogate model, the ensemble method by considering the best-performing two models is employed, whose mean prediction accuracy is 0.843 and 0.829, respectively. Furthermore, first-principles calculations are conducted for confirming the ionic conductivity of the strong candidates. Finally, six potential superionic Li-SSEs that have not previously been investigated are proposed. We believe that the constructed platform can accelerate the search for Li-SSEs with high ionic conductivity at minimum cost. 锂离子固态电解质（Li-SSE）是一种很有前途的解决方案，它解决了传统锂离子电池（LIB）的关键问题，例如离子电导率差、界面不稳定和枝晶生长等。在这项研究中，开发了一个由高通量筛选和机器学习替代模型组成的平台，用于在 20,237 种含锂材料中发现超离子 Li-SSE。对于训练数据库，Na SuperIonic CONductor (NASICON) 和 Li SuperIonic CONductor (LISICON) 型 SSE 的离子电导率是从以前的文献中获得的。然后，化学描述符（CD）和附加结构特性被用作机器可读的特征。通过筛选标准选择Li-SSE候选物，并对其离子电导率进行预测。然后，为了减少代理模型的不确定性，采用考虑表现最好的两个模型的集成方法，其平均预测精度分别为0.843和0.829。此外，还进行了第一性原理计算，以确认强候选材料的离子电导率。最后，提出了六种之前尚未研究过的潜在超离子 Li-SSE。我们相信，所构建的平台可以以最低的成本加速寻找具有高离子电导率的Li-SSE。 开发结合高通量筛选与机器学习的平台，用于发现具有高离子电导率的锂离子固态电解质（Li-SSEs）。 Seungpyo Kang,Minseon Kim,Kyoungmin Min cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.AI

authors_text: Maximilian Brunner,Livio Giacomini,Roland Siegwart,Marco Tognon
title: Energy Tank-Based Policies for Robust Aerial Physical Interaction with Moving Objects
title_zh: 基于能量罐的策略，用于与移动物体进行鲁棒的空中物理交互
abstract: Although manipulation capabilities of aerial robots greatly improved in the last decade, only few works addressed the problem of aerial physical interaction with dynamic environments, proposing strongly model-based approaches. However, in real scenarios, modeling the environment with high accuracy is often impossible. In this work we aim at developing a control framework for OMAVs for reliable physical interaction tasks with articulated and movable objects in the presence of possibly unforeseen disturbances, and without relying on an accurate model of the environment. Inspired by previous applications of energy-based controllers for physical interaction, we propose a passivity-based impedance and wrench tracking controller in combination with a momentum-based wrench estimator. This is combined with an energy-tank framework to guarantee the stability of the system, while energy and power flow-based adaptation policies are deployed to enable safe interaction with any type of passive environment. The control framework provides formal guarantees of stability, which is validated in practice considering the challenging task of pushing a cart of unknown mass, moving on a surface of unknown friction, as well as subjected to unknown disturbances. For this scenario, we present, evaluate and discuss three different policies.
summary: Although manipulation capabilities of aerial robots greatly improved in the last decade, only few works addressed the problem of aerial physical interaction with dynamic environments, proposing strongly model-based approaches. However, in real scenarios, modeling the environment with high accuracy is often impossible. In this work we aim at developing a control framework for OMAVs for reliable physical interaction tasks with articulated and movable objects in the presence of possibly unforeseen disturbances, and without relying on an accurate model of the environment. Inspired by previous applications of energy-based controllers for physical interaction, we propose a passivity-based impedance and wrench tracking controller in combination with a momentum-based wrench estimator. This is combined with an energy-tank framework to guarantee the stability of the system, while energy and power flow-based adaptation policies are deployed to enable safe interaction with any type of passive environment. The control framework provides formal guarantees of stability, which is validated in practice considering the challenging task of pushing a cart of unknown mass, moving on a surface of unknown friction, as well as subjected to unknown disturbances. For this scenario, we present, evaluate and discuss three different policies.
abstract_zh: 尽管空中机器人的操纵能力在过去十年中大大提高，但只有少数作品解决了空中物理与动态环境的交互问题，提出了基于模型的方法。然而，在实际场景中，高精度地对环境进行建模通常是不可能的。在这项工作中，我们的目标是开发一个 OMAV 控制框架，用于在可能存在不可预见的干扰的情况下与铰接式和可移动物体执行可靠的物理交互任务，并且不依赖于准确的环境模型。受到先前基于能量的控制器在物理交互中的应用的启发，我们提出了一种基于无源的阻抗和扳手跟踪控制器，与基于动量的扳手估计器相结合。其与能量罐框架相结合，以保证系统的稳定性，同时部署基于能量和功率流的适应策略，以实现与任何类型的被动环境的安全交互。控制框架提供了稳定性的正式保证，考虑到推动未知质量的推车、在未知摩擦力的表面上移动以及受到未知干扰的挑战性任务，这一点在实践中得到了验证。对于这种情况，我们提出、评估和讨论三种不同的政策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能量罐的控制框架，使OMAVs能够在无需精确环境模型的情况下实现与动态物体的鲁棒物理交互。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机器人物理交互方法依赖精确环境建模，但实际场景中建模困难且存在未预见干扰，需开发无需模型的鲁棒控制策略。
AI.method: 结合被动阻抗控制与动量估计器，通过能量罐框架保障系统稳定性，并采用能量/功率流自适应策略实现安全交互。
AI.result: 在未知质量推车、未知摩擦表面等场景中验证了三种策略的有效性，证明框架可提供稳定性保证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制框架为OMAVs与被动环境的物理交互提供了理论保证和实践验证，适用于复杂动态场景。

authors_text: Josef Spjut,Fengyuan Zhu,Xiaolei Huang,Yichen Shou,Ben Boudaoud,Omer Shapira,Morgan McGuire
title: Experimental Augmented Reality User Experience
title_zh: 实验性增强现实用户体验
comment: 2 pages, 3 figures, work original completed in 2019
comments: 2 pages, 3 figures, work original completed in 2019
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) is an emerging field ripe for experimentation, especially when it comes to developing the kinds of applications and experiences that will drive mass adoption of the technology. While we aren't aware of any current consumer product that realize a wearable, wide Field of View (FoV), AR Head Mounted Display (HMD), such devices will certainly come. In order for these sophisticated, likely high-cost hardware products to succeed, it is important they provide a high quality user experience. To that end, we prototyped 4 experimental applications for wide FoV displays that will likely exist in the future. Given current AR HMD limitations, we used a AR simulator built on web technology and VR headsets to demonstrate these applications, allowing users and designers to peer into the future.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) is an emerging field ripe for experimentation, especially when it comes to developing the kinds of applications and experiences that will drive mass adoption of the technology. While we aren't aware of any current consumer product that realize a wearable, wide Field of View (FoV), AR Head Mounted Display (HMD), such devices will certainly come. In order for these sophisticated, likely high-cost hardware products to succeed, it is important they provide a high quality user experience. To that end, we prototyped 4 experimental applications for wide FoV displays that will likely exist in the future. Given current AR HMD limitations, we used a AR simulator built on web technology and VR headsets to demonstrate these applications, allowing users and designers to peer into the future.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 是一个适合实验的新兴领域，尤其是在开发可推动该技术大规模采用的应用程序和体验时。虽然我们不知道目前有任何消费产品能够实现可穿戴、宽视场 (FoV)、AR 头戴式显示器 (HMD)，但此类设备肯定会出现。为了使这些复杂且可能高成本的硬件产品取得成功，提供高质量的用户体验非常重要。为此，我们针对未来可能存在的宽视场显示器制作了 4 个实验应用原型。鉴于当前 AR HMD 的局限性，我们使用基于网络技术和 VR 耳机构建的 AR 模拟器来演示这些应用程序，让用户和设计师能够展望未来。

AI.tldr: 本文通过开发4个实验性AR应用，利用AR模拟器和VR头显预览未来宽视场AR设备的用户体验，为后续硬件开发提供参考。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏成熟的宽视场AR头显设备，但未来这类设备可能成为主流。为确保其用户体验质量，需提前探索潜在应用形式。
AI.method: 基于Web技术构建AR模拟器，结合现有VR头显设备，实现4个面向未来AR场景的实验性应用原型。
AI.result: 验证了通过模拟器和VR设备预览未来AR体验的可行性，为设计师和开发者提供了前瞻性体验评估工具。
AI.conclusion: 采用模拟器与现有VR设备结合的方式，可有效探索下一代AR用户体验方案，为硬件研发提供早期反馈

authors_text: Luca Hermes,Barbara Hammer,Andrew Melnik,Riza Velioglu,Markus Vieth,Malte Schilling
title: A Graph-based U-Net Model for Predicting Traffic in unseen Cities
title_zh: 用于预测未知城市交通流量的基于图的 U-Net 模型
comment: About to be published in IJCNN Proceedings 2022
comments: About to be published in IJCNN Proceedings 2022
abstract: Accurate traffic prediction is a key ingredient to enable traffic management like rerouting cars to reduce road congestion or regulating traffic via dynamic speed limits to maintain a steady flow. A way to represent traffic data is in the form of temporally changing heatmaps visualizing attributes of traffic, such as speed and volume. In recent works, U-Net models have shown SOTA performance on traffic forecasting from heatmaps. We propose to combine the U-Net architecture with graph layers which improves spatial generalization to unseen road networks compared to a Vanilla U-Net. In particular, we specialize existing graph operations to be sensitive to geographical topology and generalize pooling and upsampling operations to be applicable to graphs.
summary: Accurate traffic prediction is a key ingredient to enable traffic management like rerouting cars to reduce road congestion or regulating traffic via dynamic speed limits to maintain a steady flow. A way to represent traffic data is in the form of temporally changing heatmaps visualizing attributes of traffic, such as speed and volume. In recent works, U-Net models have shown SOTA performance on traffic forecasting from heatmaps. We propose to combine the U-Net architecture with graph layers which improves spatial generalization to unseen road networks compared to a Vanilla U-Net. In particular, we specialize existing graph operations to be sensitive to geographical topology and generalize pooling and upsampling operations to be applicable to graphs.
abstract_zh: 准确的交通预测是实现交通管理的关键因素，例如改变汽车路线以减少道路拥堵或通过动态限速调节交通以保持稳定的流量。表示交通数据的一种方法是采用随时间变化的热图的形式，将交通属性（例如速度和流量）可视化。在最近的工作中，U-Net 模型在热图流量预测方面展示了 SOTA 性能。我们建议将 U-Net 架构与图层相结合，与 Vanilla U-Net 相比，这可以提高对不可见道路网络的空间泛化能力。特别是，我们将现有的图操作专门化为对地理拓扑敏感，并将池化和上采样操作概括为适用于图。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图结构的U-Net模型，用于预测未见过的城市的交通状况
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net在未见过的道路网络上泛化能力不足，需结合图结构提升空间适应性
AI.method: 将U-Net与图层结合，改进池化和上采样操作以适应图结构，增强地理拓扑敏感性
AI.result: 模型在基准数据集上优于传统U-Net，尤其在未见过的城市中表现更优
AI.conclusion: 图结构增强的U-Net有效提升了交通预测模型在未见过城市中的泛化能力

A way to represent traffic data is in the form of temporally changing heatmaps visualizing attributes of traffic, such as speed and volume. In recent works, U-Net models have shown SOTA performance on traffic forecasting from heatmaps. We propose to combine the U-Net architecture with graph layers which improves spatial generalization to unseen road networks compared to a Vanilla U-Net. authors_text: Diana A. Olejnik,Sunyi Wang,Julien Dupeyroux,Stein Stroobants,Matěj Karásek,Christophe De Wagter,Guido de Croon
title: An Experimental Study of Wind Resistance and Power Consumption in MAVs with a Low-Speed Multi-Fan Wind System
title_zh: 低速多风扇风力系统微型飞行器风阻与功耗实验研究
abstract: This paper discusses a low-cost, open-source and open-hardware design and performance evaluation of a low-speed, multi-fan wind system dedicated to micro air vehicle (MAV) testing. In addition, a set of experiments with a flapping wing MAV and rotorcraft is presented, demonstrating the capabilities of the system and the properties of these different types of drones in response to various types of wind. We performed two sets of experiments where a MAV is flying into the wake of the fan system, gathering data about states, battery voltage and current. Firstly, we focus on steady wind conditions with wind speeds ranging from 0.5 m/s to 3.4 m/s. During the second set of experiments, we introduce wind gusts, by periodically modulating the wind speed from 1.3 m/s to 3.4 m/s with wind gust oscillations of 0.5 Hz, 0.25 Hz and 0.125 Hz. The "Flapper" flapping wing MAV requires much larger pitch angles to counter wind than the "CrazyFlie" quadrotor. This is due to the Flapper's larger wing surface. In forward flight, its wings do provide extra lift, considerably reducing the power consumption. In contrast, the CrazyFlie's power consumption stays more constant for different wind speeds. The experiments with the varying wind show a quicker gust response by the CrazyFlie compared with the Flapper drone, but both their responses could be further improved. We expect that the proposed wind gust system will provide a useful tool to the community to achieve such improvements.
summary: This paper discusses a low-cost, open-source and open-hardware design and performance evaluation of a low-speed, multi-fan wind system dedicated to micro air vehicle (MAV) testing. In addition, a set of experiments with a flapping wing MAV and rotorcraft is presented, demonstrating the capabilities of the system and the properties of these different types of drones in response to various types of wind. We performed two sets of experiments where a MAV is flying into the wake of the fan system, gathering data about states, battery voltage and current. Firstly, we focus on steady wind conditions with wind speeds ranging from 0.5 m/s to 3.4 m/s. During the second set of experiments, we introduce wind gusts, by periodically modulating the wind speed from 1.3 m/s to 3.4 m/s with wind gust oscillations of 0.5 Hz, 0.25 Hz and 0.125 Hz. The "Flapper" flapping wing MAV requires much larger pitch angles to counter wind than the "CrazyFlie" quadrotor. This is due to the Flapper's larger wing surface. In forward flight, its wings do provide extra lift, considerably reducing the power consumption. In contrast, the CrazyFlie's power consumption stays more constant for different wind speeds. The experiments with the varying wind show a quicker gust response by the CrazyFlie compared with the Flapper drone, but both their responses could be further improved. We expect that the proposed wind gust system will provide a useful tool to the community to achieve such improvements.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了专用于微型飞行器（MAV）测试的低速、多风扇风力系统的低成本、开源和开放硬件设计和性能评估。此外，还介绍了一组扑翼微型飞行器和旋翼机的实验，展示了系统的功能以及这些不同类型无人机响应各种类型风的特性。我们进行了两组实验，其中 MAV 飞入风扇系统的尾流，收集有关状态、电池电压和电流的数据。首先，我们关注风速范围为 0.5 m/s 至 3.4 m/s 的稳定风况。在第二组实验中，我们引入阵风，将风速从 1.3 m/s 周期性调节到 3.4 m/s，阵风振荡为 0.5 Hz、0.25 Hz 和 0.125 Hz。与“CrazyFlie”四旋翼飞行器相比，“Flapper”扑翼微型飞行器需要更大的俯仰角来对抗风。这是由于 Flapper 的机翼表面较大。在向前飞行时，它的机翼确实提供了额外的升力，大大降低了功耗。相比之下，CrazyFlie 的功耗在不同风速下保持更恒定。不同风力的实验表明，与 Flapper 无人机相比，CrazyFlie 的阵风响应更快，但它们的响应都可以进一步改进。我们期望所提出的阵风系统将为社区提供一个有用的工具来实现此类改进。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种低成本、开源的多风扇风系统，用于测试微型飞行器（MAV）在不同风速和风 gust 条件下的抗风能力和功耗。
AI.motivation: 开发一种经济高效的风洞系统以测试MAV性能，并比较扑翼机与四旋翼无人机在不同风条件下的响应差异，以指导未来设计优化。
AI.method: 构建低速多风扇风系统，对扑翼MAV（Flapper）和四旋翼机（CrazyFlie）进行两组实验：1）稳态风速0.5-3.4 m/s；2）周期性风 gust（0.5-0.125 Hz）。记录飞行状态、电压和电流数据。
AI.result: Flapper需更大迎角对抗风力，但前飞时翼面增升降低功耗；CrazyFlie功耗更稳定，且对风 gust 响应更快，但两者响应均需改进。
AI.conclusion: 该风 gust 系统为MAV性能研究提供有效工具，揭示了不同机型的风阻特性差异，未来需优化 gust 响应机制。

authors_text: Namuk Park,Songkuk Kim
title: How Do Vision Transformers Work?
title_zh: 视觉转换器如何工作？
abstract: The success of multi-head self-attentions (MSAs) for computer vision is now indisputable. However, little is known about how MSAs work. We present fundamental explanations to help better understand the nature of MSAs. In particular, we demonstrate the following properties of MSAs and Vision Transformers (ViTs): (1) MSAs improve not only accuracy but also generalization by flattening the loss landscapes. Such improvement is primarily attributable to their data specificity, not long-range dependency. On the other hand, ViTs suffer from non-convex losses. Large datasets and loss landscape smoothing methods alleviate this problem; (2) MSAs and Convs exhibit opposite behaviors. For example, MSAs are low-pass filters, but Convs are high-pass filters. Therefore, MSAs and Convs are complementary; (3) Multi-stage neural networks behave like a series connection of small individual models. In addition, MSAs at the end of a stage play a key role in prediction. Based on these insights, we propose AlterNet, a model in which Conv blocks at the end of a stage are replaced with MSA blocks. AlterNet outperforms CNNs not only in large data regimes but also in small data regimes. The code is available at https://github.com/xxxnell/how-do-vits-work.
summary: The success of multi-head self-attentions (MSAs) for computer vision is now indisputable. However, little is known about how MSAs work. We present fundamental explanations to help better understand the nature of MSAs. In particular, we demonstrate the following properties of MSAs and Vision Transformers (ViTs): (1) MSAs improve not only accuracy but also generalization by flattening the loss landscapes. Such improvement is primarily attributable to their data specificity, not long-range dependency. On the other hand, ViTs suffer from non-convex losses. Large datasets and loss landscape smoothing methods alleviate this problem; (2) MSAs and Convs exhibit opposite behaviors. For example, MSAs are low-pass filters, but Convs are high-pass filters. Therefore, MSAs and Convs are complementary; (3) Multi-stage neural networks behave like a series connection of small individual models. In addition, MSAs at the end of a stage play a key role in prediction. Based on these insights, we propose AlterNet, a model in which Conv blocks at the end of a stage are replaced with MSA blocks. AlterNet outperforms CNNs not only in large data regimes but also in small data regimes. The code is available at https://github.com/xxxnell/how-do-vits-work.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉多头自注意力（MSA）的成功现在是无可争议的。然而，人们对 MSA 的工作原理知之甚少。我们提出基本解释，以帮助更好地理解 MSA 的性质。特别是，我们展示了 MSA 和视觉变换器 (ViT) 的以下属性：(1) MSA 不仅提高了准确性，而且还通过平坦化损失景观提高了泛化能力。这种改进主要归因于它们的数据特异性，而不是远程依赖性。另一方面，ViT 遭受非凸损失。大型数据集和损失景观平滑方法缓解了这个问题； (2) MSA 和 Conv 表现出相反的行为。例如，MSA 是低通滤波器，而 Conv 是高通滤波器。因此，MSA 和 Conv 是互补的； (3) 多级神经网络的行为就像小型个体模型的串联。此外，阶段结束时的 MSA 在预测中发挥着关键作用。基于这些见解，我们提出了 AlterNet，这是一种将阶段末尾的 Conv 块替换为 MSA 块的模型。 AlterNet 不仅在大数据领域而且在小数据领域都优于 CNN。该代码可在 https://github.com/xxxnell/how-do-vits-work 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解释视觉Transformer（ViT）中多头自注意力（MSA）的工作原理，并提出改进模型AlterNet。
AI.motivation: 尽管MSA在计算机视觉中取得成功，但其机制尚不明确，需深入理解其提升准确性和泛化能力的原因及与卷积（Conv）的差异。
AI.method: 通过分析MSA的特性（如平坦化损失景观、低通滤波行为），对比MSA与Conv的差异，并设计多阶段网络结构，提出用MSA替代Conv的AlterNet模型。
AI.result: AlterNet在大规模和小规模数据集上均优于传统卷积神经网络（CNNs）。
AI.conclusion: MSA通过数据特异性优化损失景观，与Conv互补，AlterNet验证了MSA在多阶段网络中的关键作用，为ViT设计提供新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 尽管MSA在计算机视觉中取得成功，但其机制尚不明确，需深入理解其提升准确性和泛化能力的原因及与卷积（Conv）的差异。

search_text: How Do Vision Transformers Work? 视觉转换器如何工作？ The success of multi-head self-attentions (MSAs) for computer vision is now indisputable. However, little is known about how MSAs work. We present fundamental explanations to help better understand the nature of MSAs. In particular, we demonstrate the following properties of MSAs and Vision Transformers (ViTs): (1) MSAs improve not only accuracy but also generalization by flattening the loss landscapes. Such improvement is primarily attributable to their data specificity, not long-range dependency. On the other hand, ViTs suffer from non-convex losses. Large datasets and loss landscape smoothing methods alleviate this problem; (2) MSAs and Convs exhibit opposite behaviors. For example, MSAs are low-pass filters, but Convs are high-pass filters. Therefore, MSAs and Convs are complementary; (3) Multi-stage neural networks behave like a series connection of small individual models. In addition, MSAs at the end of a stage play a key role in prediction. Based on these insights, we propose AlterNet, a model in which Conv blocks at the end of a stage are replaced with MSA blocks. AlterNet outperforms CNNs not only in large data regimes but also in small data regimes. The code is available at https://github.com/xxxnell/how-do-vits-work. 计算机视觉多头自注意力（MSA）的成功现在是无可争议的。然而，人们对 MSA 的工作原理知之甚少。我们提出基本解释，以帮助更好地理解 MSA 的性质。特别是，我们展示了 MSA 和视觉变换器 (ViT) 的以下属性：(1) MSA 不仅提高了准确性，而且还通过平坦化损失景观提高了泛化能力。这种改进主要归因于它们的数据特异性，而不是远程依赖性。另一方面，ViT 遭受非凸损失。大型数据集和损失景观平滑方法缓解了这个问题； (2) MSA 和 Conv 表现出相反的行为。例如，MSA 是低通滤波器，而 Conv 是高通滤波器。因此，MSA 和 Conv 是互补的； (3) 多级神经网络的行为就像小型个体模型的串联。此外，阶段结束时的 MSA 在预测中发挥着关键作用。基于这些见解，我们提出了 AlterNet，这是一种将阶段末尾的 Conv 块替换为 MSA 块的模型。 AlterNet 不仅在大数据领域而且在小数据领域都优于 CNN。该代码可在 https://github.com/xxxnell/how-do-vits-work 获取。 本文旨在解释视觉Transformer（ViT）中多头自注意力（MSA）的工作原理，并提出改进模型AlterNet。 Namuk Park,Songkuk Kim cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Stefan Kratsch,Florian Nelles,Alexandre Simon
title: On Triangle Counting Parameterized by Twin-Width
title_zh: 关于双宽参数化的三角形计数
abstract: In this report we present an algorithm solving Triangle Counting in time $O(d^2n+m)$, where n and m, respectively, denote the number of vertices and edges of a graph G and d denotes its twin-width, a recently introduced graph parameter. We assume that a compact representation of a d-contraction sequence of G is given.
summary: In this report we present an algorithm solving Triangle Counting in time $O(d^2n+m)$, where n and m, respectively, denote the number of vertices and edges of a graph G and d denotes its twin-width, a recently introduced graph parameter. We assume that a compact representation of a d-contraction sequence of G is given.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们提出了一种在 $O(d^2n+m)$ 时间内求解三角形计数的算法，其中 n 和 m 分别表示图 G 的顶点和边的数量，d 表示其孪生宽度（最近引入的图参数）。我们假设给出了 G 的 d 收缩序列的紧凑表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的twin-width参数的三角形计数算法。
AI.motivation: 传统三角形计数算法在大规模图上效率低下，而twin-width作为新兴图参数可能提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用给定的紧凑d-contraction序列表示，设计时间复杂度为O(d²n + m)的算法。
AI.result: 实现了参数化三角形计数算法，时间复杂度依赖于twin-width参数d和图规模n/m。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为三角形计数问题提供了新的参数化方法，尤其适用于twin-width较小的图类。

authors_text: Ilya Kiselev,Chang Gao,Shih-Chii Liu
title: Spiking Cochlea with System-level Local Automatic Gain Control
title_zh: 具有系统级本地自动增益控制的尖峰耳蜗
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I - Regular Papers, 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I - Regular Papers, 2022
abstract: Including local automatic gain control (AGC) circuitry into a silicon cochlea design has been challenging because of transistor mismatch and model complexity. To address this, we present an alternative system-level algorithm that implements channel-specific AGC in a silicon spiking cochlea by measuring the output spike activity of individual channels. The bandpass filter gain of a channel is adapted dynamically to the input amplitude so that the average output spike rate stays within a defined range. Because this AGC mechanism only needs counting and adding operations, it can be implemented at low hardware cost in a future design. We evaluate the impact of the local AGC algorithm on a classification task where the input signal varies over 32 dB input range. Two classifier types receiving cochlea spike features were tested on a speech versus noise classification task. The logistic regression classifier achieves an average of 6% improvement and 40.8% relative improvement in accuracy when the AGC is enabled. The deep neural network classifier shows a similar improvement for the AGC case and achieves a higher mean accuracy of 96% compared to the best accuracy of 91% from the logistic regression classifier.
summary: Including local automatic gain control (AGC) circuitry into a silicon cochlea design has been challenging because of transistor mismatch and model complexity. To address this, we present an alternative system-level algorithm that implements channel-specific AGC in a silicon spiking cochlea by measuring the output spike activity of individual channels. The bandpass filter gain of a channel is adapted dynamically to the input amplitude so that the average output spike rate stays within a defined range. Because this AGC mechanism only needs counting and adding operations, it can be implemented at low hardware cost in a future design. We evaluate the impact of the local AGC algorithm on a classification task where the input signal varies over 32 dB input range. Two classifier types receiving cochlea spike features were tested on a speech versus noise classification task. The logistic regression classifier achieves an average of 6% improvement and 40.8% relative improvement in accuracy when the AGC is enabled. The deep neural network classifier shows a similar improvement for the AGC case and achieves a higher mean accuracy of 96% compared to the best accuracy of 91% from the logistic regression classifier.
abstract_zh: 由于晶体管失配和模型复杂性，将本地自动增益控制 (AGC) 电路纳入硅耳蜗设计一直具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种替代系统级算法，通过测量各个通道的输出尖峰活动，在硅尖峰耳蜗中实现通道特定的 AGC。通道的带通滤波器增益动态地适应输入幅度，以便平均输出尖峰率保持在定义的范围内。由于该AGC机制只需要计数和加法运算，因此在未来的设计中可以以较低的硬件成本实现。我们评估本地 AGC 算法对输入信号在 32 dB 输入范围内变化的分类任务的影响。在语音与噪声分类任务中测试了两种接收耳蜗尖峰特征的分类器类型。当启用 AGC 时，逻辑回归分类器的准确率平均提高 6%，相对精度提高 40.8%。深度神经网络分类器在 AGC 情况下也显示出类似的改进，与逻辑回归分类器 91% 的最佳准确度相比，平均准确度更高，达到 96%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统级局部自动增益控制（AGC）算法，用于硅基脉冲耳蜗设计，以解决因晶体管失配和模型复杂性导致的集成难题。
AI.motivation: 传统硅基耳蜗设计中集成局部AGC电路面临晶体管失配和模型复杂性的挑战，需寻找低硬件成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过测量单个通道的输出脉冲活动，动态调整通道的带通滤波器增益，使平均输出脉冲率保持在设定范围内，仅需计数和加法操作。
AI.result: 在32dB输入范围的语音与噪声分类任务中，启用AGC后逻辑回归分类器准确率提升6%（相对提升40.8%），深度神经网络分类器均准确率达96%，优于逻辑回归的91%。
AI.conclusion: 该AGC机制有效提升了分类性能且硬件成本低，为未来硅基耳蜗设计提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Louis-Henri Merino,Simone Colombo,Rene Reyes,Alaleh Azhir,Shailesh Mishra,Pasindu Tennage,Mohammad Amin Raeisi,Haoqian Zhang,Jeff R. Allen,Bernhard Tellenbach,Vero Estrada-Galiñanes,Bryan Ford
title: TRIP: Coercion-resistant Registration for E-Voting with Verifiability and Usability in Votegral
title_zh: TRIP：电子投票的抗强制注册以及 Votegral 中的可验证性和可用性
comment: Extended version, To appear at ACM SIGOPS 31st Symposium on Operating Systems Principles (SOSP '25), October 13--16, 2025, Seoul, Republic of Korea
comments: Extended version, To appear at ACM SIGOPS 31st Symposium on Operating Systems Principles (SOSP '25), October 13--16, 2025, Seoul, Republic of Korea
abstract: Online voting is convenient and flexible, but amplifies the risks of voter coercion and vote buying. One promising mitigation strategy enables voters to give a coercer fake voting credentials, which silently cast votes that do not count. Current systems along these lines make problematic assumptions about credential issuance, however, such as strong trust in a registrar and/or in voter-controlled hardware, or expecting voters to interact with multiple registrars. Votegral is the first coercion-resistant voting architecture that leverages the physical security of in-person registration to address these credential-issuance challenges, amortizing the convenience costs of in-person registration by reusing credentials across successive elections. Votegral's registration component, TRIP, gives voters a kiosk in a privacy booth with which to print real and fake credentials on paper, eliminating dependence on trusted hardware in credential issuance. The voter learns and can verify in the privacy booth which credential is real, but real and fake credentials thereafter appear indistinguishable to others. Only voters actually under coercion, a hopefully-rare case, need to trust the kiosk. To achieve verifiability, each paper credential encodes an interactive zero-knowledge proof, which is sound in real credentials but unsound in fake credentials. Voters observe the difference in the order of printing steps, but need not understand the technical details. Experimental results with our prototype suggest that Votegral is practical and sufficiently scalable for real-world elections. User-visible latency of credential issuance in TRIP is at most 19.7 seconds even on resource-constrained kiosk hardware. A companion usability study indicates that TRIP's usability is competitive with other e-voting systems, and formal proofs support TRIP's combination of coercion-resistance and verifiability.

abstract_zh: 网络投票方便灵活，但也放大了选民胁迫和买票的风险。一种有希望的缓解策略使选民能够向胁迫者提供虚假的投票凭证，从而默默地投出不计数的选票。然而，当前的系统对证书颁发做出了有问题的假设，例如对注册商和/或选民控制的硬件的强烈信任，或者期望选民与多个注册商进行交互。 Votegral 是第一个抗强制投票架构，它利用亲自注册的物理安全性来解决这些凭证颁发挑战，通过在连续选举中重复使用凭证来分摊亲自注册的便利成本。 Votegral 的注册组件 TRIP 在隐私亭为选民提供了一个信息亭，可以在纸上打印真实和虚假的凭证，从而消除了凭证颁发中对可信硬件的依赖。选民可以在隐私亭中了解并验证哪些凭证是真实的，但此后其他人就无法区分真假凭证。只有真正受到胁迫的选民（希望这种情况很少见）才需要信任这个信息亭。为了实现可验证性，每个纸质凭证都编码了一个交互式零知识证明，该证明在真实凭证中是可靠的，但在虚假凭证中是不可靠的。投票者观察打印步骤顺序的差异，但不需要了解技术细节。我们原型的实验结果表明，Votegral 对于现实世界的选举来说是实用的并且具有足够的可扩展性。即使在资源有限的自助服务终端硬件上，TRIP 中用户可见的凭证颁发延迟也最多为 19.7 秒。一项配套的可用性研究表明，TRIP 的可用性与其他电子投票系统相比具有竞争力，并且形式证明支持 TRIP 的抗强制性和可验证性的结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIP系统，通过结合物理安全的现场注册与零知识证明技术，解决电子投票中的选民胁迫问题，同时保证可验证性和可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有电子投票系统在防范选民胁迫和贿选时，依赖可信硬件或注册机构，存在安全隐患且流程复杂。需设计无需强信任假设且用户友好的解决方案。
AI.method: TRIP利用隐私 booth 内的kiosk设备，允许选民打印真实与伪造凭证，通过交互式零知识证明区分凭证有效性，仅胁迫情况下需信任kiosk，避免依赖可信硬件。
AI.result: 原型实验显示凭证发放延迟最低19.7秒，系统可扩展性强；可用性测试表明其与现有电子投票系统相当，形式化证明支持其安全特性。
AI.conclusion: TRIP通过物理安全与密码学技术结合，有效实现抗胁迫与可验证性，为实际电子选举提供可行方案。

search_text: TRIP: Coercion-resistant Registration for E-Voting with Verifiability and Usability in Votegral TRIP：电子投票的抗强制注册以及 Votegral 中的可验证性和可用性 Online voting is convenient and flexible, but amplifies the risks of voter coercion and vote buying. One promising mitigation strategy enables voters to give a coercer fake voting credentials, which silently cast votes that do not count. Current systems along these lines make problematic assumptions about credential issuance, however, such as strong trust in a registrar and/or in voter-controlled hardware, or expecting voters to interact with multiple registrars. Votegral is the first coercion-resistant voting architecture that leverages the physical security of in-person registration to address these credential-issuance challenges, amortizing the convenience costs of in-person registration by reusing credentials across successive elections. Votegral's registration component, TRIP, gives voters a kiosk in a privacy booth with which to print real and fake credentials on paper, eliminating dependence on trusted hardware in credential issuance. The voter learns and can verify in the privacy booth which credential is real, but real and fake credentials thereafter appear indistinguishable to others. Only voters actually under coercion, a hopefully-rare case, need to trust the kiosk. To achieve verifiability, each paper credential encodes an interactive zero-knowledge proof, which is sound in real credentials but unsound in fake credentials. Voters observe the difference in the order of printing steps, but need not understand the technical details. Experimental results with our prototype suggest that Votegral is practical and sufficiently scalable for real-world elections. User-visible latency of credential issuance in TRIP is at most 19.7 seconds even on resource-constrained kiosk hardware. A companion usability study indicates that TRIP's usability is competitive with other e-voting systems, and formal proofs support TRIP's combination of coercion-resistance and verifiability. 网络投票方便灵活，但也放大了选民胁迫和买票的风险。一种有希望的缓解策略使选民能够向胁迫者提供虚假的投票凭证，从而默默地投出不计数的选票。然而，当前的系统对证书颁发做出了有问题的假设，例如对注册商和/或选民控制的硬件的强烈信任，或者期望选民与多个注册商进行交互。 Votegral 是第一个抗强制投票架构，它利用亲自注册的物理安全性来解决这些凭证颁发挑战，通过在连续选举中重复使用凭证来分摊亲自注册的便利成本。 Votegral 的注册组件 TRIP 在隐私亭为选民提供了一个信息亭，可以在纸上打印真实和虚假的凭证，从而消除了凭证颁发中对可信硬件的依赖。选民可以在隐私亭中了解并验证哪些凭证是真实的，但此后其他人就无法区分真假凭证。只有真正受到胁迫的选民（希望这种情况很少见）才需要信任这个信息亭。为了实现可验证性，每个纸质凭证都编码了一个交互式零知识证明，该证明在真实凭证中是可靠的，但在虚假凭证中是不可靠的。投票者观察打印步骤顺序的差异，但不需要了解技术细节。我们原型的实验结果表明，Votegral 对于现实世界的选举来说是实用的并且具有足够的可扩展性。即使在资源有限的自助服务终端硬件上，TRIP 中用户可见的凭证颁发延迟也最多为 19.7 秒。一项配套的可用性研究表明，TRIP 的可用性与其他电子投票系统相比具有竞争力，并且形式证明支持 TRIP 的抗强制性和可验证性的结合。 本文提出TRIP系统，通过结合物理安全的现场注册与零知识证明技术，解决电子投票中的选民胁迫问题，同时保证可验证性和可用性。 Louis-Henri Merino,Simone Colombo,Rene Reyes,Alaleh Azhir,Shailesh Mishra,Pasindu Tennage,Mohammad Amin Raeisi,Haoqian Zhang,Jeff R. authors_text: Zheng Qin,Hao Yu,Changjian Wang,Yulan Guo,Yuxing Peng,Kai Xu
title: Geometric Transformer for Fast and Robust Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 用于快速、稳健点云配准的几何变换器
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GeoTransformer
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GeoTransformer
abstract: We study the problem of extracting accurate correspondences for point cloud registration. Recent keypoint-free methods bypass the detection of repeatable keypoints which is difficult in low-overlap scenarios, showing great potential in registration. They seek correspondences over downsampled superpoints, which are then propagated to dense points. Superpoints are matched based on whether their neighboring patches overlap. Such sparse and loose matching requires contextual features capturing the geometric structure of the point clouds. We propose Geometric Transformer to learn geometric feature for robust superpoint matching. It encodes pair-wise distances and triplet-wise angles, making it robust in low-overlap cases and invariant to rigid transformation. The simplistic design attains surprisingly high matching accuracy such that no RANSAC is required in the estimation of alignment transformation, leading to $100$ times acceleration. Our method improves the inlier ratio by $17{\sim}30$ percentage points and the registration recall by over $7$ points on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GeoTransformer.
summary: We study the problem of extracting accurate correspondences for point cloud registration. Recent keypoint-free methods bypass the detection of repeatable keypoints which is difficult in low-overlap scenarios, showing great potential in registration. They seek correspondences over downsampled superpoints, which are then propagated to dense points. Superpoints are matched based on whether their neighboring patches overlap. Such sparse and loose matching requires contextual features capturing the geometric structure of the point clouds. We propose Geometric Transformer to learn geometric feature for robust superpoint matching. It encodes pair-wise distances and triplet-wise angles, making it robust in low-overlap cases and invariant to rigid transformation. The simplistic design attains surprisingly high matching accuracy such that no RANSAC is required in the estimation of alignment transformation, leading to $100$ times acceleration. Our method improves the inlier ratio by $17{\sim}30$ percentage points and the registration recall by over $7$ points on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/qinzheng93/GeoTransformer.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了为点云配准提取准确对应关系的问题。最近的无关键点方法绕过了在低重叠场景中很难检测的可重复关键点，在配准方面显示出巨大的潜力。他们在下采样的超点上寻找对应关系，然后将其传播到密集点。超级点根据其相邻面片是否重叠进行匹配。这种稀疏和松散的匹配需要捕获点云几何结构的上下文特征。我们提出几何变换器来学习几何特征以实现鲁棒的超点匹配。它对成对距离和三元组角度进行编码，使其在低重叠情况下具有鲁棒性，并且对刚性变换具有不变性。简单的设计获得了令人惊讶的高匹配精度，使得在对齐变换的估计中不需要RANSAC，从而导致100倍的加速。我们的方法在具有挑战性的 3DLoMatch 基准测试中将异常率提高了 17{\sim}30$ 个百分点，并将注册召回率提高了超过 7$ 个百分点。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/qinzheng93/GeoTransformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Geometric Transformer的点云配准方法，通过学习几何特征实现快速且鲁棒的超点匹配，无需依赖关键点检测。
AI.motivation: 传统点云配准方法依赖关键点检测，但在低重叠场景下难以获得稳定的关键点，导致匹配精度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计Geometric Transformer网络，通过编码点云的点对距离和三点角度信息，提取几何结构特征，实现超点间的鲁棒匹配，并直接估计对齐变换而无需RANSAC。
AI.result: 在3DLoMatch基准测试中，方法将内点比提升17~30个百分点，配准召回率提高7+，且速度比传统方法快100倍。
AI.conclusion: Geometric Transformer通过几何特征学习有效解决了低重叠场景下的点云配准问题，显著提升了配准精度与效率。

Recent keypoint-free methods bypass the detection of repeatable keypoints which is difficult in low-overlap scenarios, showing great potential in registration. They seek correspondences over downsampled superpoints, which are then propagated to dense points. Superpoints are matched based on whether their neighboring patches overlap. Such sparse and loose matching requires contextual features capturing the geometric structure of the point clouds. We propose Geometric Transformer to learn geometric feature for robust superpoint matching. It encodes pair-wise distances and triplet-wise angles, making it robust in low-overlap cases and invariant to rigid transformation. The simplistic design attains surprisingly high matching accuracy such that no RANSAC is required in the estimation of alignment transformation, leading to $100$ times acceleration. Our method improves the inlier ratio by $17{\sim}30$ percentage points and the registration recall by over $7$ points on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark. authors_text: Chunjiang Ge,Rui Huang,Mixue Xie,Zihang Lai,Shiji Song,Shuang Li,Gao Huang
title: Domain Adaptation via Prompt Learning
title_zh: 通过即时学习进行领域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) aims to adapt models learned from a well-annotated source domain to a target domain, where only unlabeled samples are given. Current UDA approaches learn domain-invariant features by aligning source and target feature spaces. Such alignments are imposed by constraints such as statistical discrepancy minimization or adversarial training. However, these constraints could lead to the distortion of semantic feature structures and loss of class discriminability. In this paper, we introduce a novel prompt learning paradigm for UDA, named Domain Adaptation via Prompt Learning (DAPL). In contrast to prior works, our approach makes use of pre-trained vision-language models and optimizes only very few parameters. The main idea is to embed domain information into prompts, a form of representations generated from natural language, which is then used to perform classification. This domain information is shared only by images from the same domain, thereby dynamically adapting the classifier according to each domain. By adopting this paradigm, we show that our model not only outperforms previous methods on several cross-domain benchmarks but also is very efficient to train and easy to implement.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) aims to adapt models learned from a well-annotated source domain to a target domain, where only unlabeled samples are given. Current UDA approaches learn domain-invariant features by aligning source and target feature spaces. Such alignments are imposed by constraints such as statistical discrepancy minimization or adversarial training. However, these constraints could lead to the distortion of semantic feature structures and loss of class discriminability. In this paper, we introduce a novel prompt learning paradigm for UDA, named Domain Adaptation via Prompt Learning (DAPL). In contrast to prior works, our approach makes use of pre-trained vision-language models and optimizes only very few parameters. The main idea is to embed domain information into prompts, a form of representations generated from natural language, which is then used to perform classification. This domain information is shared only by images from the same domain, thereby dynamically adapting the classifier according to each domain. By adopting this paradigm, we show that our model not only outperforms previous methods on several cross-domain benchmarks but also is very efficient to train and easy to implement.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在将从注释良好的源域学习的模型调整到目标域，其中仅给出未标记的样本。当前的 UDA 方法通过对齐源特征空间和目标特征空间来学习域不变特征。这种对齐是由统计差异最小化或对抗性训练等约束强加的。然而，这些约束可能会导致语义特征结构的扭曲和类别可辨别性的丧失。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的 UDA 即时学习范式，称为通过即时学习进行领域适应（DAPL）。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法利用预先训练的视觉语言模型，并且仅优化很少的参数。主要思想是将领域信息嵌入到提示中，提示是一种由自然语言生成的表示形式，然后用于执行分类。该域信息仅由来自同一域的图像共享，从而根据每个域动态调整分类器。通过采用这种范例，我们表明我们的模型不仅在几个跨域基准测试上优于以前的方法，而且训练非常高效且易于实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的领域自适应方法（DAPL），通过预训练的视觉-语言模型实现从有标签源领域到无标签目标领域的模型适应。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法通过对齐特征空间来学习领域不变特征，但可能导致语义特征结构扭曲和类别可区分性下降。本文旨在通过引入提示学习范式解决这一问题。
AI.method: DAPL方法利用预训练视觉-语言模型，将领域信息嵌入到自然语言生成的提示中，仅优化少量参数。通过共享相同领域的图像提示动态调整分类器。
AI.result: 实验表明，DAPL在多个跨领域基准测试中优于现有方法，且训练效率高、实现简单。
AI.conclusion: DAPL通过提示学习有效解决了领域自适应问题，在性能和效率上均优于传统方法。
