search_text: Domain Adaptation via Prompt Learning 通过即时学习进行领域适应 Unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) aims to adapt models learned from a well-annotated source domain to a target domain, where only unlabeled samples are given. Current UDA approaches learn domain-invariant features by aligning source and target feature spaces. Such alignments are imposed by constraints such as statistical discrepancy minimization or adversarial training. However, these constraints could lead to the distortion of semantic feature structures and loss of class discriminability. In this paper, we introduce a novel prompt learning paradigm for UDA, named Domain Adaptation via Prompt Learning (DAPL). In contrast to prior works, our approach makes use of pre-trained vision-language models and optimizes only very few parameters. The main idea is to embed domain information into prompts, a form of representations generated from natural language, which is then used to perform classification. This domain information is shared only by images from the same domain, thereby dynamically adapting the classifier according to each domain. By adopting this paradigm, we show that our model not only outperforms previous methods on several cross-domain benchmarks but also is very efficient to train and easy to implement. 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在将从注释良好的源域学习的模型调整到目标域，其中仅给出未标记的样本。当前的 UDA 方法通过对齐源特征空间和目标特征空间来学习域不变特征。这种对齐是由统计差异最小化或对抗性训练等约束强加的。然而，这些约束可能会导致语义特征结构的扭曲和类别可辨别性的丧失。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的 UDA 即时学习范式，称为通过即时学习进行领域适应（DAPL）。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法利用预先训练的视觉语言模型，并且仅优化很少的参数。主要思想是将领域信息嵌入到提示中，提示是一种由自然语言生成的表示形式，然后用于执行分类。该域信息仅由来自同一域的图像共享，从而根据每个域动态调整分类器。通过采用这种范例，我们表明我们的模型不仅在几个跨域基准测试上优于以前的方法，而且训练非常高效且易于实现。 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的领域自适应方法（DAPL），通过预训练的视觉-语言模型实现从有标签源领域到无标签目标领域的模型适应。 Chunjiang Ge,Rui Huang,Mixue Xie,Zihang Lai,Shiji Song,Shuang Li,Gao Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Haibin Wu,Heng-Cheng Kuo,Naijun Zheng,Kuo-Hsuan Hung,Hung-Yi Lee,Yu Tsao,Hsin-Min Wang,Helen Meng
title: Partially Fake Audio Detection by Self-attention-based Fake Span Discovery
title_zh: 基于自注意力的假跨度发现的部分假音频检测
abstract: The past few years have witnessed the significant advances of speech synthesis and voice conversion technologies. However, such technologies can undermine the robustness of broadly implemented biometric identification models and can be harnessed by in-the-wild attackers for illegal uses. The ASVspoof challenge mainly focuses on synthesized audios by advanced speech synthesis and voice conversion models, and replay attacks. Recently, the first Audio Deep Synthesis Detection challenge (ADD 2022) extends the attack scenarios into more aspects. Also ADD 2022 is the first challenge to propose the partially fake audio detection task. Such brand new attacks are dangerous and how to tackle such attacks remains an open question. Thus, we propose a novel framework by introducing the question-answering (fake span discovery) strategy with the self-attention mechanism to detect partially fake audios. The proposed fake span detection module tasks the anti-spoofing model to predict the start and end positions of the fake clip within the partially fake audio, address the model's attention into discovering the fake spans rather than other shortcuts with less generalization, and finally equips the model with the discrimination capacity between real and partially fake audios. Our submission ranked second in the partially fake audio detection track of ADD 2022.
summary: The past few years have witnessed the significant advances of speech synthesis and voice conversion technologies. However, such technologies can undermine the robustness of broadly implemented biometric identification models and can be harnessed by in-the-wild attackers for illegal uses. The ASVspoof challenge mainly focuses on synthesized audios by advanced speech synthesis and voice conversion models, and replay attacks. Recently, the first Audio Deep Synthesis Detection challenge (ADD 2022) extends the attack scenarios into more aspects. Also ADD 2022 is the first challenge to propose the partially fake audio detection task. Such brand new attacks are dangerous and how to tackle such attacks remains an open question. Thus, we propose a novel framework by introducing the question-answering (fake span discovery) strategy with the self-attention mechanism to detect partially fake audios. The proposed fake span detection module tasks the anti-spoofing model to predict the start and end positions of the fake clip within the partially fake audio, address the model's attention into discovering the fake spans rather than other shortcuts with less generalization, and finally equips the model with the discrimination capacity between real and partially fake audios. Our submission ranked second in the partially fake audio detection track of ADD 2022.
abstract_zh: 过去几年见证了语音合成和语音转换技术的重大进步。然而，此类技术可能会破坏广泛实施的生物识别模型的稳健性，并可能被野外攻击者用于非法用途。 ASVspoof 挑战主要关注通过先进的语音合成和语音转换模型合成音频以及重放攻击。近期，首届音频深度合成检测挑战赛（ADD 2022）将攻击场景扩展到更多方面。此外，ADD 2022 是第一个提出部分虚假音频检测任务的挑战。这种全新的攻击非常危险，如何应对此类攻击仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。因此，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，通过引入问答（假跨度发现）策略和自注意力机制来检测部分假音频。所提出的虚假跨度检测模块要求反欺骗模型预测部分虚假音频中虚假剪辑的开始和结束位置，将模型的注意力集中在发现虚假跨度而不是其他泛化程度较低的捷径上，最终使模型具有区分真实音频和部分虚假音频的能力。我们提交的内容在 ADD 2022 的部分虚假音频检测赛道中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的新型框架，用于检测部分伪造音频中的伪造片段。
AI.motivation: 随着语音合成和变声技术的发展，生物特征识别系统面临部分伪造音频攻击的威胁。现有挑战赛（如ADD 2022）首次提出部分伪造音频检测任务，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 引入问答策略与自注意力机制，设计伪造片段检测模块，通过定位音频中伪造部分的起始和结束位置，提升模型区分真实与部分伪造音频的能力。
AI.result: 该方法在ADD 2022挑战赛的部分伪造音频检测赛道中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 基于自注意力的伪造片段发现策略有效提升了部分伪造音频检测性能，为相关领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Carlo H. Godoy Jr.,Jerico C. Torayno,Audrey Rose Abbey C. Magtarayo,Mark Wilson J. Suarez,Armando Embile,Daven Christian O. Estopia
title: Client Monitoring Software: A Monitoring Tool for Greatleaf Land Inc
title_zh: 客户端监控软件：Greatleaf Land Inc 的监控工具
abstract: Monitoring typically supports greater analysis and allows for a lot deeper data collection on a Web browser level. Analysts may usually see the use of web-based monitoring software within an entire client context when it comes to client-side monitoring, on the other hand. In the case of Greatleaf Land Inc., their monitoring is somehow traditional. Traditional means that the paper method of monitoring is being utilized. When arranging piles of paper and afterwards forgetting about it, users lose track of where the information is situated. Another notable issue is that some information situating on a written on paper isn't easily cant be detected beyond skimming, which is a process normally being used to fast track records on a flipping pages, and sometimes there's also the fact that written records situating on papers can only situate in one location at a certain time unless the custodian has given up and made copies for everything. This study will check the feasibility of a web-based client monitoring software for Greatleaf Land Inc. By using ISO 25010, the study will determine if it is beneficial for Greatleaf Land Inc. to have an online monitoring software rather than settling to the traditional method that is currently being used by their company.
summary: Monitoring typically supports greater analysis and allows for a lot deeper data collection on a Web browser level. Analysts may usually see the use of web-based monitoring software within an entire client context when it comes to client-side monitoring, on the other hand. In the case of Greatleaf Land Inc., their monitoring is somehow traditional. Traditional means that the paper method of monitoring is being utilized. When arranging piles of paper and afterwards forgetting about it, users lose track of where the information is situated. Another notable issue is that some information situating on a written on paper isn't easily cant be detected beyond skimming, which is a process normally being used to fast track records on a flipping pages, and sometimes there's also the fact that written records situating on papers can only situate in one location at a certain time unless the custodian has given up and made copies for everything. This study will check the feasibility of a web-based client monitoring software for Greatleaf Land Inc. By using ISO 25010, the study will determine if it is beneficial for Greatleaf Land Inc. to have an online monitoring software rather than settling to the traditional method that is currently being used by their company.
abstract_zh: 监控通常支持更深入的分析，并允许在 Web 浏览器级别上进行更深入的数据收集。另一方面，当涉及到客户端监控时，分析师通常可能会看到在整个客户端环境中使用基于网络的监控软件。就 Greatleaf Land Inc. 而言，他们的监控在某种程度上是传统的。传统意味着采用纸质监测方法。当整理成堆的纸张然后忘记它时，用户就忘记了信息所在的位置。另一个值得注意的问题是，纸上写的一些信息除了浏览之外很难被检测到，这是一种通常用于快速跟踪翻页记录的过程，有时还存在一个事实，纸上的书面记录只能在某个时间位于一个位置，除非保管人放弃并复制所有内容。本研究将检查 Greatleaf Land Inc. 基于网络的客户端监控软件的可行性。通过使用 ISO 25010，该研究将确定 Greatleaf Land Inc. 拥有在线监控软件而不是采用其公司目前使用的传统方法是否有益。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了为Greatleaf Land Inc开发基于网络的客户监控软件的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统纸质监控方法存在信息丢失、难以快速检索和信息只能存储在一处的问题，因此需要一种更高效的监控工具。
AI.method: 使用ISO 25010标准评估基于网络的客户监控软件的可行性。
AI.result: 研究确定了基于网络的监控软件相较于传统方法的优势，并评估了其在Greatleaf Land Inc的应用可能性。
AI.conclusion: 基于网络的客户监控软件可以提高信息管理效率，比传统纸质方法更优，建议Greatleaf Land Inc采用这种软件。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文探讨了为Greatleaf Land Inc开发基于网络的客户监控软件的可行性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统纸质监控方法存在信息丢失、难以快速检索和信息只能存储在一处的问题，因此需要一种更高效的监控工具。

search_text: Client Monitoring Software: A Monitoring Tool for Greatleaf Land Inc 客户端监控软件：Greatleaf Land Inc 的监控工具 Monitoring typically supports greater analysis and allows for a lot deeper data collection on a Web browser level. Analysts may usually see the use of web-based monitoring software within an entire client context when it comes to client-side monitoring, on the other hand. In the case of Greatleaf Land Inc., their monitoring is somehow traditional. Traditional means that the paper method of monitoring is being utilized. When arranging piles of paper and afterwards forgetting about it, users lose track of where the information is situated. Another notable issue is that some information situating on a written on paper isn't easily cant be detected beyond skimming, which is a process normally being used to fast track records on a flipping pages, and sometimes there's also the fact that written records situating on papers can only situate in one location at a certain time unless the custodian has given up and made copies for everything. This study will check the feasibility of a web-based client monitoring software for Greatleaf Land Inc. By using ISO 25010, the study will determine if it is beneficial for Greatleaf Land Inc. to have an online monitoring software rather than settling to the traditional method that is currently being used by their company. 监控通常支持更深入的分析，并允许在 Web 浏览器级别上进行更深入的数据收集。另一方面，当涉及到客户端监控时，分析师通常可能会看到在整个客户端环境中使用基于网络的监控软件。就 Greatleaf Land Inc. 而言，他们的监控在某种程度上是传统的。传统意味着采用纸质监测方法。当整理成堆的纸张然后忘记它时，用户就忘记了信息所在的位置。另一个值得注意的问题是，纸上写的一些信息除了浏览之外很难被检测到，这是一种通常用于快速跟踪翻页记录的过程，有时还存在一个事实，纸上的书面记录只能在某个时间位于一个位置，除非保管人放弃并复制所有内容。本研究将检查 Greatleaf Land Inc. 基于网络的客户端监控软件的可行性。通过使用 ISO 25010，该研究将确定 Greatleaf Land Inc. 拥有在线监控软件而不是采用其公司目前使用的传统方法是否有益。 该论文探讨了为Greatleaf Land Inc开发基于网络的客户监控软件的可行性。 Carlo H. Godoy Jr.,Jerico C. Torayno,Audrey Rose Abbey C. Magtarayo,Mark Wilson J. Suarez,Armando Embile,Daven Christian O. Estopia cs.HC

authors_text: Patrick Schramowski,Christopher Tauchmann,Kristian Kersting
title: Can Machines Help Us Answering Question 16 in Datasheets, and In Turn Reflecting on Inappropriate Content?
title_zh: 机器能否帮助我们回答数据表中的问题 16，进而反思不当内容？
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.04222
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.04222
abstract: Large datasets underlying much of current machine learning raise serious issues concerning inappropriate content such as offensive, insulting, threatening, or might otherwise cause anxiety. This calls for increased dataset documentation, e.g., using datasheets. They, among other topics, encourage to reflect on the composition of the datasets. So far, this documentation, however, is done manually and therefore can be tedious and error-prone, especially for large image datasets. Here we ask the arguably "circular" question of whether a machine can help us reflect on inappropriate content, answering Question 16 in Datasheets. To this end, we propose to use the information stored in pre-trained transformer models to assist us in the documentation process. Specifically, prompt-tuning based on a dataset of socio-moral values steers CLIP to identify potentially inappropriate content, therefore reducing human labor. We then document the inappropriate images found using word clouds, based on captions generated using a vision-language model. The documentations of two popular, large-scale computer vision datasets -- ImageNet and OpenImages -- produced this way suggest that machines can indeed help dataset creators to answer Question 16 on inappropriate image content.
summary: Large datasets underlying much of current machine learning raise serious issues concerning inappropriate content such as offensive, insulting, threatening, or might otherwise cause anxiety. This calls for increased dataset documentation, e.g., using datasheets. They, among other topics, encourage to reflect on the composition of the datasets. So far, this documentation, however, is done manually and therefore can be tedious and error-prone, especially for large image datasets. Here we ask the arguably "circular" question of whether a machine can help us reflect on inappropriate content, answering Question 16 in Datasheets. To this end, we propose to use the information stored in pre-trained transformer models to assist us in the documentation process. Specifically, prompt-tuning based on a dataset of socio-moral values steers CLIP to identify potentially inappropriate content, therefore reducing human labor. We then document the inappropriate images found using word clouds, based on captions generated using a vision-language model. The documentations of two popular, large-scale computer vision datasets -- ImageNet and OpenImages -- produced this way suggest that machines can indeed help dataset creators to answer Question 16 on inappropriate image content.
abstract_zh: 当前大部分机器学习背后的大型数据集引发了有关不当内容的严重问题，例如攻击性、侮辱性、威胁性或可能引起焦虑的内容。这需要增加数据集文档，例如使用数据表。除其他主题外，它们鼓励反思数据集的组成。然而，到目前为止，该文档是手动完成的，因此可能很乏味且容易出错，特别是对于大型图像数据集。在这里，我们提出了一个可以说是“循环”的问题，即机器是否可以帮助我们反思不适当的内容，回答数据表中的问题 16。为此，我们建议使用预先训练的变压器模型中存储的信息来协助我们进行文档记录过程。具体来说，基于社会道德价值观数据集的提示调整引导 CLIP 识别潜在的不当内容，从而减少人力。然后，我们根据使用视觉语言模型生成的标题，使用词云记录发现的不当图像。以这种方式生成的两个流行的大型计算机视觉数据集（ImageNet 和 OpenImages）的文档表明，机器确实可以帮助数据集创建者回答有关不当图像内容的问题 16。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用机器学习模型辅助完成数据集文档中的不适当内容识别任务，具体针对Datasheets中的问题16。
AI.motivation: 大型数据集存在不适当内容风险，但人工文档过程繁琐易错，需自动化工具提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于预训练Transformer模型（如CLIP）结合社会道德值数据集进行提示调整，通过视觉语言模型生成字幕并制作词云完成文档。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和OpenImages数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，证明机器能有效识别并记录不适当图像内容。
AI.conclusion: 机器辅助可显著提升数据集文档中不适当内容识别的效率，为自动化数据伦理审查提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yan Ding,Xiaohan Zhang,Xingyue Zhan,Shiqi Zhang
title: Learning to Ground Objects for Robot Task and Motion Planning
title_zh: 学习地面物体以进行机器人任务和运动规划
abstract: Task and motion planning (TAMP) algorithms have been developed to help robots plan behaviors in discrete and continuous spaces. Robots face complex real-world scenarios, where it is hardly possible to model all objects or their physical properties for robot planning (e.g., in kitchens or shopping centers). In this paper, we define a new object-centric TAMP problem, where the TAMP robot does not know object properties (e.g., size and weight of blocks). We then introduce Task-Motion Object-Centric planning ({\bf TMOC}), a grounded TAMP algorithm that learns to ground objects and their physical properties with a physics engine. TMOC is particularly useful for those tasks that involve dynamic complex robot-multi-object interactions that can hardly be modeled beforehand. We have demonstrated and evaluated TMOC in simulation and using a real robot. Results show that TMOC outperforms competitive baselines from the literature in cumulative utility.
summary: Task and motion planning (TAMP) algorithms have been developed to help robots plan behaviors in discrete and continuous spaces. Robots face complex real-world scenarios, where it is hardly possible to model all objects or their physical properties for robot planning (e.g., in kitchens or shopping centers). In this paper, we define a new object-centric TAMP problem, where the TAMP robot does not know object properties (e.g., size and weight of blocks). We then introduce Task-Motion Object-Centric planning ({\bf TMOC}), a grounded TAMP algorithm that learns to ground objects and their physical properties with a physics engine. TMOC is particularly useful for those tasks that involve dynamic complex robot-multi-object interactions that can hardly be modeled beforehand. We have demonstrated and evaluated TMOC in simulation and using a real robot. Results show that TMOC outperforms competitive baselines from the literature in cumulative utility.
abstract_zh: 任务和运动规划 (TAMP) 算法的开发旨在帮助机器人规划离散和连续空间中的行为。机器人面临复杂的现实场景，几乎不可能对所有物体或其物理属性进行建模以进行机器人规划（例如，在厨房或购物中心）。在本文中，我们定义了一个新的以对象为中心的 TAMP 问题，其中 TAMP 机器人不知道对象属性（例如块的大小和重量）。然后，我们介绍任务运动以对象为中心的规划（{\bf TMOC}），这是一种扎根的 TAMP 算法，可以通过物理引擎学习扎根对象及其物理属性。 TMOC 对于那些涉及动态复杂的机器人多对象交互且很难预先建模的任务特别有用。我们已经在模拟和使用真实机器人中演示和评估了 TMOC。结果表明，TMOC 在累积效用方面优于文献中的竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的以物体为中心的任务和运动规划算法TMOC，用于解决机器人在复杂环境中物体属性未知的规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统TAMP算法难以建模复杂现实场景中所有物体的物理属性，导致机器人无法有效处理动态多物体交互任务。
AI.method: 引入TMOC算法，通过物理引擎学习物体的尺寸、重量等属性，实现任务与运动规划的联合学习与决策。
AI.result: 仿真和实际机器人实验表明，TMOC在累积效用指标上优于现有主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TMOC为动态复杂环境下的机器人规划提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhongxia Zhang,Mingwen Wang
title: Convolutional Neural Network with Convolutional Block Attention Module for Finger Vein Recognition
title_zh: 用于指静脉识别的具有卷积块注意力模块的卷积神经网络
abstract: Convolutional neural networks have become a popular research in the field of finger vein recognition because of their powerful image feature representation. However, most researchers focus on improving the performance of the network by increasing the CNN depth and width, which often requires high computational effort. Moreover, we can notice that not only the importance of pixels in different channels is different, but also the importance of pixels in different positions of the same channel is different. To reduce the computational effort and to take into account the different importance of pixels, we propose a lightweight convolutional neural network with a convolutional block attention module (CBAM) for finger vein recognition, which can achieve a more accurate capture of visual structures through an attention mechanism. First, image sequences are fed into a lightweight convolutional neural network we designed to improve visual features. Afterwards, it learns to assign feature weights in an adaptive manner with the help of a convolutional block attention module. The experiments are carried out on two publicly available databases and the results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a stable, highly accurate, and robust performance in multimodal finger recognition.
summary: Convolutional neural networks have become a popular research in the field of finger vein recognition because of their powerful image feature representation. However, most researchers focus on improving the performance of the network by increasing the CNN depth and width, which often requires high computational effort. Moreover, we can notice that not only the importance of pixels in different channels is different, but also the importance of pixels in different positions of the same channel is different. To reduce the computational effort and to take into account the different importance of pixels, we propose a lightweight convolutional neural network with a convolutional block attention module (CBAM) for finger vein recognition, which can achieve a more accurate capture of visual structures through an attention mechanism. First, image sequences are fed into a lightweight convolutional neural network we designed to improve visual features. Afterwards, it learns to assign feature weights in an adaptive manner with the help of a convolutional block attention module. The experiments are carried out on two publicly available databases and the results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a stable, highly accurate, and robust performance in multimodal finger recognition.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络因其强大的图像特征表示能力而成为指静脉识别领域的热门研究。然而，大多数研究人员专注于通过增加 CNN 深度和宽度来提高网络性能，这通常需要大量计算工作。而且，我们可以注意到，不仅不同通道的像素重要性不同，而且同一通道不同位置的像素重要性也不同。为了减少计算量并考虑到像素的不同重要性，我们提出了一种带有卷积块注意模块（CBAM）的轻量级卷积神经网络用于手指静脉识别，它可以通过注意机制实现更准确的视觉结构捕获。首先，将图像序列输入到我们设计的轻量级卷积神经网络中，以改善视觉特征。然后，它在卷积块注意模块的帮助下学习以自适应方式分配特征权重。实验在两个公开数据库上进行，结果表明该方法在多模态手指识别中实现了稳定、高精度和鲁棒的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）的轻量级卷积神经网络，用于提高指纹静脉识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过增加CNN深度和宽度提升性能但计算成本高，且未充分考虑不同通道和位置像素的重要性差异。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN提取视觉特征，并引入CBAM模块自适应分配特征权重以捕捉关键信息。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据库上实验表明，该方法在多模态指纹识别中表现出稳定、高精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CBAM有效提升了网络对关键特征的捕捉能力，在保证效率的同时显著优化了指纹静脉识别性能。

search_text: Convolutional Neural Network with Convolutional Block Attention Module for Finger Vein Recognition 用于指静脉识别的具有卷积块注意力模块的卷积神经网络 Convolutional neural networks have become a popular research in the field of finger vein recognition because of their powerful image feature representation. However, most researchers focus on improving the performance of the network by increasing the CNN depth and width, which often requires high computational effort. Moreover, we can notice that not only the importance of pixels in different channels is different, but also the importance of pixels in different positions of the same channel is different. To reduce the computational effort and to take into account the different importance of pixels, we propose a lightweight convolutional neural network with a convolutional block attention module (CBAM) for finger vein recognition, which can achieve a more accurate capture of visual structures through an attention mechanism. First, image sequences are fed into a lightweight convolutional neural network we designed to improve visual features. Afterwards, it learns to assign feature weights in an adaptive manner with the help of a convolutional block attention module. The experiments are carried out on two publicly available databases and the results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a stable, highly accurate, and robust performance in multimodal finger recognition. 卷积神经网络因其强大的图像特征表示能力而成为指静脉识别领域的热门研究。然而，大多数研究人员专注于通过增加 CNN 深度和宽度来提高网络性能，这通常需要大量计算工作。而且，我们可以注意到，不仅不同通道的像素重要性不同，而且同一通道不同位置的像素重要性也不同。为了减少计算量并考虑到像素的不同重要性，我们提出了一种带有卷积块注意模块（CBAM）的轻量级卷积神经网络用于手指静脉识别，它可以通过注意机制实现更准确的视觉结构捕获。首先，将图像序列输入到我们设计的轻量级卷积神经网络中，以改善视觉特征。然后，它在卷积块注意模块的帮助下学习以自适应方式分配特征权重。实验在两个公开数据库上进行，结果表明该方法在多模态手指识别中实现了稳定、高精度和鲁棒的性能。 本文提出一种结合卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）的轻量级卷积神经网络，用于提高指纹静脉识别的准确性。 Zhongxia Zhang,Mingwen Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yao-Hung Hubert Tsai,Tianqin Li,Weixin Liu,Peiyuan Liao,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Louis-Philippe Morency
title: Learning Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Representations
title_zh: 学习弱监督对比表示
comment: Published as ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02869
comments: Published as ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02869
abstract: We argue that a form of the valuable information provided by the auxiliary information is its implied data clustering information. For instance, considering hashtags as auxiliary information, we can hypothesize that an Instagram image will be semantically more similar with the same hashtags. With this intuition, we present a two-stage weakly-supervised contrastive learning approach. The first stage is to cluster data according to its auxiliary information. The second stage is to learn similar representations within the same cluster and dissimilar representations for data from different clusters. Our empirical experiments suggest the following three contributions. First, compared to conventional self-supervised representations, the auxiliary-information-infused representations bring the performance closer to the supervised representations, which use direct downstream labels as supervision signals. Second, our approach performs the best in most cases, when comparing our approach with other baseline representation learning methods that also leverage auxiliary data information. Third, we show that our approach also works well with unsupervised constructed clusters (e.g., no auxiliary information), resulting in a strong unsupervised representation learning approach.
summary: We argue that a form of the valuable information provided by the auxiliary information is its implied data clustering information. For instance, considering hashtags as auxiliary information, we can hypothesize that an Instagram image will be semantically more similar with the same hashtags. With this intuition, we present a two-stage weakly-supervised contrastive learning approach. The first stage is to cluster data according to its auxiliary information. The second stage is to learn similar representations within the same cluster and dissimilar representations for data from different clusters. Our empirical experiments suggest the following three contributions. First, compared to conventional self-supervised representations, the auxiliary-information-infused representations bring the performance closer to the supervised representations, which use direct downstream labels as supervision signals. Second, our approach performs the best in most cases, when comparing our approach with other baseline representation learning methods that also leverage auxiliary data information. Third, we show that our approach also works well with unsupervised constructed clusters (e.g., no auxiliary information), resulting in a strong unsupervised representation learning approach.
abstract_zh: 我们认为辅助信息提供的有价值信息的一种形式是其隐含的数据聚类信息。例如，将主题标签视为辅助信息，我们可以假设 Instagram 图像在语义上与相同的主题标签更加相似。凭借这种直觉，我们提出了一种两阶段弱监督对比学习方法。第一阶段是根据数据的辅助信息对数据进行聚类。第二阶段是学习同一集群内的相似表示和来自不同集群的数据的不同表示。我们的实证实验提出了以下三个贡献。首先，与传统的自监督表示相比，注入辅助信息的表示使性能更接近监督表示，后者使用直接下游标签作为监督信号。其次，当将我们的方法与其他也利用辅助数据信息的基线表示学习方法进行比较时，我们的方法在大多数情况下表现最好。第三，我们表明我们的方法也适用于无监督构建的集群（例如，没有辅助信息），从而产生强大的无监督表示学习方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两阶段弱监督对比学习方法，利用辅助信息提升表示学习效果
AI.motivation: 传统自监督方法未充分利用辅助信息中的聚类线索，而辅助信息能隐含数据语义相似性，可提升表示学习性能
AI.method: 两阶段弱监督对比学习：第一阶段基于辅助信息聚类数据，第二阶段通过对比学习使同类簇内表示相似、异类簇间表示差异
AI.result: 辅助信息注入的表示性能接近监督方法，多数场景优于基线方法，且在无辅助信息的聚类场景下仍表现优异
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效挖掘辅助信息的聚类价值，在弱监督/无监督场景下均能获得强表示能力

authors_text: Hao Guo,Jiyong Jin,Bin Liu
title: PFGE: Parsimonious Fast Geometric Ensembling of DNNs
title_zh: PFGE：DNN 的简约快速几何集成
comment: This paper has been accepted by 19th Inter. Conf. on Intelligent Computing (ICIC 2023)
comments: This paper has been accepted by 19th Inter. Conf. on Intelligent Computing (ICIC 2023)
abstract: Ensemble methods are commonly used to enhance the generalization performance of machine learning models. However, they present a challenge in deep learning systems due to the high computational overhead required to train an ensemble of deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent advancements such as fast geometric ensembling (FGE) and snapshot ensembles have addressed this issue by training model ensembles in the same time as a single model. Nonetheless, these techniques still require additional memory for test-time inference compared to single-model-based methods. In this paper, we propose a new method called parsimonious FGE (PFGE), which employs a lightweight ensemble of higher-performing DNNs generated through successive stochastic weight averaging procedures. Our experimental results on CIFAR-{10,100} and ImageNet datasets across various modern DNN architectures demonstrate that PFGE achieves 5x memory efficiency compared to previous methods, without compromising on generalization performance. For those interested, our code is available at https://github.com/ZJLAB-AMMI/PFGE.
summary: Ensemble methods are commonly used to enhance the generalization performance of machine learning models. However, they present a challenge in deep learning systems due to the high computational overhead required to train an ensemble of deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent advancements such as fast geometric ensembling (FGE) and snapshot ensembles have addressed this issue by training model ensembles in the same time as a single model. Nonetheless, these techniques still require additional memory for test-time inference compared to single-model-based methods. In this paper, we propose a new method called parsimonious FGE (PFGE), which employs a lightweight ensemble of higher-performing DNNs generated through successive stochastic weight averaging procedures. Our experimental results on CIFAR-{10,100} and ImageNet datasets across various modern DNN architectures demonstrate that PFGE achieves 5x memory efficiency compared to previous methods, without compromising on generalization performance. For those interested, our code is available at https://github.com/ZJLAB-AMMI/PFGE.
abstract_zh: 集成方法通常用于增强机器学习模型的泛化性能。然而，由于训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 集合所需的高计算开销，它们对深度学习系统提出了挑战。最近的进步，例如快速几何集成（FGE）和快照集成，通过与单个模型同时训练模型集成来解决这个问题。尽管如此，与基于单一模型的方法相比，这些技术仍然需要额外的内存来进行测试时推理。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为简约 FGE (PFGE) 的新方法，该方法采用通过连续随机权重平均过程生成的高性能 DNN 的轻量级集成。我们在各种现代 DNN 架构的 CIFAR-{10,100} 和 ImageNet 数据集上的实验结果表明，与以前的方法相比，PFGE 实现了 5 倍的内存效率，并且不影响泛化性能。对于感兴趣的人，我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/ZJLAB-AMMI/PFGE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为PFGE的方法，通过轻量级集成高效DNN，显著减少内存消耗而不牺牲泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统集成方法因高计算开销和测试时内存需求在深度学习系统中面临挑战，现有技术如FGE和snapshot ensembles虽减少训练时间，但内存效率仍有待提升。
AI.method: PFGE采用轻量级集成方法，通过连续随机权重平均（stochastic weight averaging）生成更高性能的DNN，从而减少测试时的内存需求。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上，PFGE实现比先前方法5倍的内存效率，且不牺牲泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: PFGE有效解决了深度学习模型集成中的内存效率问题，为高效模型集成提供了新思路。

Recent advancements such as fast geometric ensembling (FGE) and snapshot ensembles have addressed this issue by training model ensembles in the same time as a single model. Nonetheless, these techniques still require additional memory for test-time inference compared to single-model-based methods. In this paper, we propose a new method called parsimonious FGE (PFGE), which employs a lightweight ensemble of higher-performing DNNs generated through successive stochastic weight averaging procedures. Our experimental results on CIFAR-{10,100} and ImageNet datasets across various modern DNN architectures demonstrate that PFGE achieves 5x memory efficiency compared to previous methods, without compromising on generalization performance. For those interested, our code is available at https://github.com/ZJLAB-AMMI/PFGE. 集成方法通常用于增强机器学习模型的泛化性能。然而，由于训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 集合所需的高计算开销，它们对深度学习系统提出了挑战。最近的进步，例如快速几何集成（FGE）和快照集成，通过与单个模型同时训练模型集成来解决这个问题。尽管如此，与基于单一模型的方法相比，这些技术仍然需要额外的内存来进行测试时推理。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为简约 FGE (PFGE) 的新方法，该方法采用通过连续随机权重平均过程生成的高性能 DNN 的轻量级集成。我们在各种现代 DNN 架构的 CIFAR-{10,100} 和 ImageNet 数据集上的实验结果表明，与以前的方法相比，PFGE 实现了 5 倍的内存效率，并且不影响泛化性能。对于感兴趣的人，我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/ZJLAB-AMMI/PFGE 上找到。 本文提出了一种称为PFGE的方法，通过轻量级集成高效DNN，显著减少内存消耗而不牺牲泛化性能。 Hao Guo,Jiyong Jin,Bin Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhensu Sun,Li Li,Yan Liu,Xiaoning Du,Li Li
title: On the Importance of Building High-quality Training Datasets for Neural Code Search
title_zh: 论构建高质量神经代码搜索训练数据集的重要性
abstract: The performance of neural code search is significantly influenced by the quality of the training data from which the neural models are derived. A large corpus of high-quality query and code pairs is demanded to establish a precise mapping from the natural language to the programming language. Due to the limited availability, most widely-used code search datasets are established with compromise, such as using code comments as a replacement of queries. Our empirical study on a famous code search dataset reveals that over one-third of its queries contain noises that make them deviate from natural user queries. Models trained through noisy data are faced with severe performance degradation when applied in real-world scenarios. To improve the dataset quality and make the queries of its samples semantically identical to real user queries is critical for the practical usability of neural code search. In this paper, we propose a data cleaning framework consisting of two subsequent filters: a rule-based syntactic filter and a model-based semantic filter. This is the first framework that applies semantic query cleaning to code search datasets. Experimentally, we evaluated the effectiveness of our framework on two widely-used code search models and three manually-annotated code retrieval benchmarks. Training the popular DeepCS model with the filtered dataset from our framework improves its performance by 19.2% MRR and 21.3% Answer@1, on average with the three validation benchmarks.
summary: The performance of neural code search is significantly influenced by the quality of the training data from which the neural models are derived. A large corpus of high-quality query and code pairs is demanded to establish a precise mapping from the natural language to the programming language. Due to the limited availability, most widely-used code search datasets are established with compromise, such as using code comments as a replacement of queries. Our empirical study on a famous code search dataset reveals that over one-third of its queries contain noises that make them deviate from natural user queries. Models trained through noisy data are faced with severe performance degradation when applied in real-world scenarios. To improve the dataset quality and make the queries of its samples semantically identical to real user queries is critical for the practical usability of neural code search. In this paper, we propose a data cleaning framework consisting of two subsequent filters: a rule-based syntactic filter and a model-based semantic filter. This is the first framework that applies semantic query cleaning to code search datasets. Experimentally, we evaluated the effectiveness of our framework on two widely-used code search models and three manually-annotated code retrieval benchmarks. Training the popular DeepCS model with the filtered dataset from our framework improves its performance by 19.2% MRR and 21.3% Answer@1, on average with the three validation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 神经代码搜索的性能很大程度上受到从中导出神经模型的训练数据的质量的影响。需要大量高质量查询和代码对的语料库来建立从自然语言到编程语言的精确映射。由于可用性有限，大多数广泛使用的代码搜索数据集都是通过折衷的方式建立的，例如使用代码注释来代替查询。我们对著名代码搜索数据集的实证研究表明，超过三分之一的查询包含噪音，使它们偏离自然用户查询。通过噪声数据训练的模型在应用于现实场景时会面临严重的性能下降。提高数据集质量并使其样本查询在语义上与真实用户查询相同对于神经代码搜索的实际可用性至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个数据清理框架，由两个后续过滤器组成：基于规则的语法过滤器和基于模型的语义过滤器。这是第一个将语义查询清理应用于代码搜索数据集的框架。通过实验，我们在两个广泛使用的代码搜索模型和三个手动注释的代码检索基准上评估了我们的框架的有效性。使用我们框架中过滤后的数据集训练流行的 DeepCS 模型，在三个验证基准测试中，其性能平均提高了 19.2% MRR 和 21.3% Answer@1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据清洗框架，通过消除训练数据中的噪声查询来提升神经代码搜索的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有代码搜索数据集中的查询存在大量噪声，导致模型在实际应用中表现下降，亟需提升数据质量以符合真实用户需求。
AI.method: 设计了两阶段过滤框架：基于规则的语法过滤器和基于模型的语义过滤器，首次将语义查询清洗应用于代码搜索数据集。
AI.result: 在两个主流代码搜索模型和三个基准测试中，使用清洗后的数据训练DeepCS模型使MRR提升19.2%，Answer@1提升21.3%。
AI.conclusion: 高质量训练数据对神经代码搜索至关重要，语义级数据清洗能显著提升模型实际应用效果。

authors_text: Nik Khadijah Nik Aznan,John Brennan,Daniel Bell,Jennine Jonczyk,Paul Watson
title: On the Complexity of Object Detection on Real-world Public Transportation Images for Social Distancing Measurement
title_zh: 用于社会距离测量的现实公共交通图像上的对象检测的复杂性
abstract: Social distancing in public spaces has become an essential aspect in helping to reduce the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. Exploiting recent advances in machine learning, there have been many studies in the literature implementing social distancing via object detection through the use of surveillance cameras in public spaces. However, to date, there has been no study of social distance measurement on public transport. The public transport setting has some unique challenges, including some low-resolution images and camera locations that can lead to the partial occlusion of passengers, which make it challenging to perform accurate detection. Thus, in this paper, we investigate the challenges of performing accurate social distance measurement on public transportation. We benchmark several state-of-the-art object detection algorithms using real-world footage taken from the London Underground and bus network. The work highlights the complexity of performing social distancing measurement on images from current public transportation onboard cameras. Further, exploiting domain knowledge of expected passenger behaviour, we attempt to improve the quality of the detections using various strategies and show improvement over using vanilla object detection alone.
summary: Social distancing in public spaces has become an essential aspect in helping to reduce the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic. Exploiting recent advances in machine learning, there have been many studies in the literature implementing social distancing via object detection through the use of surveillance cameras in public spaces. However, to date, there has been no study of social distance measurement on public transport. The public transport setting has some unique challenges, including some low-resolution images and camera locations that can lead to the partial occlusion of passengers, which make it challenging to perform accurate detection. Thus, in this paper, we investigate the challenges of performing accurate social distance measurement on public transportation. We benchmark several state-of-the-art object detection algorithms using real-world footage taken from the London Underground and bus network. The work highlights the complexity of performing social distancing measurement on images from current public transportation onboard cameras. Further, exploiting domain knowledge of expected passenger behaviour, we attempt to improve the quality of the detections using various strategies and show improvement over using vanilla object detection alone.
abstract_zh: 公共场所的社交距离已成为帮助减少 COVID-19 大流行影响的一个重要方面。利用机器学习的最新进展，文献中已有许多研究通过在公共场所使用监控摄像头进行物体检测来实现社交距离。然而，迄今为止，还没有针对公共交通上的社交距离测量的研究。公共交通环境面临一些独特的挑战，包括一些低分辨率图像和摄像头位置，可能导​​致乘客部分遮挡，这使得执行准确检测具有挑战性。因此，在本文中，我们研究了在公共交通上进行准确的社交距离测量的挑战。我们使用从伦敦地铁和公交网络拍摄的真实镜头对几种最先进的对象检测算法进行基准测试。这项工作强调了对当前公共交通车载摄像头的图像进行社交距离测量的复杂性。此外，利用预期乘客行为的领域知识，我们尝试使用各种策略来提高检测质量，并显示出比单独使用普通对象检测的改进。

AI.tldr: 研究在真实世界公共交通图像中进行社交距离测量的复杂性，评估目标检测算法的效果并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未针对公共交通场景，而该场景存在图像分辨率低、乘客遮挡等挑战，需改进检测方法以准确测量社交距离。
AI.method: 采用多种先进目标检测算法在伦敦公共交通视频上进行基准测试，并结合乘客行为领域知识优化检测策略。
AI.result: 实验表明改进后的检测方法在公共交通图像中的社交距离测量准确率有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 公共交通图像检测具有挑战性，需结合领域知识优化算法以提高社交距离测量的准确性。

authors_text: Amol Mandhane,Anton Zhernov,Maribeth Rauh,Chenjie Gu,Miaosen Wang,Flora Xue,Wendy Shang,Derek Pang,Rene Claus,Ching-Han Chiang,Cheng Chen,Jingning Han,Angie Chen,Daniel J. Mankowitz,Jackson Broshear,Julian Schrittwieser,Thomas Hubert,Oriol Vinyals,Timothy Mann
title: MuZero with Self-competition for Rate Control in VP9 Video Compression
title_zh: MuZero 在 VP9 视频压缩中具有自竞争速率控制
abstract: Video streaming usage has seen a significant rise as entertainment, education, and business increasingly rely on online video. Optimizing video compression has the potential to increase access and quality of content to users, and reduce energy use and costs overall. In this paper, we present an application of the MuZero algorithm to the challenge of video compression. Specifically, we target the problem of learning a rate control policy to select the quantization parameters (QP) in the encoding process of libvpx, an open source VP9 video compression library widely used by popular video-on-demand (VOD) services. We treat this as a sequential decision making problem to maximize the video quality with an episodic constraint imposed by the target bitrate. Notably, we introduce a novel self-competition based reward mechanism to solve constrained RL with variable constraint satisfaction difficulty, which is challenging for existing constrained RL methods. We demonstrate that the MuZero-based rate control achieves an average 6.28% reduction in size of the compressed videos for the same delivered video quality level (measured as PSNR BD-rate) compared to libvpx's two-pass VBR rate control policy, while having better constraint satisfaction behavior.
summary: Video streaming usage has seen a significant rise as entertainment, education, and business increasingly rely on online video. Optimizing video compression has the potential to increase access and quality of content to users, and reduce energy use and costs overall. In this paper, we present an application of the MuZero algorithm to the challenge of video compression. Specifically, we target the problem of learning a rate control policy to select the quantization parameters (QP) in the encoding process of libvpx, an open source VP9 video compression library widely used by popular video-on-demand (VOD) services. We treat this as a sequential decision making problem to maximize the video quality with an episodic constraint imposed by the target bitrate. Notably, we introduce a novel self-competition based reward mechanism to solve constrained RL with variable constraint satisfaction difficulty, which is challenging for existing constrained RL methods. We demonstrate that the MuZero-based rate control achieves an average 6.28% reduction in size of the compressed videos for the same delivered video quality level (measured as PSNR BD-rate) compared to libvpx's two-pass VBR rate control policy, while having better constraint satisfaction behavior.
abstract_zh: 随着娱乐、教育和商业越来越依赖在线视频，视频流的使用量显着增加。优化视频压缩有可能增加用户的内容访问和质量，并减少总体能源使用和成本。在本文中，我们提出了 MuZero 算法应对视频压缩挑战的应用。具体来说，我们的目标是学习速率控制策略以在 libvpx 的编码过程中选择量化参数 (QP) 的问题，libvpx 是流行视频点播 (VOD) 服务广泛使用的开源 VP9 视频压缩库。我们将其视为一个顺序决策问题，以通过目标比特率施加的情景约束来最大化视频质量。值得注意的是，我们引入了一种新颖的基于自我竞争的奖励机制来解决具有可变约束满足难度的约束强化学习，这对现有的约束强化学习方法来说是一个挑战。我们证明，与 libvpx 的两遍 VBR 速率控制策略相比，基于 MuZero 的速率控制在相同的交付视频质量水平（以 PSNR BD 速率测量）下，压缩视频的大小平均减少了 6.28%，同时具有更好的约束满足行为。

AI.tldr: 本文将MuZero算法与自竞争机制结合，应用于VP9视频压缩中的率控问题，以优化视频质量和压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 随着在线视频需求激增，优化视频压缩技术可提升用户体验并降低能耗成本，而现有率控策略在动态约束下表现不足。
AI.method: 将率控问题建模为带约束的序贯决策问题，提出基于自竞争的奖励机制，结合MuZero算法训练量化参数选择策略。
AI.result: 在相同视频质量下，压缩视频体积平均减少6.28%，且约束满足表现优于libvpx的两遍VBR策略。
AI.conclusion: 自竞争机制有效解决了动态约束下的强化学习难题，证明MuZero在视频压缩率控中的优越性。

search_text: MuZero with Self-competition for Rate Control in VP9 Video Compression MuZero 在 VP9 视频压缩中具有自竞争速率控制 Video streaming usage has seen a significant rise as entertainment, education, and business increasingly rely on online video. Optimizing video compression has the potential to increase access and quality of content to users, and reduce energy use and costs overall. In this paper, we present an application of the MuZero algorithm to the challenge of video compression. Specifically, we target the problem of learning a rate control policy to select the quantization parameters (QP) in the encoding process of libvpx, an open source VP9 video compression library widely used by popular video-on-demand (VOD) services. We treat this as a sequential decision making problem to maximize the video quality with an episodic constraint imposed by the target bitrate. Notably, we introduce a novel self-competition based reward mechanism to solve constrained RL with variable constraint satisfaction difficulty, which is challenging for existing constrained RL methods. We demonstrate that the MuZero-based rate control achieves an average 6.28% reduction in size of the compressed videos for the same delivered video quality level (measured as PSNR BD-rate) compared to libvpx's two-pass VBR rate control policy, while having better constraint satisfaction behavior. 随着娱乐、教育和商业越来越依赖在线视频，视频流的使用量显着增加。优化视频压缩有可能增加用户的内容访问和质量，并减少总体能源使用和成本。在本文中，我们提出了 MuZero 算法应对视频压缩挑战的应用。具体来说，我们的目标是学习速率控制策略以在 libvpx 的编码过程中选择量化参数 (QP) 的问题，libvpx 是流行视频点播 (VOD) 服务广泛使用的开源 VP9 视频压缩库。我们将其视为一个顺序决策问题，以通过目标比特率施加的情景约束来最大化视频质量。值得注意的是，我们引入了一种新颖的基于自我竞争的奖励机制来解决具有可变约束满足难度的约束强化学习，这对现有的约束强化学习方法来说是一个挑战。我们证明，与 libvpx 的两遍 VBR 速率控制策略相比，基于 MuZero 的速率控制在相同的交付视频质量水平（以 PSNR BD 速率测量）下，压缩视频的大小平均减少了 6.28%，同时具有更好的约束满足行为。 本文将MuZero算法与自竞争机制结合，应用于VP9视频压缩中的率控问题，以优化视频质量和压缩效率。 Amol Mandhane,Anton Zhernov,Maribeth Rauh,Chenjie Gu,Miaosen Wang,Flora Xue,Wendy Shang,Derek Pang,Rene Claus,Ching-Han Chiang,Cheng Chen,Jingning Han,Angie Chen,Daniel J. authors_text: Franz Motzkus,Leander Weber,Sebastian Lapuschkin
title: Measurably Stronger Explanation Reliability via Model Canonization
title_zh: 通过模型规范化显着增强解释可靠性
abstract: While rule-based attribution methods have proven useful for providing local explanations for Deep Neural Networks, explaining modern and more varied network architectures yields new challenges in generating trustworthy explanations, since the established rule sets might not be sufficient or applicable to novel network structures. As an elegant solution to the above issue, network canonization has recently been introduced. This procedure leverages the implementation-dependency of rule-based attributions and restructures a model into a functionally identical equivalent of alternative design to which established attribution rules can be applied. However, the idea of canonization and its usefulness have so far only been explored qualitatively. In this work, we quantitatively verify the beneficial effects of network canonization to rule-based attributions on VGG-16 and ResNet18 models with BatchNorm layers and thus extend the current best practices for obtaining reliable neural network explanations.
summary: While rule-based attribution methods have proven useful for providing local explanations for Deep Neural Networks, explaining modern and more varied network architectures yields new challenges in generating trustworthy explanations, since the established rule sets might not be sufficient or applicable to novel network structures. As an elegant solution to the above issue, network canonization has recently been introduced. This procedure leverages the implementation-dependency of rule-based attributions and restructures a model into a functionally identical equivalent of alternative design to which established attribution rules can be applied. However, the idea of canonization and its usefulness have so far only been explored qualitatively. In this work, we quantitatively verify the beneficial effects of network canonization to rule-based attributions on VGG-16 and ResNet18 models with BatchNorm layers and thus extend the current best practices for obtaining reliable neural network explanations.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于规则的归因方法已被证明对于为深度神经网络提供本地解释很有用，但解释现代且更加多样化的网络架构在生成可信解释方面产生了新的挑战，因为已建立的规则集可能不足以或不适用于新颖的网络结构。作为上述问题的优雅解决方案，最近引入了网络规范化。此过程利用基于规则的归因的实现依赖性，并将模型重组为功能相同的替代设计的等效项，可以应用已建立的归因规则。然而，到目前为止，经典化的想法及其实用性仅得到了定性的探讨。在这项工作中，我们定量验证了网络规范化对具有 BatchNorm 层的 VGG-16 和 ResNet18 模型基于规则的归因的有益影响，从而扩展了当前获得可靠神经网络解释的最佳实践。

AI.tldr: 本文通过定量分析验证网络规范化对提升基于规则的深度神经网络解释可靠性的作用，并扩展了现有最佳实践。
AI.motivation: 现有基于规则的归因方法难以应对新型网络结构，而网络规范化可重构模型以适配规则但缺乏定量验证。
AI.method: 在含BatchNorm层的VGG-16和ResNet18模型上，通过量化实验验证网络规范化对规则归因的增强效果。
AI.result: 实验证明网络规范化显著提升了解释的可靠性，且与原始模型功能等价。
AI.conclusion: 网络规范化是增强神经网络解释可靠性的有效方法，为可解释AI提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dimuthu D. K. Arachchige,Isuru S. Godage
title: Hybrid Soft Robots Incorporating Soft and Stiff Elements
title_zh: 结合软元件和硬元件的混合软机器人
comment: This paper has been accepted to 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft)
comments: This paper has been accepted to 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft)
abstract: Soft robots are inherently compliant and have a strong potential to realize human-friendly and safe robots. Despite continued research highlighting the potential of soft robots, they remain largely confined to laboratory settings. In this work, inspired by spider monkeys' tails, we propose a hybrid soft robot (HSR) design. We detail the design objectives and methodology to improve the controllable stiffness range and achieve independent stiffness and shape control. We extend the curve parametric approach to We experimentally demonstrate that the proposed HSR has about a 100% stiffness range increase than a previous soft robot design with identical physical dimensions. In addition, we empirically map HSR's bending shape-pressure-stiffness and present an application example - a soft robotic gripper - to demonstrate the decoupled nature of stiffness and shape variations. Experimental results show that proposed HSR can be successfully used in applications where independent stiffness and shape control is desired.
summary: Soft robots are inherently compliant and have a strong potential to realize human-friendly and safe robots. Despite continued research highlighting the potential of soft robots, they remain largely confined to laboratory settings. In this work, inspired by spider monkeys' tails, we propose a hybrid soft robot (HSR) design. We detail the design objectives and methodology to improve the controllable stiffness range and achieve independent stiffness and shape control. We extend the curve parametric approach to We experimentally demonstrate that the proposed HSR has about a 100% stiffness range increase than a previous soft robot design with identical physical dimensions. In addition, we empirically map HSR's bending shape-pressure-stiffness and present an application example - a soft robotic gripper - to demonstrate the decoupled nature of stiffness and shape variations. Experimental results show that proposed HSR can be successfully used in applications where independent stiffness and shape control is desired.
abstract_zh: 软机器人本质上是顺应性的，具有实现人性化和安全机器人的强大潜力。尽管持续的研究强调了软机器人的潜力，但它们仍然主要局限于实验室环境。在这项工作中，受蜘蛛猴尾巴的启发，我们提出了一种混合软体机器人（HSR）设计。我们详细介绍了设计目标和方法，以提高可控刚度范围并实现独立的刚度和形状控制。我们将曲线参数方法扩展到我们通过实验证明，与之前具有相同物理尺寸的软机器人设计相比，所提出的 HSR 的刚度范围增加了约 100%。此外，我们凭经验绘制了 HSR 的弯曲形状-压力-刚度，并提出了一个应用示例 - 软机器人夹具 - 来演示刚度和形状变化的解耦性质。实验结果表明，所提出的 HSR 可成功用于需要独立刚度和形状控制的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合软硬部件的混合软体机器人设计，以提升可控刚度范围并实现刚度与形状的独立控制。
AI.motivation: 传统软体机器人虽具柔顺性，但受限于实验室环境，难以实现复杂控制。受蜘蛛猴尾巴启发，需通过混合结构增强其功能适应性。
AI.method: 基于曲线参数化方法设计混合软体机器人（HSR），通过软硬元素集成扩展刚度调控范围，并实验验证其形状-压力-刚度映射关系。
AI.result: HSR的刚度范围较同类设计提升100%，实验表明其可独立调控刚度与形状，成功应用于软体夹爪等场景。
AI.conclusion: 混合结构设计有效实现了软体机器人的独立刚度与形状控制，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

method: 基于曲线参数化方法设计混合软体机器人（HSR），通过软硬元素集成扩展刚度调控范围，并实验验证其形状-压力-刚度映射关系。
result: HSR的刚度范围较同类设计提升100%，实验表明其可独立调控刚度与形状，成功应用于软体夹爪等场景。
conclusion: 混合结构设计有效实现了软体机器人的独立刚度与形状控制，为实际应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Hybrid Soft Robots Incorporating Soft and Stiff Elements 结合软元件和硬元件的混合软机器人 Soft robots are inherently compliant and have a strong potential to realize human-friendly and safe robots. Despite continued research highlighting the potential of soft robots, they remain largely confined to laboratory settings. In this work, inspired by spider monkeys' tails, we propose a hybrid soft robot (HSR) design. We detail the design objectives and methodology to improve the controllable stiffness range and achieve independent stiffness and shape control. We extend the curve parametric approach to We experimentally demonstrate that the proposed HSR has about a 100% stiffness range increase than a previous soft robot design with identical physical dimensions. In addition, we empirically map HSR's bending shape-pressure-stiffness and present an application example - a soft robotic gripper - to demonstrate the decoupled nature of stiffness and shape variations. Experimental results show that proposed HSR can be successfully used in applications where independent stiffness and shape control is desired. 软机器人本质上是顺应性的，具有实现人性化和安全机器人的强大潜力。尽管持续的研究强调了软机器人的潜力，但它们仍然主要局限于实验室环境。在这项工作中，受蜘蛛猴尾巴的启发，我们提出了一种混合软体机器人（HSR）设计。我们详细介绍了设计目标和方法，以提高可控刚度范围并实现独立的刚度和形状控制。我们将曲线参数方法扩展到我们通过实验证明，与之前具有相同物理尺寸的软机器人设计相比，所提出的 HSR 的刚度范围增加了约 100%。此外，我们凭经验绘制了 HSR 的弯曲形状-压力-刚度，并提出了一个应用示例 - 软机器人夹具 - 来演示刚度和形状变化的解耦性质。实验结果表明，所提出的 HSR 可成功用于需要独立刚度和形状控制的应用。 本文提出一种结合软硬部件的混合软体机器人设计，以提升可控刚度范围并实现刚度与形状的独立控制。 Dimuthu D. K. Arachchige,Isuru S. Godage cs.RO

authors_text: Junjie Li,Hui Cao
title: Research on Dual Channel News Headline Classification Based on ERNIE Pre-training Model
title_zh: 基于ERNIE预训练模型的双通道新闻标题分类研究
abstract: The classification of news headlines is an important direction in the field of NLP, and its data has the characteristics of compactness, uniqueness and various forms. Aiming at the problem that the traditional neural network model cannot adequately capture the underlying feature information of the data and cannot jointly extract key global features and deep local features, a dual-channel network model DC-EBAD based on the ERNIE pre-training model is proposed. Use ERNIE to extract the lexical, semantic and contextual feature information at the bottom of the text, generate dynamic word vector representations fused with context, and then use the BiLSTM-AT network channel to secondary extract the global features of the data and use the attention mechanism to give key parts higher The weight of the DPCNN channel is used to overcome the long-distance text dependence problem and obtain deep local features. The local and global feature vectors are spliced, and finally passed to the fully connected layer, and the final classification result is output through Softmax. The experimental results show that the proposed model improves the accuracy, precision and F1-score of news headline classification compared with the traditional neural network model and the single-channel model under the same conditions. It can be seen that it can perform well in the multi-classification application of news headline text under large data volume.
summary: The classification of news headlines is an important direction in the field of NLP, and its data has the characteristics of compactness, uniqueness and various forms. Aiming at the problem that the traditional neural network model cannot adequately capture the underlying feature information of the data and cannot jointly extract key global features and deep local features, a dual-channel network model DC-EBAD based on the ERNIE pre-training model is proposed. Use ERNIE to extract the lexical, semantic and contextual feature information at the bottom of the text, generate dynamic word vector representations fused with context, and then use the BiLSTM-AT network channel to secondary extract the global features of the data and use the attention mechanism to give key parts higher The weight of the DPCNN channel is used to overcome the long-distance text dependence problem and obtain deep local features. The local and global feature vectors are spliced, and finally passed to the fully connected layer, and the final classification result is output through Softmax. The experimental results show that the proposed model improves the accuracy, precision and F1-score of news headline classification compared with the traditional neural network model and the single-channel model under the same conditions. It can be seen that it can perform well in the multi-classification application of news headline text under large data volume.
abstract_zh: 新闻标题分类是NLP领域的一个重要方向，其数据具有紧凑性、唯一性、形式多样的特点。针对传统神经网络模型无法充分捕捉数据底层特征信息、无法联合提取关键全局特征和深层局部特征的问题，提出一种基于ERNIE预训练模型的双通道网络模型DC-EBAD。利用ERNIE提取文本底层的词汇、语义和上下文特征信息，生成与上下文融合的动态词向量表示，然后利用BiLSTM-AT网络通道二次提取数据的全局特征并利用注意力机制赋予关键部分较高的DPCNN通道权重，用于克服长距离文本依赖问题，获得深层局部特征。将局部和全局特征向量进行拼接，最后传递到全连接层，通过Softmax输出最终的分类结果。实验结果表明，同等条件下，该模型较传统神经网络模型和单通道模型提高了新闻标题分类的准确率、精度和F1-score。可以看出，它在大数据量下的新闻标题文本多分类应用中能够表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于ERNIE预训练模型的双通道网络DC-EBAD，用于提升新闻标题分类的准确性和特征提取能力。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络模型难以同时捕捉新闻标题数据的全局特征和局部深层特征，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: 利用ERNIE提取词法、语义和上下文特征，通过BiLSTM-AT通道二次提取全局特征，结合DPCNN通道与注意力机制获取局部特征，最终拼接特征向量并经全连接层输出分类结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在相同条件下优于传统模型和单通道模型，准确率、精确率和F1-score均显著提升，尤其适用于大规模数据的多分类任务。
AI.conclusion: 双通道结构有效融合全局与局部特征，证明了ERNIE预训练模型在新闻标题多分类场景下的优越性。

authors_text: W. A. P. Bastiaansen,M. Rousian,R. P. M. Steegers-Theunissen,W. J. Niessen,A. H. J. Koning,S. Klein
title: Multi-Atlas Segmentation and Spatial Alignment of the Human Embryo in First Trimester 3D Ultrasound
title_zh: 早孕期 3D 超声中人类胚胎的多图集分割和空间对齐
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:020.html
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:020.html
abstract: Segmentation and spatial alignment of ultrasound (US) imaging data acquired in the in first trimester are crucial for monitoring human embryonic growth and development throughout this crucial period of life. Current approaches are either manual or semi-automatic and are therefore very time-consuming and prone to errors. To automate these tasks, we propose a multi-atlas framework for automatic segmentation and spatial alignment of the embryo using deep learning with minimal supervision. Our framework learns to register the embryo to an atlas, which consists of the US images acquired at a range of gestational age (GA), segmented and spatially aligned to a predefined standard orientation. From this, we can derive the segmentation of the embryo and put the embryo in standard orientation. US images acquired at 8+0 till 12+6 weeks GA were used and eight subjects were selected as atlas. We evaluated different fusion strategies to incorporate multiple atlases: 1) training the framework using atlas images from a single subject, 2) training the framework with data of all available atlases and 3) ensembling of the frameworks trained per subject. To evaluate the performance, we calculated the Dice score over the test set. We found that training the framework using all available atlases outperformed ensembling and gave similar results compared to the best of all frameworks trained on a single subject. Furthermore, we found that selecting images from the four atlases closest in GA out of all available atlases, regardless of the individual quality, gave the best results with a median Dice score of 0.72. We conclude that our framework can accurately segment and spatially align the embryo in first trimester 3D US images and is robust for the variation in quality that existed in the available atlases.
summary: Segmentation and spatial alignment of ultrasound (US) imaging data acquired in the in first trimester are crucial for monitoring human embryonic growth and development throughout this crucial period of life. Current approaches are either manual or semi-automatic and are therefore very time-consuming and prone to errors. To automate these tasks, we propose a multi-atlas framework for automatic segmentation and spatial alignment of the embryo using deep learning with minimal supervision. Our framework learns to register the embryo to an atlas, which consists of the US images acquired at a range of gestational age (GA), segmented and spatially aligned to a predefined standard orientation. From this, we can derive the segmentation of the embryo and put the embryo in standard orientation. US images acquired at 8+0 till 12+6 weeks GA were used and eight subjects were selected as atlas. We evaluated different fusion strategies to incorporate multiple atlases: 1) training the framework using atlas images from a single subject, 2) training the framework with data of all available atlases and 3) ensembling of the frameworks trained per subject. To evaluate the performance, we calculated the Dice score over the test set. We found that training the framework using all available atlases outperformed ensembling and gave similar results compared to the best of all frameworks trained on a single subject. Furthermore, we found that selecting images from the four atlases closest in GA out of all available atlases, regardless of the individual quality, gave the best results with a median Dice score of 0.72. We conclude that our framework can accurately segment and spatially align the embryo in first trimester 3D US images and is robust for the variation in quality that existed in the available atlases.
abstract_zh: 在妊娠早期采集的超声 (US) 成像数据的分割和空间对齐对于监测整个生命关键时期的人类胚胎生长和发育至关重要。目前的方法要么是手动的，要么是半自动的，因此非常耗时且容易出错。为了自动化这些任务，我们提出了一个多图谱框架，使用深度学习在最少的监督下自动分割和空间对齐胚胎。我们的框架学习将胚胎注册到图谱中，该图谱由在一定孕龄 (GA) 范围内采集的 US 图像组成，这些图像被分割并在空间上对齐到预定义的标准方向。由此，我们可以推导出胚胎的分割，并将胚胎置于标准方向。使用在 8+0 至 12+6 周 GA 获取的 US 图像，并选择八名受试者作为图集。我们评估了不同的融合策略以合并多个图集：1）使用来自单个受试者的图集图像训练框架，2）使用所有可用图集的数据训练框架，3）每个受试者训练的框架的集成。为了评估性能，我们计算了测试集的 Dice 分数。我们发现，使用所有可用地图集训练框架的效果优于集成，并且与针对单个主题训练的所有框架中最好的框架相比，得到相似的结果。此外，我们发现，从所有可用图集中的 GA 中最接近的四个图集中选择图像，无论个体质量如何，都会得到最佳结果，中值 Dice 得分为 0.72。我们的结论是，我们的框架可以在妊娠早期 3D US 图像中准确分割和空间对齐胚胎，并且对于可用图集中存在的质量变化具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的多图集框架，用于自动分割和空间对齐早期妊娠3D超声图像中的胚胎。
AI.motivation: 当前早期妊娠超声图像的分割和空间对齐依赖人工或半自动方法，效率低且易出错，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含不同孕周标准方向的图集，通过深度学习框架实现胚胎与图集的配准，并比较单图集训练、多图集训练及模型集成三种融合策略。
AI.result: 使用全部图集训练的模型表现最佳，Dice评分为0.72，且选择孕周最接近的四个图集可获得最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能准确分割并空间对齐早期妊娠3D超声图像，且对图集质量差异具有鲁棒性。

Current approaches are either manual or semi-automatic and are therefore very time-consuming and prone to errors. To automate these tasks, we propose a multi-atlas framework for automatic segmentation and spatial alignment of the embryo using deep learning with minimal supervision. Our framework learns to register the embryo to an atlas, which consists of the US images acquired at a range of gestational age (GA), segmented and spatially aligned to a predefined standard orientation. We evaluated different fusion strategies to incorporate multiple atlases: 1) training the framework using atlas images from a single subject, 2) training the framework with data of all available atlases and 3) ensembling of the frameworks trained per subject. To evaluate the performance, we calculated the Dice score over the test set. We found that training the framework using all available atlases outperformed ensembling and gave similar results compared to the best of all frameworks trained on a single subject. Furthermore, we found that selecting images from the four atlases closest in GA out of all available atlases, regardless of the individual quality, gave the best results with a median Dice score of 0.72. We conclude that our framework can accurately segment and spatially align the embryo in first trimester 3D US images and is robust for the variation in quality that existed in the available atlases. 在妊娠早期采集的超声 (US) 成像数据的分割和空间对齐对于监测整个生命关键时期的人类胚胎生长和发育至关重要。目前的方法要么是手动的，要么是半自动的，因此非常耗时且容易出错。为了自动化这些任务，我们提出了一个多图谱框架，使用深度学习在最少的监督下自动分割和空间对齐胚胎。我们的框架学习将胚胎注册到图谱中，该图谱由在一定孕龄 (GA) 范围内采集的 US 图像组成，这些图像被分割并在空间上对齐到预定义的标准方向。由此，我们可以推导出胚胎的分割，并将胚胎置于标准方向。使用在 8+0 至 12+6 周 GA 获取的 US 图像，并选择八名受试者作为图集。我们评估了不同的融合策略以合并多个图集：1）使用来自单个受试者的图集图像训练框架，2）使用所有可用图集的数据训练框架，3）每个受试者训练的框架的集成。为了评估性能，我们计算了测试集的 Dice 分数。我们发现，使用所有可用地图集训练框架的效果优于集成，并且与针对单个主题训练的所有框架中最好的框架相比，得到相似的结果。此外，我们发现，从所有可用图集中的 GA 中最接近的四个图集中选择图像，无论个体质量如何，都会得到最佳结果，中值 Dice 得分为 0.72。我们的结论是，我们的框架可以在妊娠早期 3D US 图像中准确分割和空间对齐胚胎，并且对于可用图集中存在的质量变化具有鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的多图集框架，用于自动分割和空间对齐早期妊娠3D超声图像中的胚胎。 W. A. P. Bastiaansen,M. Rousian,R. P. M. Steegers-Theunissen,W. J. Niessen,A. H. J. Koning,S. Klein eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikita Shvetsov,Morten Grønnesby,Edvard Pedersen,Kajsa Møllersen,Lill-Tove Rasmussen Busund,Ruth Schwienbacher,Lars Ailo Bongo,Thomas K. Kilvaer
title: A Pragmatic Machine Learning Approach to Quantify Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes in Whole Slide Images
title_zh: 一种实用的机器学习方法来量化整个幻灯片图像中的肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞
abstract: Increased levels of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) in cancer tissue indicate favourable outcomes in many types of cancer. Manual quantification of immune cells is inaccurate and time consuming for pathologists. Our aim is to leverage a computational solution to automatically quantify TILs in whole slide images (WSIs) of standard diagnostic haematoxylin and eosin stained sections (H&E slides) from lung cancer patients. Our approach is to transfer an open source machine learning method for segmentation and classification of nuclei in H&E slides trained on public data to TIL quantification without manual labeling of our data. Our results show that additional augmentation improves model transferability when training on few samples/limited tissue types. Models trained with sufficient samples/tissue types do not benefit from our additional augmentation policy. Further, the resulting TIL quantification correlates to patient prognosis and compares favorably to the current state-of-the-art method for immune cell detection in non-small lung cancer (current standard CD8 cells in DAB stained TMAs HR 0.34 95% CI 0.17-0.68 vs TILs in HE WSIs: HoVer-Net PanNuke Aug Model HR 0.30 95% CI 0.15-0.60, HoVer-Net MoNuSAC Aug model HR 0.27 95% CI 0.14-0.53). Moreover, we implemented a cloud based system to train, deploy and visually inspect machine learning based annotation for H&E slides. Our pragmatic approach bridges the gap between machine learning research, translational clinical research and clinical implementation. However, validation in prospective studies is needed to assert that the method works in a clinical setting.
summary: Increased levels of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) in cancer tissue indicate favourable outcomes in many types of cancer. Manual quantification of immune cells is inaccurate and time consuming for pathologists. Our aim is to leverage a computational solution to automatically quantify TILs in whole slide images (WSIs) of standard diagnostic haematoxylin and eosin stained sections (H&E slides) from lung cancer patients. Our approach is to transfer an open source machine learning method for segmentation and classification of nuclei in H&E slides trained on public data to TIL quantification without manual labeling of our data. Our results show that additional augmentation improves model transferability when training on few samples/limited tissue types. Models trained with sufficient samples/tissue types do not benefit from our additional augmentation policy. Further, the resulting TIL quantification correlates to patient prognosis and compares favorably to the current state-of-the-art method for immune cell detection in non-small lung cancer (current standard CD8 cells in DAB stained TMAs HR 0.34 95% CI 0.17-0.68 vs TILs in HE WSIs: HoVer-Net PanNuke Aug Model HR 0.30 95% CI 0.15-0.60, HoVer-Net MoNuSAC Aug model HR 0.27 95% CI 0.14-0.53). Moreover, we implemented a cloud based system to train, deploy and visually inspect machine learning based annotation for H&E slides. Our pragmatic approach bridges the gap between machine learning research, translational clinical research and clinical implementation. However, validation in prospective studies is needed to assert that the method works in a clinical setting.
abstract_zh: 癌症组织中肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TIL）水平的增加表明许多类型的癌症都有良好的结果。对于病理学家来说，手动定量免疫细胞不准确且耗时。我们的目标是利用计算解决方案自动量化肺癌患者标准诊断苏木精和伊红染色切片（H&E 幻灯片）的整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 中的 TIL。我们的方法是将用于在公共数据上训练的 H&E 幻灯片中的细胞核分割和分类的开源机器学习方法转移到 TIL 量化，而无需手动标记我们的数据。我们的结果表明，在少数样本/有限的组织类型上进行训练时，额外的增强可以提高模型的可转移性。使用足够的样本/组织类型训练的模型不会从我们的额外增强策略中受益。此外，所得到的 TIL 定量与患者预后相关，并且与当前最先进的非小细胞肺癌免疫细胞检测方法相比较（DAB 染色 TMA HR 0.34 95% CI 0.17-0.68 中的当前标准 CD8 细胞 vs HE WSI 中的 TIL：HoVer-Net PanNuke Aug Model HR 0.30 95% CI 0.15-0.60， HoVer-Net MoNuSAC 8 月模型 HR 0.27 95% CI 0.14-0.53）。此外，我们实现了一个基于云的系统来训练、部署和直观地检查基于机器学习的 H&E 幻灯片注释。我们务实的方法弥合了机器学习研究、转化临床研究和临床实施之间的差距。然而，需要在前瞻性研究中进行验证，以断言该方法在临床环境中有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实用的机器学习方法，用于在肺癌全切片图像中自动量化肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TILs），无需手动标注数据。
AI.motivation: 手动计数免疫细胞耗时且不准确，而TILs水平与多种癌症预后相关，需开发自动化解决方案以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 迁移学习公开数据训练的开源模型进行核分割与分类，通过数据增强提升小样本/有限组织类型的模型泛化能力，并构建云端系统实现模型训练、部署与可视化验证。
AI.result: TIL量化结果与患者预后相关，且优于现有非小细胞肺癌免疫细胞检测方法（HoVer-Net模型HR 0.30-0.27），云端系统实现全流程自动化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法弥合了机器学习研究与临床应用的差距，但需前瞻性研究验证其临床可行性。

authors_text: Yufan Zeng,Jiashan Tang
title: Improved Aggregating and Accelerating Training Methods for Spatial Graph Neural Networks on Fraud Detection
title_zh: 改进的欺诈检测空间图神经网络聚合和加速训练方法
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely applied to numerous fields. A recent work which combines layered structure and residual connection proposes an improved deep architecture to extend CAmouflage-REsistant GNN (CARE-GNN) to deep models named as Residual Layered CARE-GNN (RLC-GNN), which forms self-correcting and incremental learning mechanism, and achieves significant performance improvements on fraud detection task. However, we spot three issues of RLC-GNN, which are the usage of neighboring information reaching limitation, the training difficulty which is inherent problem to deep models and lack of comprehensive consideration about node features and external patterns. In this work, we propose three approaches to solve those three problems respectively. First, we suggest conducting similarity measure via cosine distance to take both local features and external patterns into consideration. Then, we combine the similarity measure module and the idea of adjacency-wise normalization with node-wise and batch-wise normalization and then propound partial neighborhood normalization methods to overcome the training difficulty while mitigating the impact of too much noise caused by high-density of graph. Finally, we put forward intermediate information supplement to solve the information limitation. Experiments are conducted on Yelp and Amazon datasets. And the results show that our proposed methods effectively solve the three problems. After applying the three methods, we achieve 4.81%, 6.62% and 6.81% improvements in the metrics of recall, AUC and Macro-F1 respectively on the Yelp dataset. And we obtain 1.65% and 0.29% improvements in recall and AUC respectively on the Amazon datasets.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely applied to numerous fields. A recent work which combines layered structure and residual connection proposes an improved deep architecture to extend CAmouflage-REsistant GNN (CARE-GNN) to deep models named as Residual Layered CARE-GNN (RLC-GNN), which forms self-correcting and incremental learning mechanism, and achieves significant performance improvements on fraud detection task. However, we spot three issues of RLC-GNN, which are the usage of neighboring information reaching limitation, the training difficulty which is inherent problem to deep models and lack of comprehensive consideration about node features and external patterns. In this work, we propose three approaches to solve those three problems respectively. First, we suggest conducting similarity measure via cosine distance to take both local features and external patterns into consideration. Then, we combine the similarity measure module and the idea of adjacency-wise normalization with node-wise and batch-wise normalization and then propound partial neighborhood normalization methods to overcome the training difficulty while mitigating the impact of too much noise caused by high-density of graph. Finally, we put forward intermediate information supplement to solve the information limitation. Experiments are conducted on Yelp and Amazon datasets. And the results show that our proposed methods effectively solve the three problems. After applying the three methods, we achieve 4.81%, 6.62% and 6.81% improvements in the metrics of recall, AUC and Macro-F1 respectively on the Yelp dataset. And we obtain 1.65% and 0.29% improvements in recall and AUC respectively on the Amazon datasets.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已广泛应用于众多领域。最近的一项工作结合了分层结构和残差连接，提出了一种改进的深度架构，将 CAmouflage-REsistant GNN (CARE-GNN) 扩展到名为 Residual Layered CARE-GNN (RLC-GNN) 的深度模型，形成自我修正和增量学习机制，并在欺诈检测任务上取得了显着的性能提升。然而，我们发现 RLC-GNN 存在三个问题，即邻近信息的使用达到限制、深度模型固有的训练困难以及缺乏对节点特征和外部模式的综合考虑。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种方法分别解决这三个问题。首先，我们建议通过余弦距离进行相似性度量，以考虑局部特征和外部模式。然后，我们将相似性度量模块和邻接归一化的思想与节点归一化和批量归一化相结合，提出部分邻域归一化方法来克服训练困难，同时减轻图密度高带来的过多噪声的影响。最后，我们提出了中间信息补充来解决信息限制。实验是在 Yelp 和 Amazon 数据集上进行的。结果表明我们提出的方法有效地解决了这三个问题。应用这三种方法后，我们在 Yelp 数据集上的召回率、AUC 和 Macro-F1 指标分别实现了 4.81%、6.62% 和 6.81% 的改进。我们在亚马逊数据集上的召回率和 AUC 分别提高了 1.65% 和 0.29%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的空间图神经网络训练方法，以解决欺诈检测中的邻域信息限制、深度模型训练困难及节点特征与外部模式综合考虑不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RLC-GNN模型在欺诈检测中存在邻域信息利用不足、深度模型训练困难以及未充分结合节点特征与外部模式等缺陷，限制了其性能提升。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 基于余弦距离的相似性度量融合局部特征与外部模式；2) 结合邻域归一化与节点/批次归一化的部分邻域归一化方法；3) 中间信息补充机制以缓解信息局限性。
AI.result: 在Yelp数据集上召回率、AUC和Macro-F1分别提升4.81%、6.62%和6.81%；在Amazon数据集上召回率和AUC分别提升1.65%和0.29%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了RLC-GNN的三大问题，在欺诈检测任务中显著提升了模型性能。

method: 提出三种方法：1) 基于余弦距离的相似性度量融合局部特征与外部模式；2) 结合邻域归一化与节点/批次归一化的部分邻域归一化方法；3) 中间信息补充机制以缓解信息局限性。
result: 在Yelp数据集上召回率、AUC和Macro-F1分别提升4.81%、6.62%和6.81%；在Amazon数据集上召回率和AUC分别提升1.65%和0.29%。
conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了RLC-GNN的三大问题，在欺诈检测任务中显著提升了模型性能。
search_text: Improved Aggregating and Accelerating Training Methods for Spatial Graph Neural Networks on Fraud Detection 改进的欺诈检测空间图神经网络聚合和加速训练方法 Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely applied to numerous fields. A recent work which combines layered structure and residual connection proposes an improved deep architecture to extend CAmouflage-REsistant GNN (CARE-GNN) to deep models named as Residual Layered CARE-GNN (RLC-GNN), which forms self-correcting and incremental learning mechanism, and achieves significant performance improvements on fraud detection task. However, we spot three issues of RLC-GNN, which are the usage of neighboring information reaching limitation, the training difficulty which is inherent problem to deep models and lack of comprehensive consideration about node features and external patterns. In this work, we propose three approaches to solve those three problems respectively. First, we suggest conducting similarity measure via cosine distance to take both local features and external patterns into consideration. Then, we combine the similarity measure module and the idea of adjacency-wise normalization with node-wise and batch-wise normalization and then propound partial neighborhood normalization methods to overcome the training difficulty while mitigating the impact of too much noise caused by high-density of graph. Finally, we put forward intermediate information supplement to solve the information limitation. Experiments are conducted on Yelp and Amazon datasets. And the results show that our proposed methods effectively solve the three problems. After applying the three methods, we achieve 4.81%, 6.62% and 6.81% improvements in the metrics of recall, AUC and Macro-F1 respectively on the Yelp dataset. And we obtain 1.65% and 0.29% improvements in recall and AUC respectively on the Amazon datasets. 图神经网络（GNN）已广泛应用于众多领域。最近的一项工作结合了分层结构和残差连接，提出了一种改进的深度架构，将 CAmouflage-REsistant GNN (CARE-GNN) 扩展到名为 Residual Layered CARE-GNN (RLC-GNN) 的深度模型，形成自我修正和增量学习机制，并在欺诈检测任务上取得了显着的性能提升。然而，我们发现 RLC-GNN 存在三个问题，即邻近信息的使用达到限制、深度模型固有的训练困难以及缺乏对节点特征和外部模式的综合考虑。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种方法分别解决这三个问题。首先，我们建议通过余弦距离进行相似性度量，以考虑局部特征和外部模式。然后，我们将相似性度量模块和邻接归一化的思想与节点归一化和批量归一化相结合，提出部分邻域归一化方法来克服训练困难，同时减轻图密度高带来的过多噪声的影响。最后，我们提出了中间信息补充来解决信息限制。实验是在 Yelp 和 Amazon 数据集上进行的。结果表明我们提出的方法有效地解决了这三个问题。应用这三种方法后，我们在 Yelp 数据集上的召回率、AUC 和 Macro-F1 指标分别实现了 4.81%、6.62% 和 6.81% 的改进。我们在亚马逊数据集上的召回率和 AUC 分别提高了 1.65% 和 0.29%。 本文提出改进的空间图神经网络训练方法，以解决欺诈检测中的邻域信息限制、深度模型训练困难及节点特征与外部模式综合考虑不足的问题。 Yufan Zeng,Jiashan Tang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ziyang Luo,Zhipeng Hu,Yadong Xi,Rongsheng Zhang,Jing Ma
title: I-Tuning: Tuning Frozen Language Models with Image for Lightweight Image Captioning
title_zh: I-Tuning：使用图像调整冻结语言模型以实现轻量级图像字幕
abstract: Image Captioning is a traditional vision-and-language task that aims to generate the language description of an image. Recent studies focus on scaling up the model size and the number of training data, which significantly increase the cost of model training. Different to these heavy-cost models, we introduce a lightweight image captioning framework (I-Tuning), which contains a small number of trainable parameters. We design a novel I-Tuning cross-attention module to connect the non-trainable pre-trained language decoder GPT2 and vision encoder CLIP-ViT. Since most parameters are not required to be updated during training, our framework is lightweight and fast. Experimental results conducted on three image captioning benchmarks reveal that our framework achieves comparable or better performance than the large-scale baseline systems. But our models contain up to 10 times fewer trainable parameters and require much fewer data for training compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Image Captioning is a traditional vision-and-language task that aims to generate the language description of an image. Recent studies focus on scaling up the model size and the number of training data, which significantly increase the cost of model training. Different to these heavy-cost models, we introduce a lightweight image captioning framework (I-Tuning), which contains a small number of trainable parameters. We design a novel I-Tuning cross-attention module to connect the non-trainable pre-trained language decoder GPT2 and vision encoder CLIP-ViT. Since most parameters are not required to be updated during training, our framework is lightweight and fast. Experimental results conducted on three image captioning benchmarks reveal that our framework achieves comparable or better performance than the large-scale baseline systems. But our models contain up to 10 times fewer trainable parameters and require much fewer data for training compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 图像字幕是一种传统的视觉和语言任务，旨在生成图像的语言描述。最近的研究重点是扩大模型大小和训练数据数量，这显着增加了模型训练的成本。与这些高成本模型不同，我们引入了一个轻量级图像字幕框架（I-Tuning），其中包含少量可训练参数。我们设计了一种新颖的 I-Tuning 交叉注意模块来连接不可训练的预训练语言解码器 GPT2 和视觉编码器 CLIP-ViT。由于大多数参数在训练期间不需要更新，因此我们的框架轻量且快速。在三个图像字幕基准上进行的实验结果表明，我们的框架实现了与大规模基线系统相当或更好的性能。但与最先进的基线相比，我们的模型包含的可训练参数减少了 10 倍，并且需要的训练数据也少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图像字幕生成框架I-Tuning，通过冻结大部分预训练参数仅微调少量模块实现高效图像描述生成。
AI.motivation: 传统图像字幕模型因追求大规模参数和海量数据导致训练成本过高，亟需更高效的轻量化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计I-Tuning交叉注意力模块连接冻结的CLIP-ViT视觉编码器与GPT2语言解码器，仅微调少量参数实现跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中达到与大模型相当或更优的字幕质量，参数量减少10倍且训练数据需求显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 轻量化微调框架证明了在保持性能的同时大幅降低图像字幕任务的计算和数据成本的可行性。
